2.Yes’ashimwe turamushim’umukiza kubw’ibyaha byacu yapfiriye yaje mw’isi ngw’atubohore adukize aduh’ubugingo budashira yarabambw’abyemejwe n’urukundo abagome baramuhemukira yambikwa n’ikamba ry’amahwa mu mutwe byos’abyemezwa n’urukundo rwe

3.Yes’ashimwe turamushim’umukiza yarazutse yicara mw’ijuru non’ashimwe n’abari mw’ijuru rirerire none twese ntitugitiny’urupfu nyagasani wararunesheje ahubwo rwahinduw’irembo ry’ijuru no kuzaka kwawe  mucunguzi

title: 10.Nshim'Umwami wo mw'ijuru
lyrics:
10.Nshim’umwami wo mw’ijuru Ntang’ibyo mushimisha Nari mboshyw’ arambohora Nari ndway’arankiza Tumushimire tumushimire Ni we mwam’uhoraho

2.basogokuru kera bari mu  mubabaro abagirir’imbabazi tumuhimbaz’ibyo na none tumwizigire  kukw ar’uko yakoze

3.ni data wa twese mwiza az’intege nke zacu nukw’aradukuyakuya ngw’aturinde satani duhimbaze imbabazi ze zitarangir’iteka

4.yewe bamarayika beza nimushim’uwiteka namwe bera bo mw’ijuru bavuye mwisi yose mwese mushimane natwe nyirigir’uhoraho

title: 11.Mpimbariz’Iman’ibyo yankoreye
lyrics:
11.Mpimbariz' Iman' ibyo yankoreye : Yatanz' Umwana wayo w'ikinege, Amfir' ab' icyiru cy'ibyaha byanjye; Nukw’ anshir' icyanzu ngo njyemw’ijuru.

ref:Nsingize, nsingize Yesu  wamfiriye! Nsingize, nsingize uwo Mwami wanjye! Namwe ngo nimuz' abageze kwa Se;Mumwitabe mwese, mumusingize 

2.Yamberey' inshungu i Gologota, Angur’ amaraso : sinkir’ uwanjye. Uwab’ umugome, akamwizera ,Yakizw' ako kany' akababarirwa.

3.Yakoz' ibikomeye ! Twishimane ! Twishimir' ubuntu n'imbabazi ze. Nyamar' ubw' azaza tumwirebera, Nta wavug' uburyo tuzamushima.

title: 12.Tunezerewe k’Umukiza
lyrics:
12.Tunezerewe k’ Umukiza yaje. Yadupfiriye twese, maz' arazuka.

ref:Turirimbir' Umukiza ko yadupfiriye! Haleluya, tunezerwe kuko yazutse !

2.Tunezerewe kw ar' Umucyo w'isi; Ni we weyuy’ umwijima twahozemo.

3.Tunezerewe kw amaraso yeza; Yaduhay' agakiza; turacunguwe.

4. Tunezerewe ko twarihiriwe, ubw' Uwera yapfirag' abanyabyaha.

5.Tunezerewe k' Umukiz' ariho; Ni we Mwana w'intama watsinz'urupfu.

6.Tunezerewe kw ari mw ijur' ubu; N' Umuvugire wacu ku Mana yera.

7.Tunezerewe k' Umukiza wacu Azaz’atujyan' atugeze mw ijuru.

title: 13.Uwambitswe ker’ikamba
lyrics:
13.Uwambitswe ker' ikamba Ritatse mu mahwa None yambitsw' iry'ubwami Kuko yanesheje.

2.None yicaye mu ijuru, Ategeka byose, Ari we Mwami w'abami N'umucy' udashira.

3.Ni we munezero wacu N'uw'abo mw ijuru : Yatwerets’ urukundo rwe, Ubwo yabambwaga.

4.Yes' umusaraba wawe, Nubw' ar' uw'isoni, Uvamw ubuntu kubwacu N'ibyishimo byinshi.

5.Tubabarana na Yesu, Tukir' aha mw isi. Maze, ni tujya mw ijuru, Tuzimana na We.

6.Mukiza, ku musaraba,waradupfiriye:twabishwe n'ibicumuro,tubeshwaho na wo.

title: 14.Mana,turaguhimbaza
lyrics:
14.Mana, turaguhimbaza; Twemeye yuk' ur' Umwami; Haleluya ! Haleluya !Data wa twes' udashira, Isi yos' irakwambaza : Haleluya ! (x 5)

2.Ni Wowe wera dedede, Mwami w'iyi si n'ijuru : Haleluya ! Haleluya ! Dor' icyubahiro cyawe Cyamamaye mw isi yose :Haleluya ! (x 5)

3.Kand' abahanuzi bawe N'intumwa nziza za Yesu Haleluya ! Haleluya ! Baguhirabazanya, Mana, N'abishwe babamuhora :Haleluya ! (x 5)

4.N'itorero na ryo n'uko Ry'abera bo mw isi yose Haleluya ! Haleluya ! Rikunda kugushimana  na za ngabo zo mw ijuru : Haleluya ! (x 5)

5.Data wa twese n'Umwana N'Umwuka Wer' Iman' imwe, Haleluya ! Haleluya !Iman' imwe mu Butatu Ishimirw’ icyubahiro : Haleluya! (x 5)

title: 15.Nimushim’izina ryiza
lyrics:
15. Nimushim' izina ryiza ry'Uwiteka Rurema; N'icyubahiro cye cyinshi nimucyamamaze hose hose
Nimuvug' urukundo rwe, bose barwumve,Abo ku mpera y'isi bamenye kw akiza.

ref:urukundo rw'Uwiteka ruratemba nk'uruzi kand'ubuntu bwe n'ibambe ntabwo bizashir'iteka ryose

2.Nimushim' Umwami Yesu : ni we Mwana w'Intama Wapfiriy’ abanyabyaha, hanyum' agahambwa
 mu gituro  Maze, kuwa gatatu, yaneshej' urupfu, Arazuk' arazamuka, yima mw ijuru.

3.Kand' umuns' uzaza vuba, Yes' agaruke mw isi Kwim' ingoma ye n'ubwami mu cyubahiro n'ubwiza
 bwinshi, Isi n'ijuru byombi binezerwe hamwe N'inyamaswa n'inyoni n'ibyaremwe byose.

4.Icyo gihe cy'ibirori, tuzaririmba twishimye, Twiteguye nk'umugeni, uko arimba
yitegur' umukwe; Kukw Umwam' azamanuka ngw az' adusange, Tub' imbata ze zera zinezerw' iteka.

title: 16.Aba Yesu bishimira
lyrics:
16.Aba  Yesu   Bishimira Izina  Rye  Ryiza Ribamara Umubabaro Rikabatinyura

2.Umutima  Ukomeretse Niryo  Riwukiza  Ushonje  Rirawuhaza  Riruhur’ Urushye

3.Niryo  Ngabo Yanjye  Nziza Ihor’  Inkingira N' Urutare Nubakaho N’ Inzu Yanjy’  Itagwa

4.Ur’ Umutambyi  Nemera N’ Umwam’ Untegeka N’ Umwungeri Ujy’ Andagira N’ Inshuti  Nizera

5.Ni Wowe  Bugingo  Bwanjye, Kandi  Kuri  Wowe Ni  Ho  Nsiganirwa , Yesu Kand’ Uri N’ Inzira

6.Nuko  Ndasaba  Wemere  Ishimwe  Ngushima Nubwo  Ntabasha  Kuvuga Ibigukwiriye

7.Yes’ Ubwo  Nzakwirebera  Uk’ Uri Mw’ Ijuru Nibwo  Nzajya  Ngusingiza  Uko  Bikwiriye

8.Na  Non’ Uko  Mbishoboye Nzajya  Nguhimbaza No Mw’ Ipfa  Ryanjye  Iryo Zina Rizampumuriza

title: 17.Nshim’Umuremy’uhoraho
lyrics:
17.Nshim' Umuremy' uhoraho Wahanits' ijuru, Inyanj 'akazidendeza;Yiremeye byose. Yashyizeho n'izuba rye Kumurika ku munsi,
 N'ukwezi n'inyenyeri bye Byo kwaka n'ijoro.

2.Mushime ko yategetse Imyaka ngw imere; Yaremeshej' ijambo rye Ibizima byose. Nitegerez' ibyiza bye Ku mpande zos' iteka, 
Hasi no hasi no hejuru; Ntabwo bihinyuka.

3. Mw isi nta kintu kiriho Kiterekan' ibye. Ni We wenyin' utegeka Izuba n'imvura. lmana ni Y' ibeshaho Twe n'inyamaswa zose.
 Nta hantu twayihungira, Nta na hw itagera

title: 18.Umwungeri wacu ni We
lyrics:
18.a. Umwungeri wacu ni we Yesu; Ajy' arinda intama ze. Aturagira mu bwatsi bwiza; Ni W' utubumbatira. 
Yes' Umwami, Yes' Umwami  Ni We waducunguye :X2

2.Ni twe ntama zawe, Mwami Yesu ;Utuyubor' inzira ! Uturind' ibyago n'amakuba, Udukure mu byaha ! 
Yes' Umwami, Yes' Umwami,  Mutabazi, twumvire !X2

3.Yesu yemeye kutwakir' ubu,Nubwo dukiranirwa. Amaraso y' aratwuhagira; Niwe munyambabazi ! 
Yes' Umwami, Yes' Umwami,  Twihute, tumwitabe.X2

4.Yes' utwemere tw' abagusanze, Twihannye, tubabaye. Ur' Umwami kand' ur' Umukiza; Tur' abawe kuv' ubu !
 Yes' Umwami, Yes' Umwami. Dor' abakwiragije ! X2


b.Mukiza. Mwungeri mwiza,Dushorez' urukundo. Ikiganza cyawe cyiza Kitugaburir' ubu uhimbazwe, Mucunguzi,

ref:Mukiza turi  abawe. Twebwe tur' abaw' iteka  Kand' uhimbazwe, Yesu.

2.No kubw' imbabazi zawe Utwuhagir' ibyaha; No kubw' imbaraga zawe Wez' imitima yacu,

3.Turashaka kukumvira Mu mategeko yawe; Nuko kubw' ibyo, dushaka Kubon' imyizerere.

4.Mukiza, Mwungeri mwiza.Turagukurikira. Utugwiriz' imbaraga Kandi  ujy' uturamira.

title: 19.Ijuru ryawe ,Mana
lyrics:
19.Ijuru ryawe, Mana, Riraguhimbaza : Ushimwa. n'ikirere N'ibirimo byose. Bishim' ubudasiba Ku manywa na n'ijoro
 Icyubahiro cyawe N'ubwenge n'ubuntu.

2.Izuba ryawe, Mana, Hamwe n'inyenyeri N'ukwezi na ko, byose Biraguhimbaza. 
Bibwiriz' amahanga Atarumv' ibya Yesu Ubwiza bw'Umuremyi Wabiremye byose.

3.Ijambo ryawe ryera N' iry'ukuri rwose; Ni ryiza, kandi ni ryo Riduhumuriza.
 Kand' ubutunzi bwawe N'ubwenge bwo mw ijuru, Duhora tubihabwa lyo tukumviye.

4.Nta n'umw' ubasha kubwe Kwirinda ngw atagwa. No kujy' akor' ibyiza No kudacumura : Man' ujy' umfash' iteka.
Ndeke kukwibagirwa No kugucumuraho Bikakubabaza.

5.Ibyo waremye byose Byo mw ijuru n'isi Bishim' izina ryawe;Nanjye ngusingize.
 Ndashaka kugutura Uyu mutima wanjye N'uyu mubiri na wo; Bib' imbata zawe

title: 20.Mbony’Umukiza mwiza
lyrics:
20.Mbony' Umukiza  mwiza ,niYesu Krisito, Ni W' urut' inshuti zose zo mw isi. Igikundiro cye cyinshi ni cyo  cyanyemeje
 Kumusanga ngw anyuh'agir' ankize! Anyurura mbabaye, ankiz' amakuba; Amaganya yanjy' ajy'ayanyakira,
Yaka nk'inyenyer' iteka; n' uw'igikundiro;Niw' urut' inshuti zose zo mw isi

ref:Anyurura mbabaye, ankiz amakuba, Amaganya yanjy' ajy' ayanyakira; Yaka nk'inyenyer' iteka: n' uw'igikundiro;
Ni w' urut' inshuti zose zo mw isi.

2.Intimba zanjye zose, yarazikoreye; Uko ngeragejw' andinda wa Mubi. Ibyantwazag' igitugu, yarabimbatuye : 
N'igihome cyanjye, njya mwihishamo Naterwa na Satani, ngahanwa n'inshuti, Yes' azantabar' angeze mw ijuru !
 Yaka nk'inyenyer' iteka; n' uw'igikundiro; Ni W urut’'inshuti zose zo mw 'isi

3.Ntazansiga nk'imfubyi, ntazampemukira.Mpora mbeshwaho no kwizera gusa. Ubw' angoteshej' ingabo, nta cyo ngitinya pe.
Ajy' antungisha manu yo mw’ ijuru.Njya nkumbura n'umunsi nzagera Mw’ ijuru.Nzanezerwa ni mureba mu maso :
Yaka nk'inyenyer' iteka; n' uw'igikundiro. Ni W’ urut' inshuti zose zo mw isi

title: 21.Mwami,turagushima
lyrics:
21.Mwami, turagushima, Turaguhimbaza rwose :Mana, turagukuza Hamwe n'abamarayika. Turagupfukamiye, Turakuramya, Mwami

2.Kiz’ abaw’Uwiteka. Ushimish' impano zawe Ukuz' ubwiza bwawe, Bub' ubwaw’ iteka ryose ! N'urukund' ubajyane Mu Bwami bwo mw ijuru !

3.Hos’amahoro yawe Agwire mu bawe bose! None n’bihe byose! Mw isi no mu nyanja Hose, Izina ry'Umukiza Ripfukamirwe cyane !

4.Shimishwa, Mwuka wera ! Shimishwa, Data wa twese ! Shimishwa, Mwami Yesu, Murokozi wacu twese ! Nukw imbabazi zawe Zibahw iteka ryose

title: 22.Mwami mwiza w’ijuru
lyrics:
22.Mwami mwiza w'ijuru, Twese twaje kugushima,Uri Nyir'imbaraga, Muremyi w'ibintu byose; Kand' uduh' amahoro, Udukiz' imitima.

2.Watumy' Umwami Yesu Ngw atwigish’ibyiza byawe;Twe gukomez’ibyaha, Kandi turek' ingeso mbi; Kuk' utubabarira, Twese turagushima

title: 23.Mana yo mw’ ijuru
lyrics:
23.Mana yo mw ijuru, Byos' uri nyirabyo, Kand' ubiduh' ubudasiba. Utang’ utimana; Ujy' udukenura, Bituma tuguhimbaza. 

2.Impan' ihebuje Yes’ atugabira N' ubuntu bwe n'amahoro ye. Yatubabariye, Twaramugomeye : Mbes’ ibyo s’ igitangaza? 

3.Mwami, ndakwinginze, Nubwo ntakwiriye, Nyigiza hafi, tugumane ! Mpa kugukorera, Ndusheho kwemera Gukund’ ibiri mw ijuru !

title: 24.Njya nshima,nshima
lyrics:
24. Njya nshima nshima nshima nshim' Imana mu mutima, Mu mutima, mu mutima. Njya nshima nshima nshima nshim’ Imana
 mu mutima, Mu mutima wanjye.

2.Nta n'urubanza, nta rubanza nshiriweho rwose, Mu mutima, mu mutima. Nta n'urubanza, nta rubanza nshiriweho
 rwose,Mu mutima wanjye.

3.Mfit' amahor' arut' uko yamenywa mu mutima, Mu mutima, mu mutima. Mfit' amahor' arut' uko yamenywa
 mu mutima, Mu mutima wanjye.

title: 25.Uwiteka n’umunyambabazi
lyrics:
25.Uwiteka n' umunyambabazi;N' Umukunzi wac' udahemuka; Nta warondor' imbarag' agira; Nta wager' urukundo rwe rwinshi.

2.Ni We Tangiriro n'Imperuka. Aturindish' imbaraga nyinshi. Tumushimir' ibyatubayeho; Tumuragize n'ibir' imbere.

title: 26.Mana Rurema,ndagushima
lyrics:
26. Mana Rurema, ndagushima : Wabonetse muri Yesu. Dor' urukundo rwawe rwinshi Wakunze twebw’ abangizi ! Mana, watanz' Umwana wawe Ngw adukirish' amaraso ye.

2.Njye nguhimbaza, Mwami Yesu,Kuko wangiriy' ibambe, Kandi Unkurahw ibyaha byanjye. Muvunyi wanjye, ndagushima; Ndakwihaye, mb' uwawe rwose.

3.Wasiz’ ubwiza bwawe bwose War' ufit' ahw Iman' iri, Umber’ Intama y'igitambo, Utwar' ibyaha by'abantu. Ngukundira, Mukiza wanjye Ibyo wanyishyuriye byose.

4.Urwo rukundo rwawe rwinshi Rujya runtangaza cyane, Uko nagiriw’ ubwo buntu, Usumba byos' akamfira ! Reka ngukunde, Mwami Yesu; Iminsi yose ngushimishe.

title: 27.Mutabazi wacu Yesu
lyrics:
27.Mutabazi wacu Yesu, Twese tuguhimbaze; Ni wowe wadupfiriye,Yesu Mwana w'Intama.

ref:Yes' ashimwe. Yes' ashimwe Icyubahiro kibe Icy' uwo Mwana w' Intama. Duhimbaze izina rye.

2.Twar’imbohe za Satani,Twari mu mubabaro; Yatuboheshej’ ingoyi, Yes' aratubohora.

3.Tuguh' imibiri yacu N'imitima n'ubwenge; Kand’ibyo dufite byose Bib' ibyawe, Mukiza.

4.Tukwijejwe cyanecyane N’ uk' ushobora rwose Kuturinda no kutwoza Ibyo twagucumuye.

title: 28.Muganga wacu  ni Yesu
lyrics:
28.Muganga wacu ni Yesu :Niwe Mukiza wacu; Ni na w' ubyuts' abaguye ; Umv' ijwi ry'ugukunda !

ref:Indirimbo z’lmana Ni zo zidushimisha : Turirimbane, tuti; Yesu, Yesu, Yesu !

2.imyend' urayirihiwe ! Umv' ijwi ry'Umukiza. Azakugeza mw ijuru. ng' unezeranwe na We.

3.Izina ryiza rya Yesu Ni ryo rikuru rwose. Dushim uwo Mucunguzi Imyaka yacu yose.

title: 29.Uduhagarare hagati
lyrics:
29.Uduhagarare Hagati, Mukiza,Iki gihe cyacu Cyo guseng' ucyeze.

2.Yesu tugisenga, Suk' Umwuka Wera Mu mitima yacu, Atubwir' ibyawe.

3.Kwinjira kwe kwera Kutumar' ubwoba N'agahinda kose, Tube mu mahoro.

4.Tutabuzwa n'ibyo, Yes’ inzira yawe, Tuzayikomeza. Dufit' intege nshya.

5.Kandi tukigenda,Tuzategereza igihe cyo kuza Kwawe turi maso.

title: 30.Ai Mukunzi  wanjye  we
lyrics:
30.Ai Mukunzi wanjye we, Umpe kukwihishamo. iyo ntewe n'iby'isi N'ingabo za Satani, Mutabaz’umpish' ubwo
, Babanzi be kumfata Umber' ubuhungiro, Mu rupf' uzanyakire.

2.Nta bundi buhungiro, Mwam’ unyirokorere; We kunsiga, Krisito, Komez' uiy' undengera. Ni Wow' ump’ imbaraga,
 Nta wundi mfit' umfasha; Mbundikiz' amababa, Uhor' undind' ibibi.

3.Ur' umunyambabazi Zitarangira, Yesu; Usindagiz' urushye, N'urway' uramukiza,  Urera bihebuje,
Ntabwo ngutunganiye; Ndi mubi bikabije,  Wow' urakiranuka.

4.Yesu ni Wowe soko Y'amazi y'ubugingo, Reka nkunyweho cyane, Undudubiz' imbere. Nuk' umutima
 wanjye Ujye wuzur' iteka, Amazi y'iyo soko Abe mensh' adakama

title: 31.Mutabaz’ubuntu bwawe
lyrics:
31. Mutabaz' ubuntu bwawe Ni jyew' ubukwiriye. Burakiz' abandi cyane; None, nanjye bunzemo.Bunzemo, bunzemo. None, nanjye bunzemo. 

2.Data mwiza, Mana yera,Mpora ngucumuraho. Mfit' ibyaha byinshi cyane, Umbabarir' umpire.Bimveho ! Bimveho ! Umbabarir' Umpire.

3.Ntumpiteho, Yesu wanjye;Nkwisunge, nkwiragize ! Mfit' inzara, mfit' inyota, Ndakwinginz’ undengere.Ndengera, ndengera Ndakwinginz' undengere.

4.Mwuka Wer’ ump' umutima Wizey' Umucunguzi; Yes' unyuhagir' ibyaha Mu maraso wavuye.Mboneza, mboneza Mu maraso wavuye 

5.Mwuka Wera, jye nd' impumyi;Ndakwinginz’ umpumure. Ujy' uhamy’ iby'Umukiza; Non' umumpishurire.Nd' impumyi, nd' impumyi! Non' umumpishurire

6.Urukundo rwawe, Yesu, Ruva ku musaraba, Urunyerek' ub' unkize ; Noneh' unyiharire.nkiz'ubu! nkiz'ubu! noneh'unyiharire!

title: 32.Mwam’utuvuburir’imvura
lyrics:
32.Mwam' utuvubir' imvura, Nkuko wasezeranye Twumva twumye mu mitima : Uduhembuz' imvura.

ref:Utuvubir' imvura, iy'umugisha wawe  Hahoze hagw' urujojo: Duh'umuvumbi wawe 

2.Mwam' utuvubir’ imvura :Yaduhembura rwose. Twumva mu matw' irahinda : Uyidusohozeho !

3.Mwam' utuvubir’ imvura,Iducunshumukeho  . Tuje guhabw' umugisha Wadusezeranije.

4.Mwam' utuvubir' imvura Icyamp' ikagwa vuba, Ubu tukiri ku mavi, Tukigutakambira

title: 33.Ndagushimiye,Mukiza
lyrics:
33.Ndagushimiye, Mukiza,Urukundo wankunze; Nuk' umpindur’ umugende  W'amazi y'ubugingo.

Ref:Mb' umugende gusa, Yesu,Wuzuyemw imbaraga Z'agakiza kawe, Mwami, ubone kuntembamo 

2.Mb' umugend' ugez' amazi Mu mitim’ isaraye, Ibone kunyw' agakiza K'ubutumwa bw'ineza.

3.Mb' ikibindi cyawe, Yesu :Nuk' unyoz' untunganye, Maz' unyuzuz' ayo mazi, Niyo Mwuka w'Imana.

4.Mb' umugabo wo guhamya Uburyo wankijije : Waranguze ngo mb' uwawe, Nuk' unyuzure rwose.

5.Yesu, suk' Umwuka Wera Mu mutima wanjy’ ubu, Kugira ngo ngez' amazi Yawe mu basaraye !

title: 34.Ndusheho kukwegera
lyrics:
34.Ndusheho kukwegera, Mukiza, Ne kukuba kure: Nkwishingikirizeho, Mukiza, Ungendeshe neza.

2.Nerekan’ icyubahiro cyawe Mu byo nkora byose; Akanwa kanjye kajye kavuga Ibyiz' umbwiriza.

3.Umpindure nk'isoko y'ibyiza,Itemb' idakama; He kugir' undi nkorer' iteka, Databuja mwiza.

4.Kand' imigambi yanjye n'inama Ubyigandurire; Nyemeza k' ur' Umwami wenyine Untegeka byose.

5.Ni Wowe mutsima w'ubugingo N'amazi mazima; iyo nishwe n'inzara n'inyota, Ni Wow' ujy' umpaza.

6.Ni Wow' uhaza kwifuza kwiza,Kose niyumvamo. Ni tujy' i wawe, ntacyo, Mukiza, Tuzifuz' ukundi.

title: 35.Umpe kukwegera
lyrics:
35.Umpe Kukwegera  Mana Yanjye Naho Twafatanya Umusaraba Nagumya Kwishima,Nkajya Ngusenga Nti:Umpe Kukwegera Mana Yanjye

2.Umpe Kukwegera Mana Yanjye Jy’undenger’iteka Ngumye Nkwizere Ntewe Na Satani,Ujy’undwanirira Umpe Kukwegera Mana Yanjye

3.Naho Natungurwa N’umwijima Nkisegur’ibuye Mbaye Jyenyine Nzabe Nka Yakobo Ndot’ibyo Mw’ijuru Nkomeze Nkwizere Mana Yanjye

4.Wakinguy’ijuru Mana Yanjye Urwego Ruriho Rutugezayo Mugenzi Komera,Jy’usab’itek’uti Tujye Tugumana  Mana Yanjye

title: 36.Ntumpiteho  Mukiza
lyrics:
36.Ntumpiteho  Mukiza We Wumv’uko nganya Ubw’ugenderera Abandi Nanjye Ntunsige

Ref:Yesu Mukiza Wanjye Wumv’uko nganya Ubwo Ugenderera Abandi Nanjye Ntusige

2.Mpa Kweger’intebe Yawe Mpabw’imbabazi Ngupfukamiye Mbabaye Mpa Kukwizera

3.Nta Wundi Nakwizigira Ni Wowe Nshaka Mvur’ibikomere Byanjye Umbabarire

4.Ur’isoko Y’amahoro Nyir’ubugingo Singir’undi Niyambaza Keretse Wowe

title: 37.Tuguman’iteka
lyrics:
37.Tuguman' iteka,—Mukiz' uhebuje. Ijwi ryawe ryiza—Rizan’ amahoro.

ref:Ku manywa na n'ijoro,—Ndagushak'iteka. Ndahiriwe, Mukiza:—Twigumanire. 

2.Ndagushak' iteka :—Jy' ungum' iruhande.Nsind' amoshya yose,—iyo turi kumwe.

3.Ndagushak'iteka ,—Nturiz' amaganya. Ngwin' ubu, tubane,—Mbone gutungana.

4.Ndagushak' iteka,—Nyigish' iby’ ushaka Kand' uce muri jye—Ingeso zose mbi.

5.Ndagushak' iteka,—Wa Mwami wera  we! Mb' uwaw' unyobore,—Nyir'imigisha

title: 38.Ai Mana ndondor’umenye
lyrics:
38.Ai Mana  Ndondor’umenye Ibyo Nkora Byose Werekane Uko Ndi Kose Nifata Uko Ntari 

2.Ndondorere Uyu Mutima Ni Wowe Ushobora Kugaragaza Ibirimo  Mu Bwihisho Bwawo 

3.Umurik’ahatabona Ah’umwijim’uba Ump’umutima Ukangutse Uzinukw’icyaha 

4.Kand’umeny’ibyo Nibwira N’imigambi Yanjye N’ibimbamo Binyanduza Bikangir’imbohe 

5.Mvugutira Kand’unshure Inkamba Zimvemo Umpindur’icyuma Cyawe Uhor’ukoresha 

6.Maze Nkwikubis’imbere Mpishurirwe Rwose Yukw’Imana Ar’urukundo Rutagir’ingano

title: 39.Ngwino,mutima wanjye
lyrics:
39.Ngwino, mutima wanjye, Witab' Umwami wawe ! Winjir' umuhakweho, Kukw akund' abaz' i We.

2.Kw ar’ Umwam' ukomeye, Wamusaba bike, se ? Ubushobozi n' ubwe, N'ubuntu n'imbabazi.

3.Mbanze nsab' imbabazi, Kuko nakugomeye. Umutwaro w'ibyaha, Dor' ubury' undembeje !

4.Amaraso wavuye, Uri ku musaraba, Yoza abakiranirwa, Nukw anyoz' amboneze.

5.Unduhure nonaha, Ndakwihay' unturemo! Wanshunguj' amaraso, Nukw unyitegekere!

6.Mu rugendo rw'iyi si, Mb' intumwa ya Krisito, Ahw ashak' untumeyo, Nkuz' izina rya Yesu !

title: 40.Ndakwizeye,Yesu
lyrics:
40.Ndakwizeye Yesu, Mwana w'intama ko wamfiriye.None,ndakwinginze, Unyoz' umutima, None ubu, mb' uwawe unyakire !

2.Nyuzuz' imbabazi, Unyobor' inzira, umpembure !Ubwo wankunz' utyo, Ukamfira, Yesu,  Umvugutire, nanjye ngukunde!

3.Ni nterw' umwijima N'ibyago by'iyi si, unyobore ! mar' umubabaro, Weyur’ umwijima, Kandi ntundekere kure yawe !

title: 41.Nasezeranije guhora
lyrics:
41.Nasezeranije guhora Ngukurikira, Yesu; Iminsi yos' umpore hafi, Mukiza wanjye mwiza. Singitiny' intambara mbi zose.Wow’ umpagarikiye, Sinashobora kuzimira, Ni mpora nkuyoboka.

2. Ndashaka yuko twibanira, Ni ngeragezwa n'isi. , Numv' amajwi yay' anyinginga Iteka ngo nkuveho. Ababisha baranyegereye, Bar’ inyuma n'imbere. Nyamara, nkwisunge, Krisito, Undind' ibicumuro.

3.Mukiz’ ijwi ryawe numvise Rindutir’ ayo yose : Unyongorere mu mutima Ngo ntumvir’ ayo moshya, Hor’ umbwiriz' ibyo kuntinyura,  Kand' uhor' ;untegeka, Uvuge ngo nanjye nkumvire, Murengezi nizera.

4.Mukiza wasezeranije Abagukurikira Yuk’ uzabageza mw ijuru, Bahoraneyo nawe. Kandi nanjye nasezeranije Guhora ngukorera; Umfashish’ ubuntu n'ibambe, We Databuja wera

5.Kand’ umpe kuger' ikirenge Mu cyawe, Muyobora. Imbaraga zawe zonyine,Ni zo njya niringira. Ujy’ unyobor' iyo nzira yawe, Nkiriho mur'iyi si; Maz' uzanyakire mw ijuru, Mukunzi wankijije

title: 42.Mwami wanjye,nshaka kuba
lyrics:
42.Mwami wanjye, nshaka kuba Uwakijijwe nawe : Nake kubwawe wenyine Kuk' ur' umucyo wanjye;Mu kwitonda kwanjye numve Urukundo rw'ukuri. No mu mwijima w'ijoro, Nkwibuke, Mwami Yesu.

2.Mwami wanjye, nshaka kuba Urumuri kubwawe, Ngo njye murikir’ ab'isi Baheze mu mwijima.Nakire mu nzira zabo, Bakuri kure cyane. Mbageze ku Mwami Yesu, Ngo nabo bamwizere.

3.Mwami wanjye nshaka kuba Uvug' Ijambo ryawe, Namamaze, Databuja,Yuko watubambiwe: Abari mu rupfu rubi, Mbabwir' ikibakiza, Mpumuriz’ abababaye; Nyobore bose i Bwami.

title: 43.Ngwin’unyigishe ya nkuru
lyrics:
43.Ngwino, Mwami Yesu, ngwino, Kuko tugukumbuye. Utuvane mu ntege nke, Uturuhure vuba ! 

2.Yesu, byishimo by'abawe,Byiringiro by'ababi, Amahanga yose yose. Arakwifuza cyane.

3.Yesu ni ryo zina wiswe :Waje kuturokora, Wavuts’ ur' akana gato, Nyamar' uri n'Umwami.

4.Kubw’ Umwuka wawe wera, Mwami Yes' unyimemo ! Nuk' ungirir' uk' ushaka, Uzangeze mw ijuru !

title: 44.Tubabarire,duh’umugisha
lyrics:
44.Tubabarire :—Duh' umugisha. Tumurikirwe—N'ubuntu bwawe, Ngw inzira yaw' imenyekane mw isi, Abantu bameny' ubugingo bwawe.

2.Kand' amahanga—Agusingize. Nukw anezerwe,—Kand’ aririmbe. Ur’ Umucamanza n'Umwami wabo; Uzacir' ab'isi— Imanza nziza.

3.Wategets’ isi—Ngo yer’ imyaka. Mana, ni Wowe—Uturengera. Imigish' uduha—Tuyamamaze, Maz' iyi si yos' ikugandukire.

title: 45.Ndagushaka,Mwami Yesu
lyrics:
45.Ndagushaka, Mwami Yesu Ntabwo nakwishoboza. Ndifuza k’ umpora hafi, Ukajy' ump' imbaraga.

ref:Nta cyo nti... nya noneho.., Nkore byo... s' untegeka... Njye nguku.. .rikira hose, Nkumvira, nguhakwaho.

2.Ndagushaka, Mwami Yesu Jye nd' umunyantege nke. Uzamber' umujyanama. Nta wundi mbitezeho.

3.Ndagushaka, Mwami Yesu,Aho ndi mur'iyi si, Mu muvumbi no ku zuba, Mu bimbabaza byose.

5.Ndagushaka, Mwami Yesu, Hos' uzajy’ unyobora; Ngeze kuri wa Mugezi, Uzamfashe nywambuke.

title: 46.Unjy’imbere,Man’isumba byose
lyrics:
46.Unjy' imbere, Man’ isumba byose, Jye nd' umunyantege nke. Mur' iyi si ko nd’ umwimukira, Ntagufite, nagera he ? Unjy' Imbere, unjy’ Imbere,Mber’ ingab' inkingira. Yes' umber’ Ingab' inkingira 

2.Mwam’ undudubirizemw isoko Y'amazi y'ubugingo. Unyoboz’ umuriro n'igicu Mu nzir' injyana mw ijuru.Mber’ impamba, mber’ impamba Ijy' intunga mu nzira, Ijy’ intunga ngana mw’ ijuru.

3.Ni ngera ku nkombe ya rwa Ruzi, Uzampe gutinyuka Amazi maremare y'urupfu, Nyambuke, ngere mw ijuru.Nzaririmba. nzaririmba Indirimbo z'ishimwe, Indirimbo zigusingiza.

title: 47.Ube maso, Mukristo
lyrics:
47.Ube maso, Mukristo: Nturuhuke nonaha, Amakub'ari hafi; Usabe !

2.Ababisha b'lmana Bajya bakwubikira, Baguciriy' ibico; Usabe !

3. Ujye wambar’ intwaro yesu yakwihereye. Ku manywa na n’ijoro, Wirinde !

4. Umv' abatsinze kera iyo ntambar' urwana; Baraguhugura, ngo : Usabe !

5.Umva n'Umwami wawe, Yesu wagupfiriye, Ni We watubwiy' ati ; Ba maso !

6.Iryo jamb'uryemere N'umutima wizeye, Kugira ng' urikore; Usabe !

title: 48.Ni jye,ni jye gusa
lyrics:
48.ref:Ni jye, ni jye gusa, Nkwiriye gusabirwa. Ni jye, ni jye gusa, Nkwirive gusabirwa.

1.Si na data, si na mama,Ni jye jyenyine, Nkwiriye gusabirwa. Si na data, si na mama, Ni jye jyenyine, Nkwiriye gusabirwa.

2.Kandi si na mwene data,Ni jye jyenyine, Nkwiriye gusabirwa. Reka, si na mwene data	

3.S' abo mu muryango wacu, Ni jye jyenyine, Nkwiriye gusabirwa. S’ abo muryango wacu....

4.Ndetse si n'inshuti zanjye,Ni jye jyenyine, Nkwiriye gusabirwa. Reka, si n'inshuti zanjye ....(Iy' Abirabura bo mw‘Amerika)

title: 49.Ibihe nseng' Uwiteka
lyrics:
49.Ibihe nseng' Uwiteka Bintarura mu mpagarara, Ngo nigir' aho Data  ari, Muganyir' ibyo nkennye byose Mu bihe by'umubabaro, Bimpumuriz' umutima. Nsind' ubukana bw'Umwanzi, Mu bihe byiza byo gusenga.

2.Ibihe nseng' Uwiteka Binyemeza yukw ansubiza. Ategerej' abana be,Ngo bamusang' abakenure Ndamwihereje rwos’ ubu Kuko yampamagay' ubwe. Niringiye bwa Buntu bwe : Nogez' ibihe byo gusenga.

3.Guhora nseng' Uwiteka Kujya kumar' umubabaro, Kugez' aho nzager' i We, mwirebere ngeze mw ijuru, Niyambuy' umubir’ upfa, Nambaye kudapf' iteka; Ubwo ni bwo nzasezera Ku bihe byiza byo gusenga.

title: 50.Muze mwenyine, twihererane
lyrics:
50.Muze mwenyine, twihererane, Munsang’ ahantu hatar' abantu; Dor’ imiruhw irabarembeje; Urusaku rurabaruhije.

2.Murek’ ibyifuzwa n'ab'iyi si, Mushak' ibyahishw’ abanyabwenge; Jyewe na Data tubana namwe : Ntimuri mwenyine, turi kumwe.

3. Murajye mumbwir’ ibyo mwibwira, Ibyo muvuga n'ibyo mukora, Mu miruho yanyu munaniwe; Bimenywa n'uz' imigambi yanyu.

4.Inzir' iraruhije  mwitange, Mutazananirwa mukigenda; Mury' umutsim' uter' imbaraga, Munywe no ku mazi y'ubugingo.

5.Nuko, mukor' imirimo yanyu; Nzajya mbafasha mu mibabaro; Uwitanga nzamugororera; Ndaza vub' umusek utambitse.

title: 51.Muze. musange Yes' ubakunda
lyrics:
51.Muze musange Yes' ubakunda, Mwese nimuze, mwe kuzuyaza. Yes’ arashaka yuko mukira,Nuko, mumwitabe.

ref:Yes' ubw’ uzaza, tuzishima twese, Tujye kuban’ akaramata nawe, dutandukanye n'isi n'ibyaha Tubanye mw ijuru.

2.Mwese nimuze, mwitabe Yesu, Abaruhur’ abah' amahoro. Nuko, mumuh' imitima yanyu, Yos’ ayibarire.

3. Wibuke yukw’igihe gikuze : Nta n'umw' umenya kw atinda mw isi, Umwami Yes' ageze bugufi; Tebuk'umwakire!

title: 52.Utahe ! Utahe !
lyrics:
52.Utahe ! Utahe ! Ko wazerereye? Mu gihugu cya kure, Ibya So ubyayirayo ?

ref:Mwana wanjy' uzimiye, Tyo ngwino, garuka !Ngwino ,Ngarukira !

2.Utahe ! Utahe ! Nturarambirwa se ? Izo ngurub' uzite ! Ibyo zirya si byiza.

3.Utahe ! Utahe ! Ntuzi ko niriwe Mpagaz' aha kwirembo, Mfit' ubwuzu kubwawe.

title: 53.Nimusang’ Umwami Yesu
lyrics:
53.Nimusang’ Umwami Yesu:Arabaruhura; Nimubyumve, mw’ abarushye,Yasezerany' atyo. Ni W' ugab’ umugisha: Ashobora byose.  Ni W’ ugab' ubugingo Butazashira.

2.Nimusang' Umwami Yesu :Dor' arabashaka; Nimubyumve, mw' abahabye,Yasezerany' atyo. Kand' ushavura wese,Agahab' inzira, Yumvire Yesu vuba. Az' amwakire.

3.Nimusang' Umwami Yesu :Atang' imbaraga; Banyantege nke mubyumve,Mumwisunge mwese. Satan' arabarwanya, Akajy' abashuka. Yesu yaramutsinze: Nimutinyuke !

3.Kand' usang’ Umwami Yesu Ntazamukumira; Mwe gushidikanya rwose, Mwumve munezerwe. Akund' abanyabyaha Urukundo rwinshi. Arabahamagara Ngo muz' ahw ari.

title: 54.Yemwe mwes' abananiwe
lyrics:
54.Yemwe mwes' abananiwe. N'abaremerewe, Muyoboke Yesu Kristo; Arabarahura.

ref:Mumwizere, mumwizere,Mwizere Yesu, Abarenger' abakize Ibyaha byanyu.

2.Yavushijw' amaraso ye Ngo tuzasugire; Mumwemer’ abuhagire, Aboze dedede.

3.Yesu ni W' utuyobora Mu nzira y'Imana; Mubanguke, mumwizere, Mumukurikire.

4.Nimuze muteranire Mu nzira ye nziza; Nuko muzamushimira Iteka mw ijuru.

title: 55.Yes' araduhamagara
lyrics:
55.Yes' araduhamagara kureka ibyaha byose :ahora atubwira iteka ngo tumukurikire.

2.Tumere nka ba barobyi, Bumvis' amagambo ye; Bemeye gusig' ibyabo, Ngo bamukurikire.

3.Atubuza kwifuz' ibyo Mw isi n'icyubahiro; Azaduh' ibiduhaza, Ni tumukurikira.

4.Nubwo twaba tunezerwa, Cyangwa turi mu byago, Yes' araduhamagara, Ngo tumukurikire.

5.Yes' araduhamagara;Nuko, tub' intore ze, Tumukunde, tumusenge, Tuzageze ku gupfa.

title: 56.Yes' aragutegereza
lyrics:
56.Yes' aragutegereza; N' inshuti yawe. Araguhamagar' ati : Ngwino hano !

2.Ita ku magambo meza Akubwir' ati : Nabambiwe kugira ngo Ngucungure.

3.Mbes’ ubuntu bwanjye bwinshi Ubwangir' iki ? Ntiwanyemera, nkaguha Agakiza ?

4.Mbese ntiwamaz' imyaka myinshi mu byaha, Ur' imbata ya Satani, Nturambiwe ?

5.None, reka nkubohore, Naw' unyizere, Unkurikire wishimye, Ub' uwanjye.

6.Yesu yahoz' akubwira Kensh' ibyo byiza; Dore, n'ub' arakwinginga ! Wamwang' ute ?

7.We gutind' ahar' ijwi rye Ryahora vuba; Ubu n'igihe gikundwa, We gutinda.

8. Mwami Yesu, singitinda; Noneho ndaje. Ububata bwawe bwiza Ni bwo nkunze.

title: 57.Yes' araguhamagara
lyrics:
57.Yes' araguhamagara :Ngwino, murushywa ! Ubu tugisab' Imana, Ngwino, murushywa ! Ubu n' igihe gikwiye Ngwino, murushywa ! Itaba Yes' uyu munsi ! Ngwino, murushywa !

2.Ubwo wumv’ uremerewe, Ngwino, murushywa ! Yes’ akuruhure none :Ngwino, murushywa ! Nta w' ajy' ashuka, mugenzi,Ngwino, murushywa ! Yes' arakwakira none : Ngwino, murushywa !

3.Yes' arakwinginze ng' uze :Ngwino, murushywa ! Aguh' umugisha mwinshi;Ngwino, murushywa ! N' umunyambabazi rwose : Ngwino, murushywa ! Tukigusabir' Imana, Ngwino. murushywa !

title: 58.Shobuj' uguhamagara
lyrics:
58.Shobuj' uguhamagara Munyabyah' umwitabe, Wumvir' ijwi rye ryinginga : N' Umucunguzi wawe.

ref:Mwitabe Mwitabe ! Sanga Yesu nonaha 

2.N' iki gitum' umutera Kukurindira cyane ? Kera kose waramwanze None ngwino : ntutinde !

3.Banguk' aguh' uyu munsi Ubwera n'imbabazi N'amahoro y’ adashira N'ubugingo n'ubwami.

4.Agutegey' amaboko,Agukund' akwifuza. Banguk' uve mu bugoryi : Ngwino, wikebaguza.

5.Aracyaguhamagara :Wihut' atarahita. Wumvir' ijwi rye ryinginga, Udasanga yagiye !

title: 59.Nimuze, mwa ndushyi mwe
lyrics:
59.Nimuze, mwa ndushyi mwe mwese,Muremerewe, murembye. Yes' aje kubasanganira N'ubuntu bwe n'urukundo Mwese, nimuze ! Muze, mwese ! Mumwitab' arabifuza !

2.Nubw’ ur' umunyabyaha byinshi, Humura ye ! N' uw'ibambe ! I by' agushakaho ni bike :  N' ukwihan' ukamwizera. Wa munyabyaha we wihebye, Arakogesh' amaraso. 

3.Umwana wera w'Uwiteka Yubamiy' i Getsemane, Baramubamb' ari tw' azira. Nukw ati : Birarangiye ! Utegerej' iki se, kandi ? Ibyo ko biguhagije !

4.Dore, yazamutse mw ijuru,Atsinz' urupfu n'ibyaha ! Aratuvugira kuri Se, Agaragaz' amaraso.
 Na S' akareb' izo nkovu ze, Nihanny' akambabarira.

5.Nukw abakijijwe na Yesu Tuzamusanganirayo ! Abo mw isi n'abo mw ijuru Ni ko kuririmba, tuti : Turagushimye ! Haleluya ! Ur' Umukiza n'Umwami !

title: 60.We,mutim’urira
lyrics:
60.We, mutim' urira,—Uze kwa Yesu; Amakuba yawe,—Uyamubwire.  Mubwire buhoro—Ibikuriza; We kugir' ubwoba,—Kandi wirira.

2.Bwira Yesu byose,—N' inshuti yawe, Ibikubabaza—N'ibigutera.  Arakund' afasha—Abashavuye; Wizer' ijambo rye,—Kandi wirira.

3.Abaremerewe—N'ibiruhanya, Babwire kw Imana—Yabaruhura.  Ubahumurize,—Ut' Umukiza Amar' agahinda :—None, mwirira !

title: 61. Umwuk' ukubwira
lyrics:
61. Umwuk' ukubwira,—Wumv' ijwi ryawo, Uve mu butindi.—Reba ku Giti! Umwuk' ugushaka,—Ntuwunanire ! Ur’ umunyabyaha:—Sanga Krisito.

2.K' ur’ umunyehirwe,—Uratiny' iki ? Akira kunesha :—Waracunguwe. Ugutitiriza,—Ntumushavuze. indirimbo zawe—Zisange Yesu.

3.Mu mutima wawe—Here dedede. Ber' Umwuka Wera—Urusengero. Umwuk' ukongeza—Kwizera kwawe, Ugukomereze—Gukund' Imana.

title: 62.Ntumwa  za Yesu
lyrics:
62.Ntumwa za Yesu, murangurure, Mwamamaze mw is' ubwo butumwa bwe !Nimukwiz' inkuru z'Umucunguzi : Ubikunz' amwitabe !
 

ref:haz' uwemeye ! Haz' uwemeye  Mubibwir' abato n'abakomeye. Yemera gutarur' abazimiye : Ubikunz' amwitabe!
 

2.Ubikunze naze, ntakererwe. Yinjire mw irembo twugururiwe. Yesu ni we nzir' igeza mw ijuru :Ubikunz' amwitabe !
 

3.Ubikunze wese namwumvire : Ntabw' avuguruz' isezerano rye. Umusang' agabany' ubugingo bwe :Ubikunz' amwitabe !

title: 63.Yemwe,banyabyaha mwe
lyrics:
63. Yemwe, banyabyaha mwe, Mwitab' Umucunguzi. Nubwo mwe mwazimiye, Mwemer' abatarure !
 

ref:Muririmbe,.. .munezerewe... Yesu yaki... r’  abacumuye... Vug' iryo ja... mbo, ryamamare... Yukw ababi abakira. 
 

2.Muz' abaruhur' ubu, Muze, mumwiringiye. Arabakira, nubwo Mwanduye bikabije.
 

3.Wa mutima wanjye we, Nta rubanz' ukiriho, Kuko bya bicumuro Byose yabyishyizeho !
 

4.Yakir' abacumuye, Nanjy' uko ndi nanduye ! Noze mu maraso ye : Azangeze mw ijuru.
 

5.Namwe, mwa bakonje mwe, Nubwo mwamuvuyeho, None nimutebuke,Yes' aracyabifuza.

title: 64.Muze ku Mwami  w’ubugingo
lyrics:
64.Muze ku Mwami w'ubugingo Bangizi, musange Yesu. Ni We wenyin' uzabakira; Azabah' Umwuka wera.
 

ref:umukunz' akihan' ibyaha Ntabwo yanga kumwakira.
 

2.Abamwizera mw isi yose Abatabaz’ imbaraga; Urukundo rwe rutangaza Ruboneka hose hose.
 

3.Kirisito, Mukiza mwiza,Tungany' imitima yacu; Duhe gukiranuka rwose N'amahoro no kwizera.

title: 65.Musang’Umwami ugir’ubuntu
lyrics:
65.Musange Umwami ugira ubuntu ,abatakimwizigira ntiyanga kwakira abatindi;ahabura abazimiye
 Kandi yemeye kubapfira: Yabaviriy' amaraso. Nta kindi abasha gukirisha Abanze kumvir' Imana.



2.Musang' Umwami ujy' ahembura Nimuze, mwes' abaguye, Batacyizigir' agakiza :Abategey' amaboko !

 Yakirishij' ubuntu bwinshi Wa munyabyahakaz' arira; Na Wa mwambuzi babambanywe Ntiyamwisungiy' ubusa.



3.Musang' ubasha kuruhura; Az' ibibarushya byose. Kubw' urukundo rusaga, Ahez' ibibashavuza. Cya gihe, 
 muri Getsemani,Yariz' amarira menshi : Kubw' ubuntu bwe buhoraho, Azahanagur' ayanyu.

title: 66.Ngwino,ngukize,mwangizi
lyrics:
66.Ngwino, ngukize, mwangizi : Nabony' ishavu ryawe ryose; Nyamar' ushatse ko ngukiza,Ukwiriye kunyumvira. 
 Dor' uko mpagaze ku rugi;Ndi Shobuj' Umucunguzi. Nkuzaniy' imigisha myinshi : Mbese, ntiwankingurira ? 



2. Kera, narakuvukiye,Ngucunguz' ubugingo bwanjye. Mbese, k' unangiw' umutima, Ubuz' uko wanshyiramo ? Namaz' iminsi myinshi cyane Ku rugi rwawe nkomanga. Mugenzi, ko bugiye kwira, Mbese, ntiwankingurira ?



3.Rya joro ridacy' iteka Ni ryir' uzantabaza s' ute ? Ntutind' unyitab' uyu munsi,Ngukikire, nkurengere ! Igihe cyawe kirakuze;Ntuvug' uti : Nzaz' ubundi. N' uza ku rugi rwanjy' utinze, Uzakomangir’ ubusa,



4.Nubwo wumv' utanyitaho, Jye ndacyakwinginga ngukunze, Nkurindire kugeza ryari ?Ngwino, ndakwifuz' i wanjye; 
 Dor' uko mpagaze ku rugi :Ndi Shobuj' ukwitayeho. Nkuzaniy’ imigisha myinshi; Mbese, ntiwankingurira ?

title: 67.Uhagaze,Mukiza
lyrics:
67.Uhagaze, Mukiza Ku rugi rukinze,  Utegereza yuko Bagukingurira. Ariko, bene Data,
 N' iby'isoni nyinshi Gukingiran' Umwami Yes' Umucunguzi.



2.Akomanga ku rugi.Kandi dor' afite Inkovu z'imbereri N'ikamba ry'amahwa. Mbeg' urukundo rwinshi
 Rw' utegerez' atyo ! Nta kindi cyaha kibi nko kutamwakira !



3.Umwam' atwingingisha Ijwi ryongorera, Ati : N'iki gituma Mungirira mutyo ?Mwami, tugiz' isoni
 Z'uko guhemuka :Nonehw injira, Mwami	Ntudusig' ukundi.

title: 68.Ntakindi  gihesha gukiranuka
lyrics:
68.Nta kindi gihesha gukiranuka Mu b'isi no mu bo mw ijuru, Keretse kwizera ko wogejwe de N'amaraso ya Yesu masa.

ref:Wogejwe na Yesu ? Watunganijwe n'amaraso ? Har' ubwo yakuhagij' amaraso ? Mbes' imyambaro yaw' irera ?

2.Amaraso ya Yesu yogej' atyo Abanduy' imitima yabo: Ntimukererw' ahubwo mutebuke, Mwezw' imitima yanyu neza.

3.Umukiz' ubw' azagaruk' afite Icyubahiro cy'ubwiza bwe, Abatari bezwa bazinjir' i we Mu birori by' ubukwe bate ?

4.Bazatinya guhinguk' imbere ye, Bazahinduk' ubwoba busa. Nukw iyambur' iyo myambaro mibi Yes' akwambik' iye y'ubukwe.

title: 69.Nkuko  Mose yamanits’inzoka
lyrics:
69.Nkuko Mose yamanits' inzoka ku giti,Abarembejwe bakayireba, Bagakir' uburibwe, bakaba bazima
 Kubw’ imbabazi z'Uwiteka,  Ni ko na Yesu Yatumanikiwe ku Musaraba kera : Tumurebe, tumwiringire.



2.Mutim' ushavuye, reb' Uwagupfiriye;Reba Yesu wakumanikiwe ! , Munyabyah' umutumbir' aragukiz' ubu,Umureb' urakira rwose ! Reba, wizere ! Kubabarirwa kwawe kuv’ i Gologota :' Reba, reba ku Musaraba 



3. N'iki cyatumy' Umwana w' Iman'ababazwa ?umv' icyatumy' abambwa ku giti, Kand' icyatumye yambikw' ikamba
 ry' amahwa: Ni ku bwawe n'ibyaha byawe ! Reba, wizere ! Dor' urupfu n' urwe, nahw imyandu n' iyawe : Reba, reba ku Musaraba.



4.Naho warir' ukicuz' ukanababara,Ntibyarih' ibicumuro byawe. Dor' impongan' ikwiriy' ibyaha wakoze N' amaraso ya Yesu masa.Reba, wizere ! Wizer' Uwakubambiw' arakurokora : Reba, reba ku Musaraba,



5.Yagukirishije ya mibyimba yagize;Ni na We gukiranuka kwawe. Yakubeshejeho, war' uwo kurimbuka : Wakir' ubwo bugingw aguha.Reba,wizere ! Yes’ ubw' atagipfa, tuzabanaho na we : Reba, reba ku Musaraba.

title: 70.Nimuze mwese kumv’inkuru
lyrics:
70.Nimuze mwese kumv' inkuru nziza Z'agakiza kabwirizwa none. Yesu yabasanze :Arabashaka; Namwe muh' Umwami Imitima.
 

2.Mwitinyishwa n'uko mufit' ibyaha,Ngw azabang' abater' umugongo; Ntabwo yabigira :Yasezeranye Kwikir' uwihannye Umwizera.
 

3.Ni W' ubwe wizanye gukiz' abantu;Yavuye ku Witek' aza mw isi. Ngo tubon' ijuru,Yaradukunze; Yaratubambiwe;Yaravumwe !
 

4.Abwira bos' ati : Jye nd' Ubugingo,Kand' unyizera wese ntazapfa. Nzamuha kubaho Mu bwami bwanjye; N'urupfu nzamuha Kurunesha.

title: 71.Hagarara,munyabyaha
lyrics:
71.Hagarara, munyabyaha,Kuk' uri mu mwijima; Urarindagira hose, Ugiye kwiyahura. 
 

ref:Ngwin' Iman' ijya yakira munyabyaha wese. Ibuka, nta n'umwe yanze : Ngwin' irakurokora.
 

2.Wajyaga wibwir'ibibi,Ukagir' agahinda; Washatse gutsind' ibyaha, Nyamar' urananirwa.
 

3.Washaka kuza mu mucyo Ng' ubohorwe n'Imana? Wakwemera kuyikunda Nkuko na Y’ igukunda?
 

4.Teg’ amatwi, munyabyaha : Araguhamagara. None wemere gukizwa ; We kwihemukir' utyo !

title: 72.Twaheze mu mwijima
lyrics:
72.Twaheze mu mwijima mwinshi  cyane; Umucyo w'isi ni Yesu ! Ubwiza bwe bwaratumurikiye : Umucyo w'isi ni Yesu !


ref: Sang' uwo Mucy' ukwakir' ubu ! jye nzi yuko wamurikiye, Nari nd' impumy’ arampumura. Usang' uwo Mucyo nawe !
 

2.Nta mwijim' ugir' uri kumwe na we:Umucyo w'isi ni Yesu ! Tugendane na W' atumurikire: Umucyo w'isi ni Yesu !
 

3.Mwa mpumyi zaheze mu mwijima mwe,Umucyo w'isi ni Yesu! Mwoge mu maraso, muhumuk' ubu : Umucyo w'isi ni Yesu !
 

4.Har' indi s' itagomb' izuba rwose, Umucyo waho ni Yesu ! Umwana w''ntam' ahaber' izuba : Umucyo waho ni Yesu !

title: 73.Ngwino zana ibyaha byawe
lyrics:
73.Ngwino. zana ibyaha byawe Kuri ya soko nziza. Ubiyirohemo byose, Wiboner' ihumure.
 

ref:Gira bwangu ! Wizarira ! Nturushy' utindiganya na hato.  Yiteguye kugukiza:   Arakwinginze ng' uze.
 

2.Ngwino, zan' ibyaha byawe Kuri ya soko nziza, Nubwo bitukura rwose, Birab' umweru dede.
 

3.Umv' amagambo ya Yesu, Wihan' umwiringire ! Mwitab' aguh' ubugingo; Nuk’ umukurikire.
 

4.Subira kuri ya soko,Ni ho wakirira pe; Ni cyo kizatum' impundu Zivugira mw ijuru.

title: 74.Jye mfit’Umukiz’ujy’umvugira
lyrics:
74.Jye mfit' Umukiz' ujy' amvugira ku Mana.N' inshut' idahana, si nk' izo mw isi itek' arandind'akankingira n'ibyago.Icyamp' Uw' akab’Umukiza wawe !Njye ninging' Imana ngw’ ikwereke Yesu.Ngo umwakire nawe : niko ngusabira.



2.Nahaw' ikibanza na Data wo mw ijuru Mu rugo rwe rwera kubw' Umwana we Azangezayo ngo tuban' iteka ryose.Icyampa ngo nawe tuzabaneyo !



3.Nzahabwa n'umwambaro mwiza,wera cyane Tw' abacunguwe yatubikiyeyo. Njya ngir' amatsiko, nkawifuza,
 mugenzi Icyampa ngo naw' uzawambar' ubwo



4.Kur'ubu, njya ngir' amahoro mu mutima:Nyahawe na Yes' Umukiza wanjye Atemba nk'uruzi : ab'isi ntibayazi.Icyampa ngasang' uyahawe nawe



5.N'umara kumwemera h' Umukiza waw' Uhamye mu band' iby' agukoreye, Usabe n'Iman' ibahishurire Yesu, 
 Bahabw' ubwo buntu wahawe nawe

title: 75.Yesu ni we  Nshuti yacu
lyrics:
75.Yesu ni we Nshuti yacu; Ni W' utwikorerera Imibabaro n'ibyaha, Akatwuzuza na Se. Dore, tubur’ amahoro, 
 Tuyabuzwa n'ubusa, Kuko tudasaba neza Ibyo dukena byose.



2.Ni tugir' ibyago byinshi.Tugashukwa n'Umubi, Tumuganyir' amaganya,Kukw ayadukuraho. Ha'rihw indi nshuti nk'iyi
 Yababarana natwe ? Yes' az' intege nke zacu, Tumwisunge dusaba. 



3.niba ufit' ishavu ryinshi ukababara rwose,ubuhungiro ni Yesu: ngwino tumwihishemo. inshuti zidutaye, zikaduhemukira, Yes' adukingir' ingabo, Akaduhumuriza.

title: 76.Bene wacu bo mw isi
lyrics:
76.Bene wacu bo mw isi, Mwese ni mutwiteho, Mwitegure kumvira Imigambi y'Imana.
 

2.Satani yayobeje Sogokuruza wacu,Amuteg' ikigoyi,Maz' amuta mu rwobo.
 

3.Nuko, natw' abana be Tumukurikir' ubwo, Twibagirw’ Uwiteka, Tugwa mu minyururu.
 

4.Umv' ubuntu bw'Imana, Ko butangaza cyane ! Nawe, wabwiyumvira, Warek' iby' ugundira.
 

5.Ntangazwa n'Uwiteka : Yambuy' uwo Mwana we Bwa bwiza bukomeye, Ngw az' apfir' abagome.
 

6.Yemeye guhemurwa, Nta n'icyaha yakoze, Yicw' urupfu rubi pe, Atubohor' ibyaha.
 

7.None, banyabyaha mwe, Bakene na bakire, Uko muri, mwitabe, Mwakir' Umucunguzi !

title: 77.Umva,munyabyaha  we
lyrics:
77.Umva, munyabyaha we. Yes'ukw akuburira : Sigaho gukinisha Ubugingo n'urupfu !
 

2.Umubir' ushukana Uzasaz' ushireho, Ujy'iy' utagaruka : Nuko, wibikinaho.
 

3.Takambir' Iman' ubu, Itarac' amateka :Yo ntikinish' ibyayo. Ngwin' usab' imbabazi !
 

4.Gupfa ntikuba kure : We kujarajar' utyo ! Ntuzi k' uzarimbuka ? We kugum' uk' ur' uko.
 

5.Haguruka ! Huguka ! Hung' urupfu rw'iteka  Yesu n’ ubukiriro : Wamuhungiyeho se ?

title: 78.Kera har’umubibyi
lyrics:
78.Kera har' umubibyi Wasohoy' imbuto; Zimwe zigwa ku nzira, Zimarwa n'inyoni, Izindi ku rutare,Zumishwa n'izuba,Kuko zari zibuze Ahantu horoshye.



2.Mu mahwa hagw' izindi,Zikurana na yo; Nukw aziniga zose, Ntizera na gato. Izindi mbuto zigwa Mu butaka bwiza; 
 Zimeze. zirakura, Zer' imbuto nyinshi. 



3.Har'umubibyi wundi,Ni Yesu Krisito. Ijambo ry'agakiza Ni iyo mbut' abiba, Kand’ imitima yacu Ni nayo mbibe ye,Ari mib’ ari myiza, Amishamw imbuto.



4.Ku mutwe n'ibiganza No ku birenge bye, Hatonyang' amaraso Akibib' imbuto; Imvura ni y'imeza
 Imbuto z'iyi si : Amaras' akameza Izo mu mitima.



5.Mugenzi, har' ibiki Mu mutima wawe ? N’ inzira nyinshi, mbese ? Cyangwa n' urutare ? Cyangwa n' imbibe nziza?
 Mbe harafumbiwe ? Weramw imbuto nziza, Cyangw' umez' amahwa ?



6.Umwami Yes' azaza Gusarur' imbuto; Azaz’ afit' intara, Maz' azigosore; Ingano nziza zose
 Azazihunika, Maz' umuram' awute Na wo mu muriro.



7.Uzajya hehe wowe ? Nturabimenya se? Uzajya mu kigega, Cyangwa mu muriro?  Urorere gutinda :
 Wihane nonaha! Uyu n' umunsi mwiza Wo kwemererwamo.

title: 79.Jy’uhor’undinganyirije
lyrics:
79.Jy' uhor' undinganirije Aya  magambo meza. Umpugur' uyamenyeshe, Aya magambo ye. Ayo ni yo njya nkunda, Ni y' ampesh' amahoro.
 

ref:Ni yo meza, ndayakunda, Anter' ibyishimo byinshi : Ni yo meza, ndayakunda, Anter' ibyishimo.
 

2.Krist' aber' abantu bose Aya magambo meza. Mumwitabe, banyabyaha, Mwumv' amagambo ye. Abayoboz' ituze, N' amagamb' atunganye.
 

3.Kwiza hos' ubutumwa bwe Bw'aya magambo meza. Muz' arabababarira, Mwumv’ amagambo ye. Yesu ni We Mukiza, Utubeshahw iteka.

title: 80.Mwa bitang’igicuri mwe
lyrics:
80.Mwa bitang' igicuri mwe, Muyoberw' umusaraba, Turababwira turira Yuko mubabaza Yesu.
 

ref:Mpisemo guhora nkizwa,Ngashingwa mu gakiza ke;Sinzava mu gakiza ke
 

2.Mwa barets’ ubugingo mwe, Mukabuguran' iby'isi, Ubw’ ibyo bizabora se Muzakuramo ndamu ki ?
 

3.Mwa barets’ igihugu mwe, Cyuzuy' ubuki n'amata, Mukimiranye vuba ye, Musubiye mw Egiputa !
 

4.yemwe abavug' inkurumbi cya gihugu Siyoni,  mwit’ amananiza bshoboker' uwizeye.
 

5.Dor’ amaraso ya Yesu ;ni  mo dukirizw’ ibyaha, Ngwino, dusubiraneyo, Tugere ku Musaraba !
 

6.Yemwe bakunzi ba Yesu, Mwihane, ye kubabara ! Mumaramaze kwitanga, Igihe ni kigufi pe !
 

7.Mwa batuy'imitwaro mwe, Ko mugifit'ingata se ? Turababwira turira Ko muri kure ya Yesu.
 

8.Muze, musange Krisito, Ku ntebe ye y'imbabazi, Dor' abategerej' ubu ; Muz' arabababarira !

title: 81.Teg’ amatwi, wumve
lyrics:
81.Teg’ amatwi, wumve ijwi rya Yesu. Arakongorera,— Akwinginga.


Ref: Ati: Wemere—Ko nkurokora: Ni . ..jye. ..Mucunguzi—Ntiwaza se?
 

2.Umvir' ijwi ryiza—Rigusaba ngo, Nganyir' amaganya,—Nyikorere.
 

3.Umuhungireho,—Umwihishemo. Arakuruhura—Unaniwe.
 

4.Ni wowe yazize—Ku Musaraba Emer' aguture—Ibyo byaha 
 

5.Ur’ uw'intege nke :—W' arakomeye  Umwiyegurire,—Usugire.
 

6.Ubwo yakuguze,—Non' umwinjize Mu mutima wawe,—Akwimemo.

title: 82.Mwami wakomeretse
lyrics:
82.Mwami, wakomeretse: ni twe waziraga wahemuw'utyo mwami Ushinyagurirwa. Ker' utaraza mw isi, War'ufit' ubwiza ! Dor’ uko bagushyize Mur' abo bambuzi

 
2.Mpindukirir' undebe, Mukiza w'ukuri: N'impano y'imbabazi Njya nkuboneramo. Yesu, waramfiriye:N' ibyanjye wazize; Ump' amahoro masa Kuko nkwiringira.
 

3. Kand' imipfire yawe Ni yo yankijije. Intera kugushima Mu kubaho kose: Imbabazi n' izawe,Mucunguzi wanjye. Nah' urupfu rwantera, Nta cyakunkuramo.
 

4.No mw ipfa ryanjye, Yesu, Uzambe bugufi: Urupfu ni runsinda Uzamar' ubwoba.Kokw umubiri wanjye Uzabor' uveho; Nyamara, nzakubona Mu maso, Mukiza.
 

5. Mukiza wanjye  mfite Ubwuzu n'ishimwe, Ngo ndeb’ inkovu zawe Wagize ku bwanjye! Umpe kunesha rero, Nkuko wanesheje. Hahirw' uzapfa apfira Muri wowe, Yesu

title: 83.Umutwaro  wanjye  krisito
lyrics:
83.Umutwaro wanjye, Krisito, Warawikoreye. Bakubambye ku Musaraba,Ni jyewe wazize; Unkuraho wa mutwaro : Sinkiwikoreye !
 

2.Igikombe cyanjye cyarimo Kuvumwa n'urupfu; Nuk' ucyiranguza kubwanjye; Ibyo bisharira, Uherak’ ubisimbuza Ibyiza by'ijuru 
 

3.Uwiteka wang' ibyaha pe Yabanguy' inkoni Ariko si jye yakubise, Ahubwo ni Wowe ,iyo mibyimba Krisito, Ni yo yankijije !
 

4.Haguy’ iy' inkundura, Yesu,Jye nkunamamw ubwo; Iguhitiraho ku Giti, Jye ntiyanyagira. Yarakunshocaguriye; None, hareyutse.
 

5.so yakuy inkota ye yera,Aragusogota;  Umutima waw' uhinduka Urwubati rwayo. Non' iyo nkot' iragimbye : Nta cy' ikintwar' ubu !
 

6.Jye napfanye nawe, Krisito, Ubwo wamfiraga; Urazuka, nzukana nawe,Uraz' unturamo. Non' untungany' unyeze de, Uzangez' i Wawe.

title: 84.N’iki cyankiz’ibyaha
lyrics:
84.N'iki cyankiz' ibyaha? N' amaraso yawe, Yesu. N'iki cyanyeza rwose ? N' amaraso yawe, Yesu.
 

ref:Ayo maraso ye Ni y' amboneza rwose : Nta cyampa gukira, nk' amaraso y'Umukiza.
 

2.Nta kindi cyantunganya,Nk'amaraso yawe, Yesu, Nta kindi cyiru mfite, Nk'amaraso yawe, Yesu.


3.Nta cyantsembahw ibyaha,Nk'amaraso yawe, Yesu. Nta byanjye byamboneza, Nk'amaraso yawe, Yesu.
 

4.Ni Wowe niringira N'amaraso yawe, Yesu, Ni Wow' ump' amahoro, N'amaraso yawe, Yesu.
 

5.Nguhimbariza cyane Amaraso yawe, Yesu. Mwami, ndagushimira Amaraso wamviriye.

title: 85.Amaraso  y’Umucunguzi
lyrics:
85.Amaraso  Y’umucunguzi Niyo Soko Yoz’abanduye Niyo Yeza Abanyabyaha De Bakabonera  Rwose 

Ref:Ndaguhimbariza Mucunguzi Imbabazi Wangiriye Ukanyoz’ibyaha Nakoze Mu Maraso Wavuye 

2.Urya Mwambuzi Mwabambanywe Ayarabutsw’aranezerwa Nanjy’umwihebe Mubi Nka We Untabare Umboneze 

3.Mwami Yesu Mwana W’intama Njya Ngukundira Mucunguzi Amaraso Yaw’atunganye Ayo Watuviriye 

4.Nta N’ikindi Kibasha Nkayo Kudutsembaho Ibicumuro No Gucungura N'abemeye Kwizer'umucunguzi 

5.Mperey’aho Nayaboneye Ava Mu Bikomere Byawe Nogez’urukundo Wankunze Nzagushima Ndinde Mpfa 

6.Nd’ino Mw’isi,Birananira Kugushim’uko Bikwiriye Nyum’uzamp’urundi Rurimi Njye Ngusingiz’iteka

title: 86.Amaraso y’Umukiza
lyrics:
86.Amaraso y'Umukiza Yakuviriye. Yayaviriy' abagome N'abanyabyaha.
 

ref:Amaraso y' Umukiza Yakuviriye, Rek' akoze, rek' akweze, Agukiz' ubu 
 

2.Amaraso y'Umukiza Niy' atunganya. Rek’ atembe nk' umugezi, Akugeremo.
 

3.Nubw' ufit’ ibyaha byinshi,Kandi wanduye, Amaraso y'Umukiza Arakweza de.
 

4.Amaraso ni yo masa yanyishyuriye irya myenda yanjye yose,ndababarirwa
 

5.Ubu nshiz' amanga cyane Kwinjir' Ahera, Kuko yaduhay  inzira Mu maraso ye.
 

6.Amaraso yo kunesha Ni yo ndwanisha, Nsind' ibyaha na Satani, Nshobojwe na yo.
 

7.Amaraso y'Umuhuza Wacu n'Imana, Ni y' ambonez' umutima ; Ndayasingiza.

title: 87.Mbe,ntiwaturw’ibyo byaha
lyrics:
87.Mbe, ntiwaturw' ibyo byaha byawe ?Usange Yesu ! Usange Yesu  Ntushaka no kubinesha rwose ? Wizer' amaras' akiza 
 

ref:Amaraso,kokw ashobora  Imitim' ishobewe Amaraso y’ Umucunguzi Ni yo mas' atuneshereza.
 

2.Mbe, ntiwaturw' ubwigenge bwawe? Usange Yesu ! Usange Yesu ! Akugir’ umugwaneza nka we !Wizer' amaras' akiza !
 

3.Mbese, ntushaka no kwezwa dede?Usange Yesu ! Usange Yesu ! Emer' akoz’ ibyo byaha byose, Wizer’ amaras’ akiza !
 

4.Mbese, ntushaka kumuyoboka? Usange Yesu  Usange Yesu ! No kumusingiz’ iteka ryose? Wizer' amaras' akiza !

title: 88.Numva Yes’anyemeza
lyrics:
88.Numva  Yes ’Anyemeza Ko  Mbuz’ Imbaraga Ngo  Njye  Museng ’Iteka  Ntacyo  Nzamuburana 

Ref: Yanyishyuriye Ya  Myenda  Yose Yambabariye  Ibyaha Atuma   Nera   De 

2.Niw ’ Ufit’  Imbaraga  Zihagije Rwose Zo Gukiz’ababembe Zigakiz’umutima

3.Singir ’Icyiza  Nkora Nibesherejweho  N ’Ubuntu   Bwawe  Gusa  Nezwa  N’ Amaraso De 

4.Nasaga  N ’Uwapfuye Mu  Mutima  Wanjye  Maze  Yes ’Aranzura Kandi  Niw’ Unkomeza 

5.Imbere  Ya  Ya  Ntebe  Nzahagararayo  Nzaba  Njyany ’Iminyago  Nyishyikirize  Yesu

title: 89.Yesu yaje kunshaka
lyrics:
89.Yesu yaje kunshaka, Ndi kure, nzimiye, Anshyira ku bitugu Nukw arantarura  ! Maz’ abamarayika be. Baririmba basingiza.
 

ref:Umv' uko yankunze  Umv' uko yanshatse ! Ibuk’ amaraso yanguze ! Mbur’uko  mbivuga, numiwe 
 

2.Yasanze nkomeretse,Nukw aranyomora Ampumurira neza  At' Ur’ uwanjye ko ! Sinari numv' ijwi nk'iryo, Nduhuka mu mutim’ ubwo.
 

3.Anyereka n' inkovu Zo mu biganza bye, N'izatewe n'amahwa Zo mu ruhanga rwe. Nibaz’ icyo yambonyemo, Cyatumye yihangan' atyo!
 

4.None, tuban' iteka; Mu maso he hera Hamvir’ umucyo mwinshi, Uhor' unyobora; Amp' ibikwiriye byose; Mbur' uko mbimushimira.
 

5.Nduhutse mu mutima,Amp' amahoro ye. Iteka ntegereje Umuns' azazaho, Antahukan' angez' i We. Anguze n'amaraso ye.

title: 90.Nari kure y’Imana mu ngoyi
lyrics:
90.Nari kure y'lmana mu ngoyi, Ntazi ko naboshywe; Mbohorwa n'amaraso ya Yesu, Ngez’ i Goligota
 

ref:Shimwa Gologota !Shimwa Gologota ! Ni hw ibyaha byanjve byankuriweho.  Shimwa Gologota 
 

2.Yesu ni we wankuye mu mbohe !Njye muririmbira,  Indirimbo nshya nziza yampaye; Ngez' i Gologota ! 
 

3.Yahamperey' Umwuka hw ingwate,Mwakira nishimye. Yemeye no kumba mu mutima, Ngez'i Gologota.	 


4.Ngwino, sang' Umukiza, mugenzi Nukw akubohore.Yesu  yahaniw' abanyabyaha Rimw' i Gologota. 

 
Genda umusangeyo! Gend' umusangeyo, Ahw ibyaha byanjye nabyogerejwe  Gend’ umusangeyo

title: 91.Ai Gitare cy’Imana
lyrics:
91.Ai Gitare Cy’Imana Reka Nguhungireho Kubw’imbabazi Zawe Kera Waramenewe Non’ubu Nkwihishemo Umujinya W'Imana

2.Amazi N’amaraso Byo Mu Rubavu Rwawe Binkiz’uburyo Bwombi Urubanza Rw’ibyaha N’imbaraga Mbi Zabyo Bye Kuzansind’ukundi

3.Ibyo Twakora Byose N’umwete Wacu Wose N’agahinda Gasaze N’amarira Adashira Byose Ntibyashobora Kudukurah’ibyaha

4.Ntacyo Nzanye  Mu Ntoki Cyabasha Kunshungura Simfit’icyo Naguha Nizey’umusaraba Uwo Wamfiriyeho Niwo Njya Niringira

5.Dore Nambaye Ubusa Ndakwinginze Unyambike Sinabasha Kwikiza Ndagushakaho Ubuntu Unyuhagir’ibyaha Mutabazi Ne Gupfa

title: 92.Ushimwe, Mana
lyrics:
92.Ushimwe, Mana, ko wampaye Yesu. Akankirish’ urupfu rw' akanzukira.
 

ref:Haleluya, Nyirigira ! Haleluya  Amen! Haleluya, Nyirigira ngwino umpembure!
 

2.Yankirishjje wa Musaraba we, Singicirwahw iteka ku’bw' amaraso.
 

3.Nar' uwo gupfa, Yes' aransimbura. ibicumuro byanjye ni byo yazize !
 

4.Ngwin' umpembure! maramw ubukonje !Ats' umurir' ubu mu mutima wanjye !

title: 93.Umunsi mwiza nibuka
lyrics:
93.Umunsi Mwiza Nibuka N’uwo Nakwemereyeho Wamberey’umucunguzi Njye Nkwiz’ibyawe Nishimye

Ref:Nsingize,Nsingize Yesu Wanyogej’ibyaha Anyigish’iby’inzira Ye Ngo Nsenge, Nshime Nezerwe Nsingize,Nsingize Yesu Wanyogeje Ibyaha 

2.Warangije Kundokora Nd’uwawe Nawe Ur’uwanjye Iryo Jwi Ryawe Ryinginga Nabura Nte Kuryitaho? 

3.Najyaga Ndorogotana Mu By’isi No Mu Ngeso Mbi Nkugarutseho Noneho Sinzongera Kuzimira 

4.Iteka Nzagukorera Iby’isi Ndabizinutswe No Mw’ipfa Ryanjye Mukiza Sinzarorera Kwishima

title: 94.Ubugingo  bwanjye  bwa
lyrics:
94.Ubugingo bwanjye bwahinduts' ukundi,  Yes' ubwo yangeragamo; Umucyo winjiye mu mutima wanjye Yes’ ubwo yangeragamo.
 

ref:Kuv' ubwo yanyinjiyemo (x2) Yaranyuze; ndishima. ndamuhimbaza, Kuv' ubwo yanyinjiyemo.
 

2.Naretse kuzerera no kuzimira, Kuv' ubwo yanyinjiyemo; Kand' ibyaha byanjye byakuweho ; rwose,Kuv’ ubwo yanyinjiyemo.
 

3.Nonebo, mfit' ibyiringiro, nizeye Yes' uwo wanyinjiyemo; Nshyizwe  imbere mu nzira, sinshidikanya Yes' uwo wanyinjiyemo.


4.Sinzatinya kunyura mu rupfu hamwe Na Yesu wanyinjiyemo; Kuko mbon' umurwa wer' urimbishijwe Wa Yesu wanyinjiyemo.
 

5.Nzi ko nzajya kubana kur'uwo murwa Na Yesu wanyinjiyemo; Ni cyo kizatuma njya ndirimba nshima Yes'uwo wanyinjiyemo.

title: 95.Ibyaha byanjye,Yesu yarabyikoreye
lyrics:
95. Ibyaha byanjye, Yesu Yarabyikoreye, W' atigeze gukora Icyaha na kimwe; 
 Ndamwegera, ndasenga, Nd' umunyabyaha pe, Nizer' ijambo ry' ati : Urababariwe !



2.Maz' ibindushya byose Ndabimukorera. Nta wund' utari Yesu Wabyihanganira.Ndamwegera, njy' ahw ari, Ndushye, ntentebutse, Ndagenda, mpaw' intege, Nsindishirijwe pe !



3.Nukw amaganya yanjye,Nyakurwaho na We, Nduhukira muri We, Amp' amahoro ye. 
 Imanuweli Kristo, Zina rihebuje ! Rimbera nk' imibavu, Ihumura neza.



4.Icyampa nkaba nka We,Akamp' ineza ye, N'imbabazi n'ubuntu N'ubugwaneza bye. 
 Yes' uzampe gutura I wawe mw ijuru, Nkajya ngusingizanya N'abamarayika.

title: 96.Iby’Iman’ijy’inkorera
lyrics:
96.Iby' Iman' ijy' inkorera Bikorwa neza byose; Inam' ijy' ingira zose Nzishima nezerewe. 
 Ni yo Mana; ni Y' imenya Kundind' umunsi mubi : Ni ko kuyihereza.



2.Iby' Iman' ijy' inkorera Bikorwa neza byose; Inzira nziz' inyuzamo N' iy'umurava wayo. 
 Yankirije muri Yesu, Ingirira n'ubuntu; Nta cyo yanyima rwose. 



3.iby' Iman' ijy' inkorera Bikorwa neza byose; nagir' ishavu n'ibyago Binguye mu mutima.

 Ntibinyica; nsind' ibibi, Kukw ijy' impumuriza : Nta kindi niringira.



3.Iby' Iman' ijy' inkorera Bikorwa neza byose; Urupf' ubwo ruzantera, Rukazankura mw isi, Sinzatinya; 
 nzakomera, Kukw Uwiteka anjyana Mu bugingo budapfa.

title: 97.Nishimiye ko menye rwose Yesu
lyrics:
97.Nishimiye ko menye  rwose Yesu kw ar' Umukiza wanjye; Ni we wanshunguj' amaraso; Ndizera, mvuk' ubwa kabiri.
 

ref:Yambwiye ko nd' umunyabyaha, Ndihana ndizer' arankiza; Nibyo ndirimba, ni byo mvuga, Nshim' Umukiz' ubudasiba.
 

2.Nditanze, ndamwiyeguriye; Binzanir' ibyishimo byinshi, Namuhay' ibyanyanduzaga, Abinkurahw amp' amahoro.
 

3.Sinkir' uwanjy' arantegeka; Mpiriwe n'uko mba muri We; Njya ntegerez' ibyiza bindi Nzagirirwa n'urukundo rwe.
 

4. Kubimenya ni kwiza rwose : Nd' uwa Yesu, sinshidikanya. Ushobora byos' arandinda; Nkimwizeye, nta wamunyaga.

title: 98.Ndumva k’umutim’ukeye
lyrics:
98.Ndumva k' umutim' ukeye : Biranejeje rwose ! Ndakijijwe, ndakijijwe : N' umunezero cyane ! Ibyaha byanjye byogejwe
 N'amaraso ya Yesu; Agahinda kamvuyemo : Sinkir' umunyabyago.



2.Nishimiye, nishimiye Ko ntegekwa na Yesu. Murokozi, Murokozi, Nemeye kub' uwawe. Wanyikuriye mu byaha,
 Wowe, Ntwari y'lmana; Wandokorey' umutima Kand' umpaye kubaho.



3.Waj' unshakan' urukundo,Ubwo nari nzimiye. Wankuye mu byaha byanjye,
 Unyigirir' uwawe. Mpereye none n'iteka, Ni Wowe nziringira; Kubaho kwanjye kurindwe N'amaboko ya Yesu.



4.Ndakuririmbira, Mwami;Namwe ndababwiriza . Ibyo Yesu yankoreye: Birantangaza rwose. 
 Kuko yemeye kumfira, Akamber' igitambo, Umutima wanjye wose N' uw'Uwawucunguye.

title: 99.Unkunda n’Umwana w’Imana
lyrics:
99.Unkunda n’ Umwana w'Imana; Yaje mw isi  kunshungura. Umutima wanjy' utangazwa N'urwo rukundo rwa Yesu.unkunda ni Yesu; ( x 2)

 Yamfiriy’ ibyaha byanjye; unkunda ni Yesu.



2.Amaraso yawe, Mukiza, Ankurahw ibyaha byanjye. Nahinduts' uwatsinz’ urupfu Kubw' izo mbabazi zawe.unkunda ni Yesu (x 2)

 Wanzukiye ngw ambesheho: unkunda ni Yesu.



3.Uzi kubaho kwanjye kose;Unshorer' iminsi yose. N' umucyo waw'umurikira, Ukandindish' urukundo.unkunda ni Yesu; (x 2) 
 Yankujije mu by'Imana: Unkunda ni Yesu.



4.Nzi ko Yes’ atajy' ahinduka,No gukiz' aracyakiza. Uk' uri kose, munyabyaha, Mwizer' ukizwe nonaha !Ukundwa na Yesu : (x 2) 
 Yapfiriy' ibyaha byawe; Ukundwa na Yesu !

title: 100.Nzaririmb’igitangaza
lyrics:
100. Nzaririmb' igitangaza Yes' Umwami yakoze; Ko yavuy' i We mw ijuru Ngw amfir’ i Gologota. 
 

ref:Nzaririmb' igitangaza Yes' Umwami yakoze: Ndi kumwe n'abo mw ijuru Imbere ya ya ntebe.
 

2.Nari nzimiye nk' intama Maze Yes' arambona; Nukw anshyira ku bitugu, Ansubiza mu nzira.
 

3.Nar' impumyi, mfit' ubwoba Nshits' intege, mbabaye, Njanjaguritse, nihebye, Maze Yes' arankiza.
 

4.Ndacyabon' ibimbabaza; Haracyar' ibindushya; Nyamar' ubwo turi kumwe, Nzi yuko nta cyo nzaba.
 

5.Azanyuza no mu rupfu,Nambuke na rwa Ruzi; Maze, ni mfata hakurya, Nzasangay' abo nkunda

title: 101.Nabony’uburuhukiro
lyrics:
101.Nabony' uburuhukiro Muri Kristo Yesu. Ni We musa nihishemo; Nta handi nizeye.
 

ref:Nta wundi wese nizera;Nta kindi nireguza, Keretse Yesu wabambwe, Ari jyew' azize.
 

2.Mpagijwe n'agakiza ke,Nta bwoba ngifite; Yansanze, nd’ umunyabyaha; Maz' aranyakira.
 

3.Kand' iyo ndway' aramvura, Nkaba muzima pe; Njya mpeshwa n'amaraso ye Ubugingo bushya.
 

4.Mpumurijwe n'Ijambo rye,N’ Ijambo ry'Imana; Nkijijwe kubw’ izina rye, Singishidikanya

title: 102.Iby’isi Yesu yabinkuyemo
lyrics:
102.iby' isi Yesu yabinkuyemo : ubw' amaraso, ntibinkang' ubu. nunamy' imbere y'Umusaraba; Yesu yanyejeje de mu maraso ye.
 

ref:Jye nkunda... jye nkunda...Umukiza wanjye Wanyiguriy' i Gologota ku Giti.
 

2.Nari nazimiriye mu byaha, Nd' imbata y'ishyari n'inzangano, Umunsi w'amateka nywutinya, Ankirish' amaraso ku Musaraba.
 

3.Jye nar' imbat' amp' umudendezo;  Jye nar' impumyi, arampumura; Jye nari  intumbi, maz' aranzura ! Nimwumv' ayo mahoro Yesu yampaye!

title: 103.Kera nari mw’isayo
lyrics:
103. Kera nari mw isayo Y'ibyaha, ngira ngo Nd' uw'Imana, ndi mwiza; Nyuma, nsanga nibeshya.
 

ref:Imana yanjye Yarandokoye  Ubu,ni Yo nsingiza Kuko yankijije.
 

2.Nuko Yes' ansangamo,Mbyigaraguramo, Ati : Mwan' unyemere, Ngutabare, ngukize !
 

3.Haz' Umwuka Wer' u’bwo Mu mutima wanjye, Mbona ko nacumuye; Ndihan' arandokora.
 

4.Mana, ndagushimira Yuk' Umwana wawe Atandetse ngo nzapfa Nkiri mu byaha byanjye.
 

5.Reka njye nkuyoboka;Nta wundi nifuza. Noneh' unyiharire; Mwami Yes' untegeke 
 

6.Nahatswe na Satani;Nta cyiza yampaye; Amp' urupfu rw'iteka ; Ni kw ahemb’ ingabo ze.
 

7.Ariko, Mucunguzi, Wowe wangabiye Ubugingo ku buntu, Buva ku Musaraba.

title: 104.Imbabazi  z’Umukiza
lyrics:
104.Imbabazi z'Umukiza Zamuzanye kunshungura; Natabitswe n'ibyaha byanjye, Ankuramw arankiza.
 

ref:Nari mw isayo y'ibyaha, Aramfat' aransayura. Nari mu mwijim' ukomeye  Non' aramurikira,
 

2.Natinze cyane kwitaba Yesu wampamagaraga; Nyuma, niringiy' ijambo rye,Yes’ ankurahw ibyaha.
 

3.Yaje kunkiz' agifite Inkovu nyinshi z'amahwa N'iz'icumu n'iz'imbereri.Mpimbaz' urukundo rwe.
 

4.None mpora mu mahoro; Umutima ni muzima; Arikw icyatumy’ anshungura,Akankiza, sinkizi

title: 105.Ubuntu bw’Imana
lyrics:
105.Ubuntu bw' Imana—Butangaje Ni bwo bwankuyeho—Imigozi.Byavuye se kuki ? Byavuye ku gushaka Kw'Imana yonyine—Yambohoye.
 

2.Ni Yesu wenyine—Wantoreye Guhirwa mw’ ijuru—Mu bwami bwe.Mwese nimumenye Yuk’Umukiza wacu Ajy'asanganira—Abaz' i We.
 

3.S' uko nari mwiza—Haba na mba ! N' ubuntu bwa Yesu—Yangiriye.Yarambabarijwe Kuri wa Musaraba Ndetse yabambanywe—N'abambuzi.
 

4.Kand' iyo nibutse—Ibya Yesu, Uko yagiriwe—Bamubamba,Binyibuts' ibyaha ; We nta kibi yakoze; Ni jyewe yazize :—N' Umukiza !
 

5.Ub' icyo nifuza —N'ukuguma Mu Mukiza wanjye,—Mwihishemo. Ni We ngabo yacu Ihor' idukingira Imyambi wa Mubi—Aturasa.
 

6.Non' Icyo ngusabye,—Mwami Yesu : Ingeso wa Mubi —Yanyanduje Zashaka kubyuka, Zirimbur' uzice pe, Mpore nihariwe—N'ibya Yesu.
 

7.None, maso yanjye,—Na we matwi, Nawe munwa wanjye,—Mubiri we !Mwese, mushimishe Uwankuye mu ngoyi. Ibyaremwe byose,—Tumushime

title: 106.Sintew’isoni na Yesu
lyrics:
106.Sinterw' isoni na Yesu Cyangw' iz'ishyaka rye, Naho zab' iz'Ijambo rye, Cyangw' Umusaraba.Ku Musaraba rwose ni ho naturiwe
 

ref:Umutwaro w'ibyaha byanjye. Nizeye, ndahumuka, mbon’ umucyo; Bituma mpora nezerewe.
 

2.Izina rya Yesu wanjye Ni ryo nishimira; Nzi kw atazanyihakana Kuko mwiringiye.
 

3.Ntabw' azivuguruz' ibyo Yansezeranije, Kukw icyo namubikije Azagikomeza.
 

4.No mw ijur' azanyemera, Nubwo nta cyo maze;  Yerusalemu yaho, Azamp' icyicaro.

title: 107.Nkomeze njye niringira
lyrics:
107.Nkomeze njye niringira Amaraso y'Umukiza.
 Nta wundi nshaka kwigana Keretse Yesu wenyine.
 

Nikomeze ku Rutare, Nahw ahandi n'umusenyi, Nahw ahandi n'umusenyi.


2.Iyo ngoswe n'umwijima, Niringir' ubwo buntu bwe. Mu byago no mu makuba, Ntagir' ubw’ anzibukira.
 

3.Ntunganywa n'amaraso ye Na ya masezerano ye. Naho napfush' ibyo mfite, Ni we musa niringira.
 

4. Maz’ icyo gih’azazira, azasanga mwiteguye, Nambaye gukiranuka; ntanenge nzaba ngifite.

title: 108.jye nd’umukristo
lyrics:
108.Jye nd' Umukristo : nzahora ndi we Mu bintu byose, ngeze ku gupfa.Jye nd' Umukristo : mpora mbihamya, Nahw igihugu cyose 
 cyanseka. Jye nd' Umukristo wo mu mutima, Kuk' ubu nsigaye nkunda Kristo. Icyatumy' apfa, yazize jyewe ! Nabuzwa n'iki kujya mukunda ?



2.Jye nd' Umukristo : umv' ubwo buntu ! Narakijijwe, nkurwa mu byaha.Jye nd' Umukristo, naho naterwa N'ibyago, nkaba no ku rugamba. 
 Jye nd' Umukristo : nd' umutabazi Mu ntambara ndasana n'ibyaha. Mfit' Umugaba, n' Umwami Yesu; Ni tuba hamwe, nzahora nesha.



3.Jye nd’ Umukristo : nd' umwimukira; Ndakomeje mu rugendo rwanjye. Iby'ino mw isi ndabihinyuye : Nsigaye nifuz' ibyo mw ijuru. 
 Jye nd' Umukristo : gakondo yacu Iri mw ijuru ku Mana yacu. Nta nzar' ibayo, nta n'imiruho; Abaho bose baguwe neza.



4.Jye nd' Umukristo : icyo n' ikintu Gihumuriz' umutima wanjye. Kinyibagiza n'ibyago byose, Nkumva nduhuwe n'Umwami Yesu. 
 Jye nd' Umukristo, uko ndi kose. Maze, ni ntumirwa, ngiye gupfa, Nzagir’ ibyishimo bitavugwa; Nzabon’ ihirwe, ngiye mw ijuru.

title: 109.Nyuzwe n’ubucuti bwo mw ijuru
lyrics:
109.nyuzwe n'ubucuti bwo mw ijuru,Nisunz' Umukiz' ukomeye. Ngiz' ihirwe, mbony' umunezero : Nisunz' Umukiz' ukomeye.
 

ref:Niseguye amaboko yawe,Yesu; Singitinya: nisunz' Umukiz' ukomeye.
 

2.Nezezwa n'uko Yes' anyobora :Nisunz' Umukiz' ukomeye. Sinkiyoberw' inzira nyuramo : Nisunz' Umukiz' ukomeye.
 

3.Umutima wanjye ntuhagaze :Nisunz' Umukiz' ukomeye. Ngubwa neza ndi kumwe na Yesu : Nisunz' Umukiz' ukomeye.

title: 110.Igituma nkunda Yesu
lyrics:
110.Igituma nkunda Yesu,Nkikumenyeshe none. N'ukw uwo Mukiza mwiza Yanguz' amaraso ye.
 

ref:Igituma nkunda Yesu Akandutira byose, N'uko yankuyehw ibyaha, Akonyoza, nkera de 
 

2.Igituma nkunda Yesu N' urukundo yankunze, Akankiz' ibyaha byanjye Byajyaga bintegeka.
 

3.Igituma nkunda Yesu N'ukw ar' Umurengezi . Ahor'antabar' iteka Uk' Umwanz' anyoheje.
 

4.Igituma nkunda Yesu N'ukw atazarorera Kumbera umukunzi mwiza, Akamber' umwungeri.

title: 111.Izina  ryiza rihebuje
lyrics:
111.Izina ryiza rihebuje  Rinezeza amatwi yanjye  nzajya ndihimbaza ntahwema  ndivuge nirya Yesu
 

ref:Yesu ndamukunda,  Yesu ndamukunda,  ndamukundira y’uko yabanje kunkunda atyo
 

2.Kok’iryo zina rinyibutsa uko yankunz’ akampfira Ababi nkanjy ’akabeza de Mur’ayo maraso ye
 

3.Rimbwira Data wa twese ibyo yanshyinguriye mu ijuru naho nagenda mu mwijima rimurikira hose
 

4.Rinyeyurir’umubabaro, rihanagur’amarira rinyongorera  ngo mpumure ngo ntinyuke,nkomere
 

5.Izina nkunda  n’irya Yesu Risumb’uko turivuga ntawo mw’ isi warisingiza  uburyo buhagije

title: 112.Nzi k'Umukiz'ankunda
lyrics:
112.Nzi k' Umukiz' ankunda : Niko tubibwirizwa. Abato bose n'abe, Kandi n' uw'imbaraga.

ref:Yes' arankunda (*3) Mpora mbihamya ntyo.

2.Yesu n' uw'imbaraga : Yapfiriye kunkiza.Ni mwizer’ azanjyana Mu bwami bwo mw ijuru.

3.Arankund'  andindira mumigendere yanjye; ngo njye nishingikiriza mu muryango we wera.

title: 113.Nkunda kwizigira Yesu
lyrics:
113.Nkunda kwizigira Yesu,Nkajya mwumvira rwose, Ngo njye nishingikiriza Ku masezerano ye.

ref:Yesu, Yesu, ndakwizeye: Ur' uwo kwiringirwa  Yesu, Yesu mwiza nkunda, Ndusheho kukwizera.

2.Nkunda kwizigira Yesu :Nkizwa n'amaraso ye. Nishyize mu ruzi rwayo, Nogamo, ndatungana.

3.Nkunda kwizigira Yesu,Nkaruhuk' intambara Y'ibicumuro n'ibyaha, Akamp' umunezero.

4.Mpimbawe n'uko nkwizeye,Mutabaz' undengera; Nizeye k' umpora hafi; iteka tugumane

title: 114.Kuv’ubu, sintiny’ibizaba
lyrics:
114.Kuva Ubu Sintinya  Ibizaba  Ejo Ibyago Cyangwa Amahirwe  Nzi Byose Ko Imana Ibitegeka Kwiganyira N’uk’ubusa 

Ref:Mbeshwaho No Kwizera Yesu Niringiye Imbabazi Ze Mbumbatiwe N’umukiza Unkunda Nizeye Yesu Nta Bwoba Mfite 

2.Umwanzi Satani Yangerageza Nkabona Amakuba Menshi Nzi Yuko Umukiza Azamba Hafi Njye Mwisunga,Mwihishemo 

3.Numva Amatsiko Mu Mutima Wanjye Yo Gucya K’umunsi Mwiza Yesu Ubwo Azagaruka Kunjyana Mu Rugo Rwe Rwo Mw’ijuru

title: 115.Nabony’Umukunzi mwiza
lyrics:
115.Nabony’umukunzi Mwiza Yarankunze Ntamuzi Yamfatishij’ umugozi,Ari Rwo Rukundo Rwe.Izo Ngoyi Ze Zanteye Kub’imbata Ye Rwose.Jye Ndi Uwe, Na We Ni Uwanjye Kugeza Iteka Ryose.

2.Nabony’umukunzi Mwiza  Kera Yaramfiriye Yaranguz’amp’ Ubugingo Na We Yaranyihaye.Non’ibintu Mfite Byose Ntabwo Nkibigundira. Ibyo Ntunze Nanjy’ubwanjye N’iby’uwo  Mucunguzi!!

3.Nabony’umukunzi Mwiza Byos’arabishobora.Ajy’andind’akaga Kose Munzir’ Ijya Mw’ijuru.Kumuhang’amas’iteka Bizankiz’intege Nke.Nshir’ubwoba, Nshir’ubute, Nyuma,  Nzatabaruka!!

4.Nabony’umukunzi Mwiza Ni We Nyir’imbabazi.Ni We Mujyanama Wange. Niw’undenger’iteka.Nta Kubaho Nta N’urupfu,Nta N’abadayimoni,Nta Bya None ,Nta Bizaza Byazantanya Na Yesu !!

title: 116.Numva Yes’ ampamagara
lyrics:
116.Numva Yes' ampamagara; Numva Yes' ampamagara; Numva Yes' ampamagara,Ati : Mwana, ngwino, nyoboka!
 

ref:Nzamukurikira hose, (x3) Jye na Yesu, tuzagendana
 

2.Tuzajyana mu miruho; Tuzajyana mu makuba; Tuzajyana no mu byago;Tuzajyana : sinzamuvaho.
 

3.Tuzajyana mu rugendo No mu mirimo yo mw isi No mu ndwara no mu rupfu :Jye nzajyana na We mu nzira.
 

4.Azamp' amahoro menshi; Azamp' imigisha myinshi; Azamp' urukundo rwinshi !Nkurikir' Umwungeri Yesu !

title: 117.Numvise Yes’ambwira
lyrics:
117.Numvise Yes'ambwir'ati:ngwino nkuruhure.zana ibyo bikuruhije,mbikwikorerere! musang'uko nari nd'uko;ndushye mfite ishavu;ambera uburuhukiro,ampa umunezero.



2.numvise Yesu ambwira ati:nguherey'ubuntu amaz' azan' ubugingo,unyw' uram' iteka.njy'aho ari,nywa nezerewe kuri ayo mazi ye
 umutima ushira inyota,mpabwa ubugingo bwe.



3.numvise Yesu ambwira ati :ni jye mucyo w'isi.wavukiye mu isi,wavukiye mu mwijima,ngwin'umurikirwe.
 ndebye kuri Yesu mbona ko ari izuba ryanjye rizamvira iminsi yose y'ubugingo bwanjye.

title: 118.Ibyaha byanjye byose
lyrics:
118. Ibyaha byanjye byose n'ibyago Nabihariy' Umwana w'Imana. Namwitegerej' ari ku Giti, Menya yukw’ ari jye yabambiwe.

 Numva mbabariwe, ndanezerwa; Ndishima



2. Mpora mbiharira Yesu; ni W' uzi Kujy' amar' agahinda mbabaye. Iyo ndiz' andeban' imbabazi; 
 Iyo mbay' umunyantegenke pe, Yes' arushaho kump' imbaraga. Ndishima.



3. Nzajya mbiharira Yesu, ntahwema, Mfite muri W’ ibyiringiro; Kumwizera kumpesh' amahoro, Nkamwisegura nduhutse neza.
 Turi kumwe, mba ndi mw ijuru pe: Ndishima.



4. Yewe wa mwihebe wese, emera Kumuharira byose, ntutinye. Nubw' ari we Rurema wa byose, Arikw aragukund' ugayitse.

 Yaguhay' ikibanza mw ijuru.Tahayo.

title: 119.Yesu murutisha byose
lyrics:
119.Yesu murutisha byose:Nta kindi nkifuza. Iminsi yos' aramfasha,Ngo nkomere, ne kugwa. Iyo ndushye njya kuri We;

 Nta wund' unduhura nkawe We. Yanyujuje ... ibyishimo .. ! N' uwanjye !



2.Yesu murutisha byose :Amfasha naniwe. Itek’ amp' imigisha Mbur' uko nabivuga. Atang' izuba n'imvura 
 Ngo nez' imyak' inkwiriye Angabira ...  byose nkena .. ! N' uwanjye ! 



3.Yesu murutisha byose : Nzajya mukorera Kukw ar' uwo kwiringirwa; Sinzamuhemukira. Nkurikira Yesu Turi kumwe,

 nta cyo  nzaba. Arankunda .. ! Arandinda . N' uwanjye !



4. Yesu murutisha byose  N' inshuti yanjye pe Nta wundi nabona nka We;Nzahora mwizigira Yampay' impan' ihebuje 

 Ni yo bugingo bw'iteka. Aranyuze .. ! Musingize N' uwanjye !

title: 120.Mw ijur’imbere  y’Imana
lyrics:
120.Mw’ijur' Imbere  Y’Imana Mfit’umuntu Umvugira N’umukuru W’abatambyi Kandi Yitwa Rukundo Mpamya Y’uko Izina Ryanjye Riri Mu Mutima We Ubw’amvugira,Nta Mwanzi Wamunyirukanaho

2.Satan’iy’anyibukije Gukiranirwa Kwanjye Ashaka Kunyihebesha Njya Ntumbira Mw’ijuru Ndebay’umukiza Wanjye Wabikuyeho Rwose Kera Yarampongereye Nuko,Sinzarimbuka

3.Uwitek’umucamanza Ambonyehw’amaraso Ntancir’urubanza Rubi Anyit’ukiranutse Yaranshunguye Ngo Mb’uwe Niko Kunyishingira Kukw’adapfa,Singipfuye Jye Na Yesu Tur’umwe

title: 121.Yesu ni We mucyo wanjye
lyrics:
121.Yesu ni We mucyo wanjye;Amurikir' inzira. Nemer' intege nke zanjye; Nizera kw andengera. Amurikir' inzira. (x 2) 
 Nemer' intege nke zanjye; Nizera kw andengera.



2.Yesu ni We nshungu yanjye :Koko yaramfiriye ! Ni We byiringiro byanjye; Ni We wambabariye. Koko yaramfiriye ! (x 2) 
 Ni We byiringiro byanjye; Ni We wambabariye.



3.Yesu ni W' ump' amahoro;Atuma nkiranuka. Ajy'amp' ubugingo na bwo Bunkiz' ibyah' iteka. Atuma nkiranuka (x 2)

 Ajy'amp' ubugingo na bwo Bunkiz' ibyah' iteka.



4.Yishyuye n'imyenda yanjye,Angur' amaraso ye. Yanteguriye gakondo Mu bwami bwo mw’ ijuru. Angur' amaraso ye; (x 2)

 Yanteguriye gakondo Mu bwami bwo mw ijuru.

title: 122.Ukunda kujy’umbabarira
lyrics:
122.Ukunda kujy'ambabarira N' Umukiza. Umfasha kujya nesh' ibibi N' Umukiza. Umwami wanjy' aranyizeza, 
 Nanjye nkunda kumukorera, Kukw ashaka kubabarira Umwegera.



2.Nkund' iyi nzira y'agakiza Y'Umukiza, Kukw ijy'intera kunezerwa
 Mu Mukiza. Nababazwa n'iby'isi cyane, Mfashwa no kujya mwizigira, Ngahora mpanz' amas' iteka Umukiza.



3.Ndashima rwos' Uwankijije :Ni we Yesu. Kand' azanjyana mu bwami bwe
 Kukw ankunze. Nuko nemera gushorerwa N'Umwuka Wera w'Umukiza, Kukw ari Wo Mufash' uhamya Ibya Yesu.

title: 123.Yesu ni Wowe  musa
lyrics:
123.Yesu, ni Wowe musa mbonyemo Amahoro nifuzaga. Najyaga nyashaka, sinyabone, Ngasuhuz' umutim' iteka.
 

ref:None, ni Yes' umpaza wenyine Nta n'irindi zina nemera, Kuk' ubugingo n'umunezero Bibonekera muri We
 

2.Nifuzag' uko nakwinezeza, Ntita ku Mukiza wanjye. Nkimwirengagiza ntamwitaho, Nukw’amfatish' urukundo rwe 
 

3.Najyaga njya kw iriba ry'iyi si, Mfit' inyota nyinshi cyane, Naba ngiye kunyw' agakam' ubwo, Nuko nkayabura, nkiheba.
 

4.Nuzuy ' agahinda n'ubwihebe,Mbuz' ibyo niringiraga; Maz' amaso yanjy' arahumuka, Ndakureba, Yesu, ndanyurwa

title: 124.Yes'amp'amahoro
lyrics:
124.Yes' amp' amahoro y' atarondoreka Andinda mu byago byose. Uko mba kose, nzajya nishima, nti: Nguwe neza, ndatunganiwe.
 

ref:Ni neza... Ndatuje... Nguwe neza , ndatunganiwe !
 

2.Satan' iy' antey' ankandas’imyambi ye,Njya mpeshw' amahoro menshi No kwibuka Yes' uko yandengeye, Ava mw ijuru ngw anshungure.
 

3.Ibyaha byanjye yabyikoreye byose: Ntiyashigaje na kimwe Byabambwe byose ku Musaraba we : Yes' ashimwe  Yarankijije !  

4.Kuv’ubu, kubwanjye kubaho ni Kristo; Ndetse, singitinya gupfa; Urupfu na rwo ruzamber' indamu. Yes' ampay' amahoro menshi 
 

5.Mumeny' iyo tujya: n' i bwami mw ijuru; Ntabw' ar’ i kuzimu mu mva.Ni twumva za mpanda, tuzanezerwa. Uzagaruka ryari, Yesu ?

title: 125.Ubw’Umwami  Yes’ankunda
lyrics:
125.Ubw' Umwami Yes' ankunda, Nd' amahoro! Kubw' imbabazi ze nyinshi,
 Nd' amahoro! Nuhagiwe n'amaraso; Nkomezwa n'ubuntu bwinshi; Kand' amfashe n'ukuboko: Nd'amahoro!



2.Naho haz' i byago byinshi, Nd' amahoro  Yesu n' Umukiza wanjye:
 Nd' amahoro! Niragij' Imana, Data; Nguma muri Yesu Kristo; Nejejwe n'Umwuka Wera: Nd' amahoro!



3.Byose bizambera byiza: Nd' amahoro! No mu byago, nzaririmba:Nd'amahoro  Naho ndiho, naho napfa,

 Nzi ko nkundwa n'Uwiteka; Yes' amp' ibyo nkena byose: Nd'amahoro

title: 126.Yesu tuguhungiyeho
lyrics:
126.Yesu, tuguhungiyeho; Udutabare, tudapfa.Nubwo tutabikwiriye,Utubabarire 	
 

ref:Mukiz' utwemere Nubwo turi babi. Yesu, waradupfiriye: Mukiz’utwemere
 

2.Ntabwo twaguhish' ibyaha; turatsinzwe rwose ariko Amaraso yawe Yesu,yaratuviriye.
 

3.Ntabwo twashobora rwose Gutungany' ingeso zacu. Iyo tubigerageje,Biratunanira.
 

4.Dore, nkwikubis' imbere! Ungirir’ uko washaka. Sinshyanga Mwam’unkureho  Ingeso zose mbi,

title: 127.Mukiza,numvis’ijwi
lyrics:
127 a.Mukiza, numvis’ ijwi Ryawe ry'imbabazi Rimpamagara ngo nozwe N'amaraso yawe.
 

ref:Nditabye, Yesu, Ndaje, Mukiza. Amaraso wavuye Anyoz' antunganye. 


2.Dor' ukonje, nihebye, Ibyaha ni byinshi: Byose ndabikuzaniye, Naw’ubikureho.
 

3.Kand' uramp’umutima Wuzuy' urukundo, Wuzuye kwizera na ko N'amahoro menshi.
 

4.Kand’uzajy'umfashisha Imbabazi nyinshi. Ibyo wansezeranije Uzabisohoza.
 

5.Nshim’amaraso yawe, Ankurahw ibyaha; Mpimbaz' imbaraga zawe Zinkiz' intege nke.



b.Numvis’ijwi ryawe, Yesu, ndagusanze, Ndaje, Mucunguz' unyoze Mu maraso yawe.
 

ref:Mwami w'abami  waramfiriye.Nje gupfa hamwe nawe, Ye, ku Musaraba.
 

2.Numvis' ijwi ryawe, Riti: Nyizigira ! Unkomereze kwizera, Kandi, tugumane.
 

3.Numvis' ijwi ryawe Ryinjiiye muri jye, Rimbwiriza kujya nkunda Nkuko naw' unkunda.
 

4.Numvis' Ijwi ryawe,Wowe, wamfiriye! Mwami, mbane naw' iteka; Ni Wow' unyizeza.

title: 128.Ubu nj’uko ndi
lyrics:
128.Ubu, nj' uko ndi, niringiye Gus' amaraso wamviriye Kandi yuko wampamagaye  Mucunguzi, nditabye, nditabye.
 

2.Ubu,nj’uko ndi, mbuyerezwa N'intambara yo mu mutima N'intimba nyinshi n'ubwihebe: Mucunguzi, nditabye, nditabye.
 

3.Ubu, nj’uko ndi: sinabasha Kwikurahw ibinter' isoni; Niringiy’amaraso yawe: Mucunguzi, nditabye, nditabye.

title: 129.Ndeger’Umusaraba
lyrics:
129.Ndeger’Umusaraba, naniwe, nkennye, mpumye; Nta kindi kindi nshaka : Ngusabye kunkiz’ubu.
 

ref:Mwami ndakwiringiye Ayi Mucunguzi wanjye; Dor’uko nkunamiye  Mwami Yes’unkiz  ubu.
 

2.Nakwifujije kera,Ndi mu ngoyi z'ibyaha; Maz’umbwiranez' uti: Ngukiz’ ibicumuro !
 

3.Ubu ndakwihereje: End’ibyo mfite byose, Ubwenge n'imbaraga; Byose Yes’ubyakire.
 

4.Nizey’ibyo wavuze N'amaraso wavuye; Ndicuza gutinda ntyo: None, Yesu, nyakira !
 

5.Yesu, non’ungezemo ; Urakaza, Mukiza ! Nta n'ineng' umbaraho  Shimwa, shimwa, Nyakira !

title: 130.Nazimiriye kure yawe
lyrics:
130.Nazimiriye kure yawe Non’untarure ! Nagundiriy' ibyaha byanjye : Ndaje, noneho.
 

ref:Nditabye  Nditabye Ntabwo nzongera. Nyemerer’ umbabarire. Mwami, nyakira !
 

2.Napfapfany' iyo myaka yose :Non’untarure  Nkwitwayeho, Mukiza wanjye Ndaje, noneho.
 

3.Narembejwe n’ibyaha byanjye :None untarure! Niringiy’ urukundo rwawe: Ndaje, noneho.
 

4.Wamviriy’amaraso yawe :Non' untarure! Ubwaw' uraz’ uranshungura  Ndaje, noneho.
 

5.Umv’uko ntats' unkize, Yesu Non’untarure ! Mukiza, nyeza nk'urubura : Ndaje, noneho.

title: 131.Mwumv’imbabazi z’Imana
lyrics:
131. Mwumv' imbabazi z'Imana : Ntabwo zarondoreka ! Mbeg’ umunyabyaha nkanjye  Koko yababarirwa? 
 

ref:Ndaje, Yesu ..ndakwitabye.. Uko ndi ko...s' unyemere Ndaje, Yesu ndakwitabye Mukiz’unyakire.
 

2.Nari kure y'Uw' unkunda,Mbabaz' umutima we, Kuko namwimag' ahw aba Mu wanjye yapfiriye!
 

3.None Yesu, ndakwihaye,Umbohor' undokore. Ibi byaha binyomaho, Non’uz' ubinkureho !
 

4.Haleluya : yanduhuye ! Singishidikany' ubu ! Ndi mu nzir’ijya mw ijuru, Nuzuy’umunezero.

title: 132.Nsinz’ububata n’umwijima
lyrics:
132.Nsiz' ububata n'umwijima, Ndaje, Yesu; ndaje, Yesu. Mbony’ umudendezo n'umucyo: Yesu, ndakwitabye ! Nsiz’ubutindi n'uburema, Mbony' ubukire n'intege nyinshi. Mvuye mu byah' urankijije : Yesu, ndakwitabye !



2.Mvuye mu byago n'ibihendo, Ndaje, Yesu; ndaje, Yesu, Mbony' indamu mu rupfu rwawe, Yesu ndakwitabye! Mvuyemw intimba n'amarira, Ngeze mu byishimo. bidashira. Nshizemw induru, mpaw' impundu Yesu, ndakwitabye!



3.Nsiz' amahane n'ubwigenge,Ndaje, Yesu; ndaje, Yesu. Ngeze ku kwemer' iby’ukunda,Yesu, ndakwitabye! Ntay' ibyanjye, nguhungiyeho; Mvuye mu bwihebe, nd' amahoro: Ntaye Satani, ngo mb' uwawe : Yesu, ndakwitabye!



4.Nsize gutiny' urupfu n'imva, Ndaje, Yesu; ndaje, Yesu. Mbony' umutim' ushyitse mu nda,Yesu, ndakwitabye ! Nkuwe mu kanwa k'inyamaswa, Ntashye mu rugo rw'intama zawe! Mpere none, nkugandukire: Yesu, ndakwitabye!

title: 133.Ndagukurikira, Yesu
lyrics:
133.Ndagukurikira, Yesu; Nemey' umusaraba.Jye nta shinge, nta rugero : Urampagije wenyine.
 

ref:Ndagukurikira, Yesu, Ubwo wanguz’amaraso; Ndakwihaye, Mwami Yesu: Kera waranyitangiye.
 

2.Icyubahiro n'iby'isi, Sinkibimaranira. Kubwa Yesu, ndabiretse: Amp’ibyiza byo mw ijuru.
 

3.Nahw ab'isi bazanyanga, Ni ko bakugiriye. Ntibankund' akaramata: Wowe ntabw' uzanzinukwa.
 

4.Uwansek' ansuzuguye, Byakunsunikiraho. Uko bizamera kose, Uzabinyihanganisha.
 

5.Ko mpaw’urukundo rwawe, Har’ikindi nshaka se? Ibinezaneza by'isi, Simbishaka: mfite Yesu.

title: 134.Nshaka Yesu
lyrics:
134.Nshaka Yesu; nta wundi nifuza. Andengera mu byago by'iyi si. Nshaka Yesu; ni W' umpumuriza. 
 Nah' undi yakwishoboza, jye Nshaka Yesu !



ref:Nshaka Yesu  Nshaka Yesu Nshaka Yesu, ntasiba : Mu mahoro, mu byago, Ni We nshaka wenyine; None n'iteka  ryose, Jye nshaka Yesu 



2.Nshaka Yesu : n' inshuti yanjy’ubu. N' Umujyanam' uhor'unyobora. Nshaka Yesu, ngw ansindir' Umwanzi;
 Jyenyine nzi ko nta cyo maze ; Nshaka Yesu

 

3.Nshaka Yesu : ni we Murengezi. S’inshuti yac' abanyabyaha se? Nshaka Yesu : nafashwa n'undi se ?
 Ntawund’ ukund'abantu nkawe : Nshaka Yesu !

title: 135.Mukiz’ utubonez’iminsi yose
lyrics:
135. Mukiz' utubonez' iminsi yose; Mu kubaho kwacu, tugusingize. Utubonekere,tur' abangizi; Nukw amahoro yaw’atwinjiremo.
 

2.Tugendan' iteka mu byiringiro; Tubabaye nabwo, tukwizigire. Hahirw’ uruhurwa n'inama zawe, Ukamutabar’ ukamwikiriza.

title: 136.Ubugingo bwanjye bwose
lyrics:
136.a. Ubugingo bwanjye bwose,Yesu, ndabukwihereye; Kand' iminsi yanjye yose,Njye ngushimisha ntasiba.
 

2.Amaboko yanjye, Mwami, Ajy'akor' iby' untegeka; Ibirenge byanjye na byo Bijye bijy' ah' unkundiye. 
 

3.Ijwi ryanjye na ryo n'uko Rijye rikuririmbira; Kand' akanwa kanjy’ iteka Kavug' ibyo wankoreye.
 

4.Ibyo mfite byose na byo. Simbikwima, Mwami Yesu; Kand' ubwenge bwanjye na bwo Jy'ubukoresh iby' ushaka.
 

5.Hindur' umutima wanjye, Nkund’iby' ukunda byonyine. Sinzigeng' ukund' ahubwo Ndakugandukiye, Mwami. 
 

6.Urukundo rwanjye rwose Ndugukunde gusa, Yesu; Nkomeza, mb’uwaw’iteka: Ndakwihaye, sinkitwara ! 

                                                                                                                                                                             

b.numvise ijwi ry'Umukiza, Anyihamagarira; None, mutim' ungomesha, Umvir' Umucunguzi.
 

2.Akir' ubugingo bwanjye: Mwam' ubwitegekere; Ubwimemo, budakurwa Mu mategeko yawe.
 

3.Ujy'ukoresh' uk' ushaka Ubu bugingo bwanjye; byanjye ndabigutuye: Databuja, nd' uwawe.
 

4.No mu bihe byanjye byose, Komeza kunshorera N'imbaraga zawe zose; Ujy'untegek' iteka.

title: 137.Wowe,Mana,ndaguhimbaza
138.Yesu, mukiza wanjye
lyrics:
138.Yesu, Mukiza wanjye, Nguhany' ibyishimo Uyu mubiri wanjye, Ng’ub’uwawe rwose.
 

ref:Akir' ituro ryanjye, Mwana w'UwIteka, Utum’ Umwuka Wera, Umanukiremo,
 

2.Sintinya na gatoya Kukwiyegurira, Kubw' imbabazi zawe, Murokozi wanjye.
 

3.Umuriro w'Umwuka Uz' ub’unyakemo, Umare mu mutima Ibitar’ibyawe.
 

4. Za vuba, Mwami Yesu, Ube Databuja; Iteka nzab’ uwawe Kuk' uhor'unkunda.

title: 139.Mukiza  Yesu ,ntabara
lyrics:
139.Mukiza Yesu, ntabara, Kukw abantu babiri Bari mu mutima wanjye, Umwe akunda ugoma.
 

ref:Ndengera  Ndengera Mwami wanjye, ndengera 


2.Umwe ni we Mwuka wawe Unyiringiz’ijuru; Und’ahor anyoshya nabi, Ashaka kunshumuza.
 

3.Mwami, sinkor' ibyo nkunda, Nubwo mpora mbyifuza.  Ibibi byo ndabikora, Nubw’iteka njya mbyanga.
 

4.Murokoz' umucyo wawe Umurikire neza, Ngo wa muntu mubi nanga Atamperana rwose.
 

5.Iyo nirwanya ntyo, Mwami, Nta mahoro mba mfite. Ndagukunda, ndagushaka  Mfasha,nesh' uwo mubi
 

6.Kiz' imbata yaw' irushywa, Ihor'ikuganyira; Umpe n'ububasha bwawe Ngo njye nsinda Satani.
 

7.Ndashak' uburuhukiro Mu bwami bwawe bwiza; Mfasha ngo wa wundi nanga Atambuza kujyayo.

title: 140.Mwami, ndakwimitse
lyrics:
140.Mwami, ndakwimitse : wime Mu mutima wanjye, Sinibagirwe ya mahwa : Njyan' i Gologota !
 

ref:Ibyabay’ i Getsemane N’ibyo wababajwe byose, Sinzabyibagirwe, Mwami: Njyan’ i Gologota.
 

2.Unyereke ya mva, Mwami,Aho bagushyize, Aho marayika wera Yaray' ataramye.
 

3.Nje nka Mariya, Mukiza, Kukurabukira; Nsanz’ imva y’ irimw ubusa; Nshimy’ Uwanzukiye!
 

4.Unkorer’ umusaraba,Niyange, mb’uwawe; Nsangire naw’ igikombe Wanyoye kubwanjye.
 Ndengera  Ndengera Mwami wanjye, ndengera

title: 141.Mwami Yesu ndagukunda
lyrics:
141. Mwami Yesu, ndagukunda, Ndakwihaye by'ukuri. Urukundo rwawe rwinshi Ni rwo rubinyemeza. 
 Sinkibabazwa n'amakuba Yose nterwa n'iby'iyi si, Kuko mbyemereye kubwawe Kugira ngo ngushimishe.



ref:Ndagukunda, Yesu Wemere kumpaka, Nta kindi cyampaza, Mwami, Keretse wowe.



2.Mwami, ngwin’umpishurire Ibyiza wankoreye. Nubwo nizeye buhoro, Ngeza ku Musaraba ! Nyigish’uko 
 wankunze, Yesu, Nkiri mubi bikabije, Ngo nitegerez' igiciro Kimpesha kubabarirwa.



3.Ndushijeho kugukunda, Ndushaho kunezerwa; Ar' aheza cyangw’ ahabi,Nta bwo mbur’amahoro. 
 Ariko, Yesu, ntagufite, Nta mahoro nsigaranye; Iby'iyi si, nubw' ari byiza, Nta cyo byamarira rwose.

title: 142.Untwar’untwar’untware
lyrics:
142.Untwar' untwar’untware, Yesu, Mwami Yes’ untegeke ! Untwar' ungir’ imbata yawe Mwami Yes’untegeke!
 

2.Ibyaha byanjye byari byinshi: Mwami Yes’untegeke! Nyamara, byos' urabijyana : Mwami  Yes’untegeke!
 

3.Wangabiy’ amahoro menshi :Mwami Yes’untegeke! Ubwo wangeze mu mutima, Mwami Yes’untegeke!
 

4.Gumana nanjy’ iminsi yose :Mwami Yes’untegeke! Tutari kumwe, naba mfuye : Mwami Yes’untegeke!

title: 143.Yesu, ko wankunze
lyrics:
