143.Yesu, ko wankunze, bigatum’ umfira.None nakwim' iki ? Ndakwihay’ubu, Umutima wanjye n'ibyo mfite

 byose Non’ ubyiharire : sinkir’uwanjye.



2.Uhagaz’imbere y'intebe y'ubuntu, Itek’umvugira k’Uwiteka, So. Mwam' ujy’ unshoboza, ntwar’umusaraba.
 Nkwize n'imbabazi z'Uwanshunguye.



3.Mwami, ndakwinginga : umpe gusa nawe :Mpa kugushimisha, kand’unyigishe. Nige kugukunda; 
 nige kukumvira, Nshak' abazimiye, mbakugezeho!

title: 144.Yesu ndagukunda cyane
lyrics:
144.Yesu ndagukunda cyane ndakwihaye nzinutsw’ukw’ibyaha byanjye binezeza
 mucunguzi wanjye yesu nyir’ubuntu bwose ntabwo nigeze ngukund’uko ngukund’ubu



2.Ngukunze nkwitur’uko wankunze kera Unyigur’i Gologota ntakwiriye
 Ngukundiy’amahwa wanyambariye mu mutwe Ntabwo nigeze ngukund’uko ngukund’ubu



3.Nzahora ngukunda Yes’iteka ryose Ngihumeka njye ndirimb’ishimwe ryawe
 Ningera mu rupfu nabwo nzagushima ntya nti ntabwo nigeze ngukund’uko ngukund’ubu



4.ningera mu rugo rwa so  mwami Yesu nzajya mpaguhamiriz' iteka ryose
 nkwikubis’imbere nzagusingiza cyane nti ntabwo nigeze ngukund’uko ngukund’ubu

title: 145.Kugukorera ni byiza
lyrics:
145. Kugukorera ni byiza, Mukiza wanjye. Iri turo ntuye, Mwami, Rikunezeze.
 

ref:Akir' ubugingo bwanjye, N’ ubwawe, Yesu; Kandi kubw’ ubuntu bwawe, Undind’ ibibi.
 

2.Mwam’icyo nifuza cyane N' ukwera nkawe : Nta n'ikindi nshaka, Yesu; Nzajya nkumvira,
 

3.Mbe nk’intumwa zawe, Yesu, Njye ngukorera; Ngukurikire, Muvunyi, Nkubehw iteka.
 

4.Singitinya n’amakuba N' ibyago bindi : Uwo nizeye ni Yesu N'agakiza ke.
 

5.Twese tujy’imbere hamwe Mu by'inzira ye, Turirimban’indirimbo, Tunesh’iteka.

title: 146.Kugukunda,Mwami Yesu
lyrics:
146.kugukunda, mwami Yesu,kuruhukir'i wawe, nkaba mu gituza cyawe,birankwiriye rwose.
 kwemer'amahoro yawe,kuko waje kunkiza,no kumenya kwera kwawe,bihora binezeza



2.Amahirwe yanjye nkunda Ni Wowe, Yesu wanjye! Uhor’ untabar' iteka;
 Ntugir' ubw’ uhinduka. Urukundo rwawe rwinshi, Waje muri twe mw isi Ngw abazimiy’ ubashake, Ubatarure bose.



3.Koko, yitanze kubwanjye No kumeny’aramenya. Yemeye kunshyira ma nzu,Tukajya dusangira. Mu ntege nke zanjye zose
 Arashaka kunkiza: Ni inyangamugay' akunda Kumfasha no kumpira.



4.Amaraso yawe, Yesu, Ni yo mas’ ashobora Kunkurahw ibyaha byanjye;
 Ampa gukiranuka. Mwa kumbwir' ibindi byose:N’Umurokozi wanjye, Kandi yemera no kumpa Amahoro y'iteka.

title: 147.Uburyo Yes’ankunda
lyrics:
147.Uburyo Yes’ ankunda Burantangaza cyane. Ubuntu yangiriye Ni bwo bubimenyesha. Yampay’ umunezero N'amabor' aseseka. Mbwirwa n'ibyo ko nd’ uwe Na We yukw ar’ uwanjye.



2.Ubwiza bw'isanzure N'uburabyo bwo mw isi; Nta wanezezwa na byo, Kerets’ afite Yesu. Ukw inyoni zishima Izina ry'Umuremyi Bimbwira ko nd’ uwawe Nawe yuko ur’ uwanjye.



3.Ker’ ibyantinyishaga None ntibinkangisha. Ibyiza birangota, Mukiza, nkwisegure. Ne kukujijinganya, Ne kugir’ amaganya: Kuko mbizi, nd’ uwawe, Kandi naw’ ur’ uwanjye.



4.Nd’ uwe wenyin’ iteka: Nta cyadutandukanya. Amahoro mez’ ampa Arut’ ay’isi cyane. Nubw’ iyi si n’ijuru Byombi bizashiraho,azahora ari uwanjye,nanjye ngo mb'uwe rwose.

title: 148.Nta rukundo rusa n'urwa Yesu
lyrics:
148.Nta rukundo rusa n’urwa Yesu Rutazarangira: Ni rwo ruzagez' abana be Bose mu bwami bwe.
 

ref:Banguka, winjire Mur’ urwo rukundo Ruhebuje rw’ Umucunguzi Watubabarijwe.
 

2.Nta wundi mutima nk’ uwa Yesu Wuzuy’ imbabazi, Kand’ amarira y'abantu be Arayazi neza.
 

3.Nta rindi jwi risa n’irya Yesu Rihamagar’ abe, Ngo tumwitabe, tumwumvire, Tumukurikire.
 

4.Nta bihembo bisa n’ibyo Yesu Azah' abantu be, Azabiduh’ abamwizera, Tukamukorera.

title: 149.Mbeg’urukundo rw’Imana
lyrics:
149.Mbeg’urukundo  Rw’Imana Yacu Nta Warondor’uko Rungana Rusumb’ukwezi Rusumb’izuba Kandi Ikuzimu Rugerayo rwatumye Yes’aza  Mw’isi Yacu Ngw’indushy’ Aturuhure ,Na cya Kirara Cy’inzererezi Rwatumye S’acyakira 

Ref:Mbes’urukundo Rw’Imana Yacu Rwagereranywa N’iki Mw’ijuru N’isi Baruririmbe Kugez’iteka Ryose 

2.Ingoma Zose Zo Mwisi Yacu Zijya Zihita Zishiraho Abang’Imana  Ntibayisenge Bazapfa Bose Be Kwibukwa Nyamar’urwo Rukundo Rw’Imana Rutagir’akagero Urw’idukunda Tw’abari Mw’isi Nirwo Rutazashira

3.Inyanja Zose Zaba Nka Wino Ijuru Rikab’impapuro Ibyatsi Nabyo Bakabigira Byos’uducumu Tw’abanditsi Ab’isi Bose Bakandikaho Iby’urukundo Rwayo Ntibabimara Ntibyakwirwaho Hakam’ Inyanj’ari Yo

4.Kandi Uko Ikunda Umwana Wayo Jye Nikw’inkunda Ntakwiriye Nar’umugome Nukw’ Impa Yesu Ngw’ambambirwe Ku Musaraba Mubo Yacunguj’ayo Maraso Nzi Y’uko  Nanjye Ndimo Nzajya Ndirimba Urwo Rukundo Ndukwize Mw’isi Yose

title: 150.Nishimiye ko Data wa twese
lyrics:
150.Nishimiye ko Data wa twese Yandikishij’ iby'urukundo rwe; Mu byiz’ Imana yavuze byose, Nta kirut' iki, ko Yesu ankunda.
 

ref:Nishimiye ko Yes' ankunda:Arankunda  Arankunda  Nishimiye ko Yes’ ankunda, Nubwo ntakwiriye.
 

2.Kand’ iyo nyobye, nkamushavuza, Ntareka kunkunda ntakwiriye; Kand’ ikinsubiz’ aho Yes' ari Cyane n’ ukwibuk' urukundo rwe.
 

3.Ni ndeb’ ubwiza bwe bwo mw ijuru, Nzajya ndirimb’ ik’ iteka ryose ? Nzajya mubaza ndirimba ntya, nti Yesu, n’iki cyakunkundishije 
 

4.Kand’ urukundo ni rwo rwazanye Yesu kunshunguz' urupfu rubi. Kokw arankunda, ndabizi neza : Nanjye ndamukunda, ndamushima

title: 151.Yes’arush’abandi bose
lyrics:
151.Yes’ arush’ abandi bose—Kudukunda; Arush' ukw abavandimwe—Bakundana.
 Nahw izindi nshuti zacu Zaduhararuka zose, Yesu ntabw’ ahemukira—Ab’ akunda.



2.N'iki gihesh’ ubugingo—Budashira ? S’ ukumenya Yesu wacu—Udukunda ?
 Twarazimiye nk'intama. Yes' aradushakashaka, Atubony’ atwinjiz' ubwo—Mu rugo rwe



3.Tumumenye kw ar' inshuti—Yishimira Kuduh' imigisha yose—N'imbabazi.
 Imitima yac’ ikunda Kumvir’ iyi Nshuti yacu No kumwizigira cyane—Tudatinya.



4.Kand’ ibyaha byacu byari—Bikabije: Yes’ aterwa n'urukundo—Kudupfira :
 Ni byo bituneshereza; Ni byo biturind' ibibi, Tukayoboka yanzira—Iger’ i We.

title: 152.Har’ umukunzi  nka Yesu
lyrics:
152.Har' umukunzi nka Yesu wacu? Oya ye, nta n'umwe! Nta n'udukiz' ubumuga nka We: Oya ye, nta n'umwe !

ref:Yes' az' ibiturushya byose; Atuber' umuyobora. Har' umukunzi nka Yesu wacu?  Oya ye, nta n'umwe !

2. Har' und’ utungan' akera nka We? Oya ye, nta n'umwe! Nyamara nta wiyoroshya nka We:Oya ye, nta n'umwe 

2. Nta munsi n'umw' adusigirira; Oya ye, na hato !Haba n'ijoro tutaba kumwe, Oya ye, na hato !

title: 153.Yes’urankunda,Mukiza
lyrics:
153.Yes' urankunda, Mukiza mwiza; Yes' urankunda : sinz' icyakunkundishije !
 Waje kunkiza, nd' umunyabyaha; Ubwo wanshunguye, nagupfira !



ref:Njye nguhimbaza, Mukiza mwiza ! Njye nguhimbaza, Mucunguzi wanjy' unkunda Njye nguhimbaza, Mukiza mwiza:Nzakuririmbir' ibihe byose.



2. Waje kunkiza, Mukiza mwiza; Waje kunkiza: wabyemejwe n'iki, mbese?Icyo nzi n'uko wabay' inshungu, 
 Ubwo wamfirag' urupfu rubi.



3. Nshorera, Yesu, Mukiza mwiza : Nshorera, Yesu; jy'ungez’ ah' ushaka hose,
 Mu nzira nziza, cyangwa no mu mbi, Nger' ikirenge mu cyawe, Yesu.



4. Yes' uzampemba, Mukiza mwiza: Yes' uzampemba, ntakwiriy' ubuntu bwawe 
 Kandi nzareba n'ubwiza bwawe, Nguhimbazanye n'abera bose

title: 154.Ndabaririmbira iby’uwamfiriye
lyrics:
154.Ndabaririmbira—Iby’Uwamfiriye, Wankunze mfit' ibyaha, narararutse Wambonyemw iki, Krisito, 
 Ukaza mw is’ukamfira ?



2. Yasiz' ingoma ye,—Nukw aramanuka; Baramusuzugura, ntibamwemera.Har’ indi nshuti nka We se 
 Yakund' abayihinyuye ?



3. Baramushingije,—Bashash'imyambaro Ngo, Hozana; hahirw' Umwami Krisito!Bukeye, barahinduka,
 Bati: Nabambwe ! Nabambwe !



4. Bafash' Umwam’ubwo,—Baramuhemura; Bakiz’umwambuzi, babamba Krisito. Iby' arabyihanganira, 
 Ngw abon' ukw aducungura.



5.  Yavuye mw ijuru,—Aza mur' iyi si, Abur' aho yarambik' umusaya we; Amfira ku Musaraba, 
 Ngo nanjy' angeze mw ijuru.



6. Ntabwo nzarambirwa—Kubaririmbira Iby' urukundo rwe n'uko yababajwe. Yanyemeye nk'inshuti ye: 
 Nzavuga hos' izina rye!

title: 155.Yesu, nguhagaz’imbere
lyrics:
155.Yesu, nguhagaz' imbere, Nibaza binyobeye Icyakunkundishij' utyo,Nd' uwatsinzwe, mpindanye. 
 

Ref:Biranyobeye, birantangaje :Nzajya mbitangarira !biranyobeye, birantangaje, Yuko wankunz' utyo, Yesu !
 

2.Wasenze kubwanjy' utya, ngo :Ntibib' uko jye nshaka. N' ibyaha byanjye byakwishe, Ntabw' ari za nguma nsa !
 

3.Birya byuya by'amaraso,Ntangar' iyo mbyibutse: ibyo byabaye kubwanjye Rya jor' i Getsemane.
 

4.Wishyizehw ibyaha byanjye, Bihinduka nk'ibyawe; Wehoho nta cyo wakoze : Ni jye bakujijije!
 

5.Wabambwe mu cyimbo cyanjye, Ng' unkize kurimbuka, Ahubwo nzajye mw ijuru, Ngushim' ubudasiba

title: 156.Ni jye,Yesu,witanze
lyrics:
156.Ni jye, Yesu, witanze Kera ku Musaraba, Mbitewe n'urukundo
 Ngo ngukiz' ibyaha byawe. Mugenzi, narakwitangiye ; Wanyituy' iki wowe ?



2.Narets' ubwiza bwanjye Nari mfite mw ijuru, Nsig' umucyo kwa Data, Nza mu mwijima w'iyi si,
 Naretse byose nkurengera : Warets' iki kubwanjye ?



3.Banyish' urupfu rubi, Birut' uko byavugwa; Navushijw' amaraso Ng' utazapfa nabi nawe
 Nakwihanganiy' ibyo byose : Wanyihanganiy' iki?



4.Navuy' i Wanjy' i bwami, Nger' ah' uri mw isi mbi, Nkuzanir' agakiza N'ubugingo budashira.
 Ko nakugabiy' impan' ubwo, Wigeze kuntur' iki ?

title: 157.Mukiz’umpe kumenya
lyrics:
157.Mukiz' umpe kumenya,Naho kab' agace, K'urukundo rw'igitangaza Rwatumy' udupfira. 
 

ref:Umenyeshe, Mukiza, Uko wababajwe, Ubw' Uwera wang' ibyaha pe Wishyiragahw ibyanjye.
 

2.Umenyesh' ibyo, Yesu, Kuko bikomeye, Bikarut'uko byashobora Kumenywa n'umuntu.
 

3.Mbes' imbereri, Yesu, ni zo zakubambye ? Oya si zo, ni za mbabazi Wangiriy' ubwanjye.
 

4.Ntangajwe na rwa rupfu Wamfiriye, Yesu, Ko rwashoboye kunshungura Ngo nkire, Mundane,
 

5.Ni rwo runkiz' ibyaha Byose bambonaho; Si byo byonyine: runkuramo N'ibinyihishemo,
 

6.Mukiza, nshenjagura; Men' ibinangiwe! Unyemeze yuk' unesheje : Unyimemo, Mwami.

title: 158.Umvir’ijwi rya Yesu
lyrics:
158.Umvir' ijwi rya Yesu, Ni we Mukiza wawe. Umv’arakubaz’ ati: Munyabyah' urankunda ?

 
2.Umugore yabasha  Kwibagirw' umwana we?  Nahw ibyo byashoboka,  Jyeho nzajya nkwibuka.

 
3.Ni jye wakubohoye, Nkuvur’ibikomere;Ni jye waguhabuye;  Ni jye mucy'ukwakira.
 

4.Kand’urukundo rwanjye Ntirubasha gushira; Rurut' urundi rwose, Kuko rutarangira.
 

5.Mu gihe gikwiriye, Nzakujyana mw ijuru; Uzabon' ibyishimo : Mbes' urankunda cyane ?
 

6.Mwami, birambabaje K' urukundo ngukunda ari ruke hanyuma Y'urwo rukundo rwawe.
 

7.Ndagukunda buhoro, Nubwo bidahebuje. Nuk' umpe kurushaho Kugukunda, Mukiza.

title: 159.Jye nahoze ndengerwa
lyrics:
159. Jye nahoze ndengerwa N'inyanja y'urupfu, Ntwawe n'ibicumuro, Mpotorwa n'ibyaha; Maze ndabukwa Yesu,
 Ndamutakambira;  Aransingir' aramfat’ankuramo



ref:Nakijijwe n'ubuntu bwe Nta wundi wandokoye, atari We.



2.Nawe, munt' urengerwa. Ubur’amas' ubu ! Reb' uwo Murokozi:Aragukuramo ! Imiraba ntibura
 Kumvira Nyira yo: Arashaka kugukiz' umwemere !



3.Haz’ibyago noneho, Cyangw' imibabaro, Nzi ko ntazazikama: Yes' azankuramo.Azamaramw ubwoba, Amp’ibinkwiriye. Ni kw azakugirira, n'umwemera.

title: 160.Mbeg’urukundo rwaw’umfitiye
lyrics:
160.Mbeg' urukundo rwaw’umfitiye ! Sinarumenya: rurahebuje. 
 Mukiza wanjy' umpishurire, Rumpumurize no kunyobora,Ni nteshuka.



2. Urwo rukundo narugera nte? Ruransumba ; sinarurondora. Njye ndwerekana gus’umfashije, Njye mvug' uko rukiz’abangizi B'abihebe.



3.Urwo rukundo naruvuga nte, Ko ntabon’amagamb' akwiriye ? Nyamar' akanwa kanjye kifuza Guhora nshimish’Umurokozi Unkund’atyo.



4.Urwo rukundo narushimira nte Mukiza wanjye, ne guceceka  Ndirimb' imbabazi wangiriye, jy' umunyabyaha wakugomeye, Ukankiza !



5.Nta cyo nabasha kugushimisha; Mukiza wanjye, nd’umukene pe. Niringiy’urukund’umfitiye:Mbes' Uwankunz' akanyitangira,yanyim'iki?



6.Ndashaka, Yesu, kukugumaho, Ur' isoko y'amaz' ahoraho,
 Njye mpore nkunywah' ubudasiba, Umar' inyota n'umubabaro, Sinkuveho!



8.Mukiz' ubwo nzagera mw I juru, Amaso yanjy’akakwirebera, Nih’ urukundo rwawe nzabona Uko ndumeny’ uko ndusingiza,

title: 161.Mbwir’amagambo ya Yesu
lyrics:
161.Mbwir’amagambo ya Yesu; Mbwir’ibyo yankoreye. Ndirimbira n'indirimbo Irut' izindi zose: Ya yindi y'abamarayika Ba bungeri bumvise Bat' Uwiteka yubahwe, Kand' amahor' abe mw isi.



ref:Mbwir' amagambo ya Yesu; Mbwir' ibyo yankoreye. Ndirimbira n'indirimbo Irut' izindi zose.



2.Mbwir’iby'iminsi yamaze Ashukwa n'Umwanzi we, N'uko Satani yatsinzwe N'ijambo ry'Uwiteka. Mbwira n'ibyiza yakoze
 N'iby'imibabaro ye N'uko yahinyuwe n'abe N'uko yasuzugurwaga.



3.Mbwir' iby'urupfu rwa Yesu N'iby'Umusaraba we N'uko yahambw' akazuka: Non' ariho, ntagipfa. 
 Mbwir' urukundo rwe rwinshi Rwatumy' anshungur’atyo. Ayi we ! bintey' agahinda:Yes'ibyo yambabarijwe!

title: 162.Nganirir’ibya Yesu
lyrics:
162.Nganirir’ibya Yesu N'iby'urukundo rwe N'uko yavuye mw ijuru,Ngwaz’ aducungure. Ni yo 
 magamb' ankwiriye, Nd' indushyi, mpindanye. Yamviriy’ amaraso ye Ngw’anshungure, mb' uwe.



ref:Nganirir' ibya Yesu ( x 3) N’iby’urukundo rwe.



2.Twagereranya n'iki Ibyo yababajwe  Ntiyanze kutubambirwa
 Ngwadukiz’ibyaha.  Bisubiremo witonze, Ne kubyibagirwa, Ngo meny’ icyo yankoreye n'uko yanshunguye. ,



3.Onger' unyibuts' ibye,Mbimeny’uko biri. Bivug' uburyo bworoshye Nk'ubwiriz' umwana. 
 N'umbonan' umubabaro, Ujy'umber' inshuti, Umbwir' iby'ubwo buntu bwe Ngo bimpumurize.



4.Hor' ubimbwir' iteka :Ntibizandambira. Umva, ni jye munyabyaha
 Yesu yaj' ashaka! Erega, n'igitangaza : Mbyamamaze hose, Uwer' utagir' inenge Kumfira ndi mubi!



5.Uzonger'ubimbwire Iteka n' ubona Yuko gukund’iby'iyi si Binyaz' umugisha. Unyibuts' iby'isi yindi
 Irut' iyi cyane, Ngo mbon' Umwami w'iyo si, Antunganye, nyurwe.

title: 163.Uhereye kera kose
lyrics:
163.Uhereye kera kose, Yesu yahoze mw ijuru, Ar' i buryo bw'Uwiteka, Ni yo Man' isumba byose.
 

2.Maz' urukundo rwe rwinshi Rwamuzanye mur'iyi si, Avuka nk'abandi bantu, Ashir' ubwan' arakura.
 

3.Atangira no kwigisha Ibyiza by'Uwiteka, Se; Kand' abarwayi bizeye Yakundaga kubakiza.
 

4.Ijambo rye ryakizaga Impumyi n'abaremaye; Yakoraga ku babembe Bamwizeye, bagakira.
 

5.Kandi n'abari bapfuye, Yabashaga kubazura; Ntabwo Yesu yananiwe Gukiz' umunt' umwizeye.
 

6.Kand' ikirut' ibyo byose, Yabwirizag' abakene Iby' urukundo rw'Imana N'iby'agakiza k'iteka.
 

7.Maz' abantu babi cyane Batemey' ibyo yavuze Batewe n'ishyari ryinshi  Kumwic' urupfu rubi pe.
 

8.Yabambishijw' imbereri Kubwacu, ku Musaraba; Batoboy' ibiganza bye ; Byakirishag' imbabazi.
 

9.Dor' uko yadupfiriye, Azir' ibyaha bya twese; Yapfuye mu cyimbo cyacu Kubw' urukundo rwe rwinshi.
 

10. Kand' uz' ahw ur'amwizeye; Ntiyabura kumwakira. Yarabisezerany' ati : , Sinzamuheza na hato.

title: 164.Yes’ avukir’i  Beterehemu
lyrics:
164.Yes’ avukir’i  Beterehemu  bamuryamishije   mu  muvure n’umunyambabazi  nyinshi  cyane
 Ng’uko  yaje  anshaka (x2) N’umunyambabazi   nyinshi cyane nguk’uko yaje anshaka



2.Yesu  yanshunguriye ku giti kand’ abohor’ umutima wanjye ntangazwa  cyane n’ imbabazi ze
 yaziz’ ibyaha byanjye (x2) Ntangazwa cyane n’ imbabazi ze yaziz’ ibyaha byanjye



3.Yesu ntahwema gukiz ’abantu ntitugasubire   mu ngeso mbi ngo tuzabane na We mw’ ijuru
 Araduhamagara (x2) ngo tuzabane na We mw’ijuru,araduhamagara



4.Yes’ azagaruka atujyan’ iwe tugumane na  We iminsi yose Kuko yabisezeranye  natwe azaza  ntazatinda
 azaza  ntazatinda (x2) kuko yabisezeranye  natwe azaza  ntazatinda

title: 165.Hosanna,singizwa
lyrics:
165.Hozana, singizwa, Yesu, Mukiza mwiza : Watumenyesheje Urukundo rw'Uwiteka. Usingizwe, Mwami : 
 Wavuye mw ijuru, Uzanir' ab'isi Agakiza keza. (X 2)



2. Hozana, singizwa, Muvunyi w'ubugingo;Imitim' ishime iryo zina ryawe ryiza. None turirimbe izi ndirimbo nshya,

 Ngw abana b'Imana Banezerwe bose. (x 2) 



3.hozana, singizwa, wowe, Nshuti y'abantu. uwihanganye wese ntabwo wanga kumwakira. wowe, 
 Mwami mwiza, Waje kutwigisha No kutumenyesha ..Uk' ukiranuka. (x 2)



4.Hozana, singizwa, Yesu, Mukiza wacu; Wemeye kwitanga kubw' ibicumuro byacu, Wicisha bugufi, 
 Maz' upfira bose, Kugira ngw abawe : Babon' ubugingo. (x 2)

title: 166.Ngwino soko y’umugisha
167.Yesu ni we nihishemo
lyrics:
167.Yesu Ni We Nihishemo  Yamberey’ubuhingiro Nta Cyankuraho Amahoro Yamberey’ Ubuhungiro

Ref:Umwami N’igitare Gikomeye Gikomeye, Gikomeye,Umwami N’igitare Gikomeye Yamberey’ Ubuhungiro 

2.Ku Manyw’amber’ Igicucu yamberey’ Ubuhungiro Amber’itara N’ijoro Yamberey’ Ubuhungiro

3.Mu Mvur’ambera Ubwugamo Yamberey’ Ubuhungiro Nta N’ubw’imiv’ Intembana Yamberey’ Ubuhungiro

4.Nta Byago  Byanter’ubwoba Yamberey’ubuhungiro Nta Mwanzi  Wese Wankanga Yamberey’ Ubuhungiro

5.Ntabwo Nzav’aho Yes’ari Yamberey’ Ubuhungiro Na We Ntazampemukira Azamber’ Ubuhungiro

title: 168.Mbumbatiwe nawe,Yesu
lyrics:
168.Mbumbatiwe nawe, Yesu, Nta kizampangara, Kand' urukund' umfitiye Ni rwo runduhur' ubu. 
 Numvis' amajwi meza Y'abatugiy' imbere; Bahora baririmba, Bashima Yesu, bati :



ref:Mbumbatiwe nawe,Yesu, Nta kizampangara, Kand' urukund' umfitiye ni rwo runduhur' ubu.



2. Mbumbatiwe nawe, Yesu; Ntabwo nkiganyira. Nta cyo Satan' antwar’ ubu N' amahane ye yose.Kand' amakuba na yo Ntashobora kunsinda. Ibyago by'isi byose Ntibyadutandukanya.



3.Yesu, Buhungiro bwanjye, Yesu wamfiriye, Wowe, Rutare nshinzweho, Nzakwiringir' iteka. 
 Nuko, njye nihangana : Dor' iri joro ribi Vuba rigiye gucya, Mpereko njye mw ijuru !

title: 169.Mana,nkuko wafashaga ba sogukuruza
lyrics:
169.Mana, Nkuko  Wafashaga Ba Sogukuruza, Niko Natwe uzadufasha Mu Myak’irimbere.  

2.Umuyaga W’ishuheri Urawuturinda.Uzatuber’ubuturo Budashir’iteka. 

3.Kera Abakwiringiraga Bari Mu Mahoro.Tugufite, Ntitwifuza Undi Murengezi. 

4.Imisoz’itararemwa,Is’itarabumbwa,Uhereye Kera Kose,Ur’uko Wahoze. 

5.Imyaka Igihumbi Mana.Ni Myinshi Kuri Twe.Kuri  Wow’iguhwaniye N’umuns’umwe Gusa. 

6.Imyaka Ijyan’iby’iyi  Si Nk’amaz’ahurura,Bikibagirana Vuba Nk’inzozi Z’umuntu.

7.Mana, Wadutabaraga Mu minsi yakera na non’uzaturengera tugeze kugupfa

title: 170.Utinyuke kuyoborwa
lyrics:
170.Utinyuke kuyoborwa Mu nzira nziza y'Imana. Kukw ishyikir' ari ryiza, Ugend' ucamw uyoboka.
 

2.Ntutinye gut' ibya kera, Byiguhindish' imishitsi Kuk' umucyo w'Uwiteka Wakir' ah' ugenda hose.
 

3.Urwanir' ibyiza byose N’ ubihorw’ uzabipfire. Ujye wubahish' Imana Ng' uzabe mu cyubahiro.

title: 171.Amahoro Yesu
lyrics:
171.Amahoro Yesu—Ah' abantu be Ntagir' akagero,—Ntarondoreka; Ajy'ahumuriza—Abayafite; N' utayata, ntabwo—Wayakurwaho.
 

ref:Wiringir' Imana :—Uyiringira  Ntabur' amahoro—Mez' adashira
 

2.Abo Yes' arindish’—Amaboko ye Nta mubish' ubasha—Kubageraho; Nta magany' abasha—Guhagarika Imitim' irindwa—N'Umucunguzi.
 

3.Ibyishimo byose—N'ibyago byacu Biva mu rukundo—Rw'Umwam' Imana We gushidikanya;—Jy'uyiringira; Ntiyahemukira—Uyizer' atyo.

title: 172.Mwemere kw’Iman’ibaha
lyrics:
172.Mwemere kw Iman' ibaha umurokozi , witeguye kubakiza, ubakwiriye.mu ijuru  no mw isi yose, ni We nyir'ububasha; 
 kand' ubony' uwo Mukiza Aranezerwa.



2.azatuma muba beza, Mumere nka We; umukurikira wese  Ntabw' azaneshwa. Mu rugamba, ntabahana;
 Ahor' abarwanira; Kand' ubwe yemeye rwose Kubarengera.



3.Mukiz' ubwaw' ubabwira Iby'amahoro, Yuk' unyuz' inshuti zawe Mu nzira nziza. Kand' ubwaw' urabarinda Kugira ngo be kugwa, 
 Bave mu makuba yose Bayanesheje.



4. Mwam' ibyago ni bitera Cyangw' amakuba, Utwongerer' imbaraga,Tukwiringire. Maze twizigiy' ibyawe,
 Dutumbire mw ijuru; Twishimire kuzabona Wa munsi mwiza.

title: 173.Imana ni yo mwungeri
lyrics:
173.Imana ni yo mwungeri Undagiz' urukundo; Niringiye yuko ntazakena, Kuko nd' intama ya Yesu.
 

2.Andyamisha mu cyanya cye Cy'ubwatsi bwiza cyane,Anjyan' i ruhande rw' imigezi, Itemba nez' idasuma.
 

3.Ansubizamw intege nshya, Zinkomez' umutima,Anyobor' inzir' igororotse Kubwa rya zina rye ryera.
 

4.Nubwo naca mu gikombe Cy'umwijima w'urupfu, Sinagir' ikibi ntinya cyose, Kuko turi kumw' iteka.
 

5.Kand' ujy'undindish' inkoni Yawe n'inshyimbo, Mana, Nukw ibyo bizampumuririza No mu gicucu cy'urupfu.
 

6.Untunganiriz' ameza Mu maso y'abanyanga, Unsize n'amavuta mu mutwe, Ump' igikombe cyuzuye
 

7.N'ukur' imbabazi zawe Zizanyomahw iteka;Nanjye nzaba mu nzu y'Uwiteka Ibihe byose, nishima.

title: 174.Jy’uba maso,wowe muntu wizeye
lyrics:
174.Jy'uba maso, wowe muntu wizeye :Mu gitondo, jya wisung’ Imana, Kuk' Umwanzi yoshy' abataba maso Ngw abagushe kukw abanga.
 

ref:Jy'uba maso : wicogora  Jy'uba maso : senga 
 

2.Jy'uba maso, no kumanyva y'ihangu, Iby'isi byibagij' iby'ijuru; Weho, gir' umwanya wo kwiherera, Ng’ useng' Umukiza wawe.
 

3.Jy'uba maso n'imunsi na n'ijoro, Wibuk' ibyiza by'inshuti Yesu; Ujy'umushakish' umutima wawe : Mubwir' ibikubabaje.
 

4.Jy'uba maso, hose mu gihe cyose : Satan' akubikiriye hose, Ashak' uburyo yaguseseramo, Ngo yimur' Umwami Yesu

title: 175.Mwunger’udukunda
lyrics:
175.Mwunger’ udukunda,—Jy' uturagira, N'uduhora hafi,—Twatiny' iki se? Tugukurikire,
 Iy' ujya hose, Naho haba habi—Cyangwa se heza.



2.Mwunger' udukunda,—Tuz' ijwi ryawe, Uduhamagaye,—Turanezerwa Kand' iy’ uduhannye,
 Turabyemera. Tur' intama zawe :—Utwiharire.



3.Wavuy' amaraso,—Mwungeri mwiza, Kugira ngw intama—Uducungure. Washyize kuri twe
 Ikimenyetso,Ni cyo Mwuka Wera,—Udutuyemo.



4.Mwunger' uturinde,—Uturengere Amasega mabi—Ye  kutwegera. Nta cy' azadutwara,
 Kuk' ukomeye. Turikumwe, byose—Biranesheka.

title: 176.We kumvir’Umubi
lyrics:
176.We kwumvir' Umubi ujy' agushuka. Umwumviye wese ab' acumuye: Wamutsinda none kubw' Umukiza, Byagufash' ubundi kujy' umunesha.



ref:Saba Yes' agufashe, Agukize mu moshya; Azahor' akurinda, Akuneshereze.



2.Wirind' ubucuti bw'abantu babi; : Bakunda kukoshya gukor' ibibi. Ntukavug' ijambo ritey' isoni, Wubahe n'izina ry'Jmana yera.



3.Ujy' ugira neza, ufash' abandi; Wirinde kubeshya, ahubw' ujy' uba Inyangamugayo, kukw iby' ari byo Bikundwa na Yesu ujy' agufasha.



4.Unesha Satani byamwandikiwe Kw azahabw' ikamba n'Umwami Yesu.Tugir' intege nke, nyamara Yesu Ni we Mutabazi, udushoboza.

title: 177.Mwen’Imana yizerwa
lyrics:
177.Mwen' Imana yizerwa,Waterwa n'ubwoba ? Mbega, ntiwatorewe Umwam' ugukunda ? Ng' umeny' Uwagutoye,
 Uce mu nzira ye, Unyuz' ikirenge mu cye Kukw ari we Shobuja.



2.N’ ubabara, wibwire Kw akubabarira; Nihagir' ugutuka, Umubabarire; Wizigir' ugukunda :Shikama kigabo, 
 Ng' uzatsind' abanzi bawe, Uberek' urukundo.



3.N' ubon' ibiruhanya,Ukumva k’ utsinzwe, We kugir' agahinda, Meny' ibigufasha; Ngibi : senga, wizere;
 Komeza gusenga; Maz' ureb' Umusaraba W'Umwana w'Uwiteka.

title: 178.Iy’utewe n’amakub’akomeye
lyrics:
178.iyo utewe n'amakub' akomeye, ukiheb' ubonye ko bicitse pe, jyubar' imigisha yaw' ukw ingana ! erega ni myinshi yo gutangaza !
 

ref:Bar' iyo migisha nonaha, iy' Imana yakugabiye. Uyibare Ntusige n'umwe  Erega ni myinshi yo gutangaza .
 

2.Nturemerewe  se no kwiganyira ? ugira ngo ntibicyihanganirwa ?  Bara ya migish' Iman' ijy'iguha, Umutim' ushyike munda, wishime !
 

3.Har' abakurushij' amajyambere, Arikw aya Yesu ni y’ ahebuje ! Ereg' ubutunz' ufite mw ijuru, Bwo nta wabugura ! Nuko, humura !
 

4. Amakuba naho yaba mensh' ate. We kwiheb' Iman' irayategeka. Wibuk' imigisha yakugabiye ! Byos' izabitungany'ikuyobore!

title: 179.Iy’urushye,iy’uremerewe
lyrics:
179.Iy' urushye, iy'uremerewe, Bibwire Yesu, bibwire Yesu ! Iy' ukumbuy' abakunzi bawe, Byos' ubimuganyire !
 

ref:Bibwire Yesu, bibwire Yesu ! Ni We nshut' ihebuje, Nta n'indi wabona imeze nka We; Byos' ubimuganyire 
 

2.Ibyo byago, ndetse n'amarira, Bibwire Yesu, bibwire Yesu ! Bya byaha bihishwe bikunesha,Byos' ubimuganyire !
 

3.Ubw' utiny' indwara no gupfusha. Bibwire Yesu, bibwire Yesu  Ubwo wibaz' iby'umunsi w'ejo Byos' ubimuganyire!
 

4.Mbes' ugir' ubwoba bwo kuzapfa ? Bibwire Yesu, bibwire Yesu  Ntuzi yuk' Umwami Yes' azaza ? Byos' ubimuganyire!

title: 180.Impara yaguye umwuma
lyrics:
180.Impara yaguy' umwuma Nkukw ishak' amazi, Mana ni ko njya nkwifuza Ng' umpemburish' ubuntu.
 

2.Ni Wowe Man' ihorabo, Maz' amar' inyota; Ni ryari nzakwirebera, Mu maso, Mucunguzi ?
 

3.Mutima wanjy' uhagaze Ubabajwe n'iki ? Wiringir' Itazabura Gukiz' uwihanganye. 

4.Uwifuz' Imana wese Imuhaz' ibyiza, Nuko nizere, nishime, Nshim' imbabazi zayo.

title: 181.Mwa nshuti za Yesu mwe
lyrics:
181. Mwa nshuti za Yesu mwe, Nimuze, twamamaze Hos' umunezero wacu, Nukw indirimbo z'ishimwe Zizamuke ziger' i bwami mw ijuru.
 

ref:Turajy' i Siyoni, Ku murwa mwiza w'Imana, Tunyur' inzir' ijya mw ijuru: Ku murwa w'Imana yacu. 
 

2. Utaz' Imana yacu Yaziririmb’ ate se ? N'abana b'Umwami basa Bashobora gusingiza Uwabacunguye, nkuko bikwiriye.
 

3. Umurwa w'i Siyoni Wuzuy' ibyiza byinshi, Kandi mu nzir' iganayo . Tutaragera mw ijuru, Twahaw’ ingwate yabyo ngo tunezerwe.
 

4. Muhumure noneho ! Nimuze, twishimane. Tugende turirimbana, Duca mu bwatsi bwa Yesu; Tugiye mw is’ irut' iyi, ni mw ijuru.

title: 182.Mur’iyo nzir’iruhije
lyrics:
182.Mur'iyo nzir' iruhije, Mbese, muragana he ? Turagana mu gihugu Iman' itunganije. Mu bikombe n'imisozi. 
 Ni ho duca tujy' i bwami, Ni ho duca tujy' i bwami: Nshuti, muze, tujyane !



2.Mur' icyo gihugu gishya, Ariko mwizey' iki? Izaduh' imyenda yera N'amakamb' adashira Na ya mazi y'ubugingo,Tubane n'Iman' iteka, Tubane n'Iman' iteka : Nshuti, muze, tujyane !



3. Mugend’ uko muri kose, Nta n'ibyago mutinya ?  Uwitek' azaturinda, Umwuk' udukomeze . 
 Uwitek' adutabare, Yesu, na W' atujy’ imbere, Yesu na W' atujy' imbere : Nshuti, muze, tujyane !



4. Natwe twaza, mwaturinda, Ngo tujyan' aho mujya ? Nuko, tubikunze cyane,
 Twishimye bihebuje. Nimuze, tutabasiga : Yes' aradutegereza; Yes' aradutegereza  Nshuti, muze, tujyane !

title: 183.Tugiy’i wacu mw ijuru
lyrics:
183.Tugiy' i wacu mw ijuru :Muze, mwi... sigara ! Gusingiz' Umucunguzi: Muze, mwi... sigara ! Abagezeyo  baragwiriye; Baranezererw' Umwana w'Intama. Abandi bari mu nzira : Muze, mwisigara !



3.Hazab' umucyo mw ijuru :Muze, mwisigara  Muve mu mwijima mubi :Muze, mwisigara ! 
 Har' ikamba Yes' azatwambika; Tuzanezeranwa n'abakijijwe, Ibyiza tubisangiye : Muze, mwisigara !



3.N' ushaka ko tujyanayo, ihane ! Ihane ! Mwiringir' agukiz' ubu ;Ihane ! Ihane ! 
 Kand' uwo mutwaro wikoreye, Mwemerer' awuguture uruhuke, Ngo tuzabane mw ijuru : Ihane ! Ihane !

title: 184.Dor’inzira ijya mu ijuru ni imwe
lyrics:
184. Dor' inzir' ijya mw ijuru ni imwe : N’ iya Yesu n'Umusaraba we. Ni mpush' inzira y'Uwambambiwe. 

Sinzahabona n'Umucy' ubayo. 
 nta yindi nzira tuzabona : Nta yiriho, haba n'imwe,n'ukur' inzir' ijya mw ijuru N' iy'Umusaraba.
 

2.nuhaka kwinjir' Ahera cyane, jy' imbere y'Imana yera, mu nzira twaciriwe nshya; y'amaraso y'Umwami Yesu.
 

3.nsezeye ku nzira z'isi zose : sinzazinyuramw uhereye ubu data arampamagar’ ati : Ngwino ! nzakugez' aho wateguriwe.

title: 185.Genda mu mucyo wa Yesu
lyrics:
185.Genda mu mucyo wa Yesu, Aguhishurire Ubury' Umwuk' afatanya Abana b'umucyo.
 

2.N' ugendera mu mucyo we, Uraba wuzuye N'iyera yang' umwijima, Ituye mu mucyo,
 

3.N' ugendera mu mucyo we, Ibyaha byakwishe Birozwa n'amaraso ye, Nuk' uhumanuke.
 

4. N' ugendera mu mucyo we, Azagutinyura Imva n'urupfu, wibuke Ko yabinesheje.
 

5.Ugendere mu mucyo we, Umwijim' ushire, Uvirw’ iteka n'umucyo Wiman' ihoraho. 
 

6. Kugendera mu mucyo we N’ inzir' iboneye N'iy'amahoro n'ineza, Yes' agushorera.
 

7.Jy'ugendera mu mucyo we, Uhung' umwijima : Ni hw amaras’ akweza de, Ng' uhor' utunganye.
 

8.Kandi mu mucyo wa Yesu, Dusangamw abandi Baz' Umurokozi na bo, Tukamusangira.

title: 186.Mu isi yacu no mu ijuru
lyrics:
186.Mw Isi Yacu  No Mw Ijuru Nta Zina Nk’irya Yesu Nta Rindi Ryampumuriza Nk’iry ‘Uwatubambiwe 

Ref:Iryo Zina Ndarikunda Ry’umucunguzi Wanjye Iryo Zina Rihebuje Ni Ryo Rinyingiza 

2.Nihagir’umunt’ushimwa W’umunyacyubahiro Naho Yakirush’abandi Yesu Aramuhebuza 

3.Iryo Zina Ryiza Cyane Ni Ryo Ngab’inkingira Irya Myambi Ya Satani Ntabwo Yarishobora 

4.Ereg’iryo Zina Ryiza Sinz’uko Naryogeza Nzajya Mw’ijuru Kubwaryo Mpore Nsingiza Yesu 

5.Ni Ryo Rimpesh’ubutware Bwo Kunesha iby’ iyi Si Rikamvana Mu Buretwa Rikamp’umudendezo 

6.Nzajya Nkwikubit’ imbere Ni Nkubona Mw’ijuru Wow’ Umwami Utwar’abami Nyiringir’usingizwe

title: 187.Ngwino Mwami Yesu
lyrics:
187.Ngwino, Mwami wacu Yesu, Ngwin' ugume muri jye : Mpatwe n'urukund' iteka Kujya ngukurikira.
 

2.Umutima wanjye wose Wuzur' ijambo ryawe, Mbone kunesha Satani N'imigambi ye yose.
 

3.Amahoro yawe, Mwami, Ajy'aguma muri jye, Anyifurishe gufasha Abanyabyago bose. 
 

4.Urukundo rwawe rwinshi Rusandare muri jye. Naho natukwa, nkagawa, Ruzabineshereza.
 

5. No mu ntambara njya ndwana, Nkubitana n'Umwanzi, Nzanesha, ntumbira Yesu Wamunesheje kera.
 

6. Ubwiza bwawe, Mukiza, Bungot' impande zose, Bekureba jyew' ahubwo Barebe wowe musa.

title: 188.Ndashaka gusa nawe
lyrics:
188. Ndashaka gusa nawe,Yesu, Mucunguzi : Nta wigeze kukumva Uvug' urakaye. Ndashaka gusa nawe :
 Wasengaga kenshi, Wihereranye na So Kuri wa musozi.

	

2.Ndashaka gusa nawe :Nubwo bakwangaga, Ntiwiturag' inabi Wagiriwe yose. Ndashaka gusa nawe :
 Wafashag' abantu; Ump' urukundo rwawe, Ruzabankundisha.

	

3.Ndashaka gusa nawe :Wahamagaraga Abana bato bose, Maz' ukabigisha. Nyamara, sinsa nawe :
 Bose barabizi; Mukiza mwiz' umfashe, Nse nawe byukuri.

title: 189.Mugenzi ugana mu ijuru
lyrics:
189.Mugenz' uragana mw ijuru? Ujy'utumbira Yesu ! Azakuyobor' amahoro : Ujy'umuhang' amaso.
 

ref:Ujy'umuhang' amaso Ujy'umuhang' amaso  Ajy'arind' umutumbiriye Ku manywa na n'ijoro.
 

2.Iy' ushutswe ng' uyob' inzira, Ujy'utumbira Yesu ! Ukomez' inzir' ifunganye: Ntumukurehw amaso !
 

3.Iy' inzir' itagaragara,Hakaba mu kabwibwi, Yes' ati : Jye ndi kumwe nawe : Ujy'umuhang' amaso !
 

4.Urupfu ni rushak' uwarwo, Ujy'utumbira Yesu ! Ni bw' azakugeza mw ijuru, Usohor' amahoro.

title: 190.Iyo turi hamwe n’Umukiza wacu
lyrics:
190.Iyo turi hamwe n'Umukiza wacu,  Atuyobor' inzira nziza. abamwiringira, bakamwitondaho Ni bo banyamahoro basa.
 

ref:jy'umwizera, Kandi jy'umwumvira ! Ng' ujy'unyurwa na Yesu Mu kubaho kwawe.
 

2.ntihakingirizwa, nta gicu gikuba : Byeyurwa no kuboneka kwe. nta shavu, nta bwoba, bona n'igishyika, Tumwiringiye, tumwumvira.
 

3.iy'inzar' iteye n'ubukene buje, Aduhembur' ibihe byose Ntabwo n'amakuba yadukomerera, Tumwiringiye, tumwumvira.
 

4.Ntitwakwiyungura kugir' ibyishimo, Tutazinutsw' ibyaha byose, Kukw imbabazi ze n'imigish' afite Bigir' umwizera amwumvira.
 

5.Tuzajya twishima, turi kumwe na We,Tuzagendana na W' iteka, Tumugandukiye, ngw adutume hose, Tumwiringiye, tumwumvira.

title: 191.Nunguk’ubuntu bwa Yesu
lyrics:
191.Nunguk' ubuntu bwa Yesu, Menye n'imbabaz' afite, Nunguk' ubwenge bw'ukuri, Meny' urukundo yankunze !Nunguk' ibya Yesu !
 

ref:Nunguk' ibya Yesu  Nunguk' ubwenge bw'ukuri,  Meny' urukundo yankunze.
 

2.Nshishikarir' ibya Yesu, Meny' iby' anshakaho byose. Mwuka Wer' umfuturire : Mbwir' uko Yesu yankunze.
 

3.Nunguk' ijambo rya Yesu, Mbane n'Umwam' antoneshe; Numvire byos' antegeka, Mpuze na We, muyoboke.
 

4.Meny’ iby'ubwami bwa Yesu, Menye n'ubwiza bwe bwose, Meny' ukw azim' ingoma ye, Ari We Mwami w'abami.

title: 192.Mwam’ujy’imbere mu nzira yacu
lyrics:
192.Mwam'ujy' imbere mu nzira yacu.Tur' abana baw' uduhe Kugukurikir' iteka, Utuyobore, tujye kwa Data.
 

2.Mu ngeso zacu no mu mirimo, Iby' ushaka ko dukora Mu rugendo rw'i Siyoni, Utubashishe kubisohoza.
 

3.Ni haz' igiter' uturengere ! Ni tubon' iminsi mibi, Tube twihanganye cyane, Mu nzira yawe, ni ko bigenda.
 

4.Ni tubabazwa n'ibidutera,Udukomeze, tubashe Kubabarir' abatwanga; Tukwiringiye, bizanesheka.
 

5.Naho habaho ikintu cyose Kidukurahw amahoro Ngo duterwe n'ubukonje Tuzacyihana, tuger' i wawe.
 

6.Duhishurire ibyo mw ijuru, Amasezerano yawe Ab' impamba y'ubugingo; Maze hanyuma, tuger' i Wawe.
 

7.Uru rugendo urutunganye ! Kand' uduh' Umwuka Wera Ngw'ab' impamba y'ubugingo, Utugezeyo, twishim' iteka. 
 

8.Udushorere hose tugenda; Ni tunanirwa mu nzira, Uduhembure, Mukiza, Ubwo tuzapfa, tuzajy’ i Wawe.

title: 193.Kora ugifite uburyo
194.Mana,nduburira amaso yanjye ku misozi
lyrics:
194.Mana nduburira amaso yanjye ku misozi Mbe gutabarwa kwanjye kuzava he Mubimbwire ? K’Uwiteka 
 niho guturuka Ku Mana yaremy’ijuru n’isi



2.Ntizemera k’ibirenge byawe biteguza Ikurinda ntabw’ihunikira ntisinzira Imana irind’Abisiraheri 
 Ihor’iri maso  ntisinzira



3.Imana ni Yo Murinzi wawe wo kwizerwa Niyo gicucu cy’iburyo bwawe gihoraho Ku manyw’izuba ntirizakwica
 N’ijoro ukwezi ntuzagutinya



4.Imana niyo ikurind’ibibi byose iteka  Imana niy’irind’ubugingo bwawe neza Izakurind’amajya n’amaza
 None no mu bihe bidashira

title: 195.Yesu yatwise amatabaza ye
lyrics:
195.Yesu yatwise amatabaza ye Yo kumurikir' abo mu mwijima. Tubamurikishiriz' umucyo we, Tubamurikishiriz' ingeso.
 

2.Tur’ amatabaza ya Kristo, Yifuza kureb' uko tumurika; Kand' iyo tuzimy' ababara cyane :Noneho, bagenzi, tumurike !
 

3.Arashaka kw abandi bareba Kumurika kwacu, bakayoboka. Tumurikir' ab'i wacu n'ahandi,Dushimishe Databuja, Yesu,
 

4.Ni dushaka kumurika dutyo, Twizer' Umukiza wadupfiriye, Tumusab’ Umwuka Wer' atunganye Imitima yacu : tumurike !

title: 196.Ni Yesu ufite urufunguzo
lyrics:
196.ni Yes' ufit' urufunguzo Rw' ibizaba. ibyo bihora binezeza;nta wundi wo kurundindira, keretse We, keretse We.
 

2.sintiny' ibyago bizanzaho :Ndamwizeye, ,ukw and’ imber' abitunganya;ni na W’ umeny' ibinkwiriye : Kw ari byiza ! Kw ari byiza !
 

3.Nd' irnpumyi jyewe, sinamenya Ibyamfasha. Ntabwo nzamwak' urufunguzo, ; Ahubwo mfash' ukuboko kwe, Mwiringiye,mwiringiye !
 

4.ntabwo nameny' imigambi ye; Nzi kimwe cyo ! Nzi yukw ankund' ubudasiba, Nzi yukw amber' ubuhungiro, Nkiri mw isi, nkiri mw isi.
 

5. Yewe, ibyo birampagije : Nguwe neza ! Sindeba kokw ibizambaho, Bizwi na Yesu wamfiriye. Natiny'iki ? Natiny'iki ?

title: 197.Uwishinze ku byasezeranyijwe
lyrics:
197. Uwishinze ku byasezeranijwe N'Umukiza wac' abon' amahoro, Kand' aririmbishwa n'umunezero Kuko yizey' ibihoraho.
 

ref:Twiringiye Ibyasezeranijwe na Yesu wacu; Ntabwo, ntabwo Yashobora guhemukir'abe.
 

2. ibyasezeranijwe n'Uwiteka Ntibikuk' iyo Satan' aduteye Ntidushidikanya, ntadutinyisha, Kuko twizey' ibihoraho.
 

3.ibyasezeranijwe n'Uwiteka Byerekana kw amaraso ye yoza. Ni y' ankiz' ibyaha, ntibinyanduze, Kuko nizey' Uwanshunguye,
 

4.Ibyasezeranijwe n'Uwiteka Bitum' urukundo rwe runkomeza; Inkota y'Umwuka ndayirwanisha;Ni y' itum' Umwanz' anesheka.
 

5.Uwishinze ku byasezeranijwe Ni w' uhora yumvir' Umwuka Wera, Satani ntashobora kumutsinda, Kuko yizigiy' Uhoraho.

title: 198.Umwami wacu, Yesu
lyrics:
198.Umwami wacu, Yesu, Ni we Tangiriro Ry'itorero yaremye Mu mazi n' ijambo. Yazanywe mw isi yacu No kudukiz' ibyaha,Ngo tub' Itorero rye Yaguz' amaraso. 



2.Itorero ni rimwe Mu mok' atar' amwe; Umwami waryo n'umwe Riramusanganira. ifunguro ni rimwe. Ritung' abaryo bose;Rishim' izina rimwe. N' iry'Umucunguzi. 



3.Yewe, kintu cyazanye Ibice muri ryo, Bikarisuzuguza Abataririmo ! Nyamar' abera baryo Bahora bari maso,Babwir' Umwam' ibyaryo Ngo aze arirengere.



4.Mu byago biritera, Rijya riruhurwa No guteg' amahoro Mu bihe bizaza. Ryifuza kuzabona Ibyiza byo mw ijuru, 
 Ni riva ku rugamba, Rinesheje rwose.



5.Kandi, rikiri mw isi, Rifitany' ubumwe Na Dat' Imana yacu  N'abe bo mw Ijuru. Abo, bakiri mw isi, Bafatanyaga na We. 
 Nanjy' umpe kuba nkabo, Mbasange mw ijuru.

title: 199.Ni nd’uzarwanana  n’Umwami wacu
lyrics:
199.Ni nd' uzarwanana n'Umwami wacu ? Ni nd' uzamamaza ubutumwa bwe ? Ni nd' uzarorera kwifuz' iby'isi, Nubwo yarenganywa n'abanga Yesu  



ref:Mbese, tur' aba nde ? Tur' aba Yesu . Twar' aba Satani, turamwimura 



2.Dor' icyubahiro tumaranira S' icy' iyi s' ahubwo n' icy'Umukiza. Yaradupfiriye : urukundo rwe Ruduhata kwemer' ubuhake bwe.



3.Yesu yaducunguj' amaraso ye Y'igiciro cyinshi : tur' imbata ze. Tuzagaya dute ubwo buntu bwe ? Byose tubisige kubw' izina rye.



4.Nubw' aba Satani bagir' umwete Wo kurwana cyane, twe kubatinya. Ingabo z 'Imana nta wazitsinda, Kuk' ukuri kwayo kuzineshesha.



5.Twandikiwe kera kub' ingabo ze : None, dutabare : twe gucogora ! Twihangan' ahubwo, tugir' umwete, Kuko turwanana n'Umucunguzi.

title: 200.Umwami agabye ingabo ze
lyrics:
200.Umwam'agaby'ingabo ze Kurwana n'ibyaha.Umugaba n' Umwana we : intwari ye ni nde?
 

2.Wikorer' umusaraba,Ugendane na We. Mufatany' imibabaro, Nuk' ub' intwari ye !
 

3.Sitefano yakubiswe Kubw' uwo Mwami we, Yasabirag' abanzi be, Ubwo bamwicaga.
 

4.Ubwo yar' agihagaze,Yabay' intwari ye; Bamwicishij' amabuye, Areba mw ijuru.
 

5.Batwikwaga mu muriro, Baranabambwaga. Dukurikiz' urugero Rwiza baduhaye !
 

6.Bajugunyirwag' intare, Zikabatanyura. Babicishaga n'inkota : N' intwari za Yesu.
 

7.Non' izo ntwari za Yesu Zageze mw ijuru ! Dore zigos' intebe ye; Ziramusingiza !
 

8.Zaciye mu mibabaro, Zizamukirayo. Mwam'udufashe natwe ngo Duc' aho baciye.

title: 201.Bayoboke, mu byuke
lyrics:
201.Bayoboke, mubyuke. Mwe ntore z'Umwami, dufate mu maboko Intwaro za Yesu. Mu nzira yo kunesha tuyoborwa na  
Yesu,  tujyane na W' iteka, Aturwanirire.



2.Impanda ziravuze Uti Nimuze, mwitabe Ikamba ry'ubugingo N’ ingabire yanyu. Ni mwangwa n'ababisha Mukomere, 
 murwane, Mugir' umwete mwinshi, Mutsinde Satani.



3.Mubyuke, mutabare, Mudashidikanya  Ntihagir' usigara;Mutumbire Yesu. Kandi mujye mutwara Intwaro zo kwizera

 Zizatuma munesha, Mugir' ibyishimo.



4. Mubyuke vuba vuba, Murwane mwihwema. Mwizer’izina ryera;Ni iryo muneshesha. Ni muva ku rugamba Mutahanye 
 na Yesu, Muzabon’ amahoro Y'iteka mw’ ijuru.

title: 202.Turi abasirikare ba Kritso Yesu
lyrics:
202 .Turi abasirikare ba Kristo Yesu; Ni W ukiz’ abamwiringira. Kandi twasezeranye kurwana cyane Na Satani n'isi n'umubiri.
 

2. Turi bene Data umwe, bagenzi banjye, Kandi dusangiye kwizera; Iyo badututse, baduhora Yesu, Twibuke yuko yadupfiriye.
 

3.Mwibatizwa twashyizweho ikimenyetso Cy'umusaraba yabambweho, tujye turwana munsi y'iyo bendera, Twambay' intwaro duhabwa na We.
 

4.tube maso, twirinde, nta wakwikiza; twizigir'izo ntwaro nziza Satani n'ashimagiza, ye kutwoshya; twe kumutinya naza arakaye.
 

5.twih’ Umwuka Wera, kugira ngo yime Mu mitima yac' adutware; Nukw azatubatur' ububata bubi Bwo kwifuza kose k'umubiri.
 

6.Bene Data, duhumurizanye, kuko tur’ ingabo z'Uwanesheje  twe gutiny’ ababisha, twe gucogora. tube maso, dusenge, turwane.
 

7.Nubw’ intambar' idasiba, twagabiwe Intwaro zituneshereza, Mw’ ijuru tuzaruhukan’ ibyishimo, twambay’ ikamba ritangirika.

title: 203.Mwa ngabo z’Umwami mwe
lyrics:
203.Mwa ngabo z'Umwami mwe,muze,dutabare! dor'Umwami wacu yatugiy'imbere.yahuye n'abanzi be, abanesha bose .
 dor'ibender'iragiye tuyikurikire



ref:Muze ngabo zose za Yesu, Muze dutabare umugaba wacu Yatugiy’ imbere. 



2. Maz’ izina rya Yesu Turivuge hose. Nuko tujy' imbere, Rituneshereze Indirimbo z'ishimwe . Zirater’ubwoba  Ingabo za 
 satani mbi, Nuko turirimbe.



3.Nubw’ingabo zo mw’isi zigenda zitsindwa, Ubwami bwa Yesu Ni nde wabunesha?  We yasezeranije : Yukw’ Itorero rye 
 Ridatsindwa na Satani N'iby’ afite byose.

title: 204.Dor' ibendera ya Yesu
lyrics:
204.Dor' ibendera ya Yesu  Iramanitswe !Nguy’ araj' ahuruy’ atyo, ngo atabare abe.
 

ref:Ati: Yemwe, ndaje, ndaje ! Nimukomere ! Ko ndi hamwe namwe ni nde Wabashobora ?
 

2.Kokw ingabo za Satani Zirakomeye.Tudafit’ Umwami Yesu, Zaduhindura. 


3.Nshuti mwe, dukurikire Umucunguzi, Tumutumbire twizere Ubutwari bwe!
 

4.Nubw’intambar'iturushya,twe gucogora ! Umv’ impundu ziravuze ; Aranesheje !

title: 205.Urwan’intambara nziza
lyrics:
205.Urwan’ intambara nziza ! Kristo n'imbaraga zawe : Fat’ ubugingo aguhaye,Ngo buguhesh’ ibyishimo.
 

2.Usiganirw’ aho Yesu Yicay’ agutegereje Ni We nzira kandi ni We Bihembo byo kurushanwa.
 

3.Wabujijwe kwiganyira, Wizere gus’ ubuntu bwe,Uzabon’ urukundo rwe Kw ari rwo rukubeshaho.
 

4.Ntutinye, we gucogora; Ntahinduk’ aragukunda, Yesu ni byos'umufite, Nta cyo wabasha gukena

title: 206.Har’uwitwa Danyeli
lyrics:
206.Har’ uwitwa Danyeli:yar’ intwari pe ! Ntiyakangwaga n’abanz' asenga  Imana ye.
 

ref:Tinyuka, mugenzi ba nka Danyeli! Itange ku Mwami wawe, ntumwihakane.
 

2.Ub' intwari ya Yesu niy'ukuri kwe. Bakubare no mu mutwe wa Danyel’uwo !
 

3.Bamwe bo mu ntore ze baraneshejwe. Kuko batihaze rwose nka Danyel'uwo !
 

4. Dor’ Umwanzi Satan’ agaby’ ingabo ze! Ziraneshwa zihuye na ba Danyel’ uwo !
 

5.Nuko rer'ushikame kand' utambuke ! Umv' impundu ziravuza ba Danyel’uwo

title: 207.Uwab’atinyutse ibyago byose
lyrics:
207. Uwab’atinyutse ibyago byose Naz’akurikire—Umwami Yesu ! Nta cyamurekesha—iyo migambi ye Yo guca mu nzira —ijya mw’ ijuru !



2.Ntabw’ azacogozwa N 'inshamugongo. Abazimubwira—Nibo bazagwa ! Abanzi be bose—Nti bamugarura munzir’ ahisemo— Ijya mw ijuru.



3.Mwam’ ujy'undindisha—Umwuka wawe, mbone kuzaragwa Kubahw iteka. Have wa bwoba we—Nimunyihorere! Namaramaje pe— Kujya mw’ ijuru.

title: 208.Imana n’ubuhungiro
lyrics:
208.Imana n’ ubuhingiro :Ni Yo ngab’ idukingira.iyo turi mu makuba, Ni Y’ ibasha kudukiza. Uk’ Umwanzi wacu Yishakiy’ uburyo Bwo kudutsinda, Ntatubasha na gato, Kukw’ Iman’ iturengera.



2.Ni twirwanaho twenyine,tubura imbaraga rwose.ariko dufit'intwari ijy'iturwanira iteka.iyo ntwari ni nde?
 ni wowe Mukiza.Mugaba wacu,tuzi yuko mu byago ari wowe uturengera.



3.Iy' abagome bahuje Guter' itorero ryawe, Urarirengera, Mana, Ntibabashe kuritsinda. Nubw’ Umugambanyi;Ashaka kutwica, Ntadushyikira Kukw’ aneshwa n’ijambo Ry'Imana, Nyir'imbaraga. 



4. Hishur’ijambo rinesha, Ridufasha dushobewe. Imbabazi zawe nyinshi Zize, zituzeho twese.
 Twakwamburw' ibyacu Ndetse, tukabohwa, Ntitwabyitaho : Byose tuzabinesha; Tuzaragwa, n’ubwami bwawe !

title: 209.Yemw’abari kuri Yesu
lyrics:
209.Yemw’ abari kuri Yesu, Dukanguke, tube maso, Kuko wa Mwanzi, Satani,: Ajy’ atureba ku jisho.
 

2.Satani ntiyigendera, Afit’ icy’ ahagazeho; Nuko ube maso, wirinde, Witwaz’ inkota y’Umwuka.
 

3.Ko uhishira Satani se, Kandi witirirwa Yesu ? None witind’ umwiyake : Afit’ igihe kigufi.
 

4.Yaciriw’ iteka ribi, Ashak’ abo yisasira. Bitum' ashishikarira Koshy’ abakunzi ba Yesu.
 

5.Ibya Yesu twabikijwe Twihute tubimenyeshe , ab'isi yose,bihane, bave mu byaha,bakizwe.

title: 210.Nimuze ngabo za Yesu
lyrics:
210.Nimuze, ngabo za Yesu, Tujye mu ntambara! Mwarobanuwe n’Umwami: Mwese, mwiyereke  araje : Umugaba araje, mu mukurikire
 Impanda bazivugije : Nimuze, mwitabe! 



2.Dor’ umugab’ uzigabye Ni Yesu Krisito.yanesheje wa mwanzi we kubw’Umusaraba. Ndetse, n'intwaro ze Yarazimwambuye. Twashobora kuneshwa se, Yes’ aturwanira ?



3. Mwiyumanganye mu byago mugiye kubona.Murind’ imitima yanyu, Itagwa mu gico. Intwari y'Umwami Ntiyita ku by’isi.
 Ni kw ijy'imera ngw ibone Kunesha Satani.



4. Mutwar’ intwaro Ni zo zimukwiriye Inkot’ ityay’ iboneye N' ijambo ry'Imana. Muryemere mwese; Ni ryo ribakiza.

 Muryizere mu mitima, Ni ho muzatsinda.

5.Imana ibahe imbaraga murwane intambara Umwami niwe ubigisha kunesha abanzi be mukomere cyane mugiye kunesha muhabwe ingabire nziza z'abatabarutse

title: 211.Hariho indi  si nziza cyane
lyrics:
211.Hariho indi si nziza cyane Twasezeranijwe n'Imana; Tuyitegereje twizeye Kuko Dat’ ayidufitiye.
 

ref:Aheza....mu ijuru...tuzahurirayo bagenzi:
 

2.Tuzaririmbira mw’ijuru Indirimbo z’abakijijwe.Ntituzongera kubabara:Tuzashir’agahinda rwose.
 

3. Data tuzamusingiza Ubwo buntu yatugiriye N'urukundo rwe n'imbabazi N'imigish’ ajy'atwungukira.

title: 212.Mw’ ijuru,hariho isi nziza
lyrics:
212 .a. Mw ijuru, hariho—isi nziza; Abera ba Yesu—Ni ho bari. Bishimira cyane Kumuhimbaz’ iteka Kandi 
 basingiza— izina rye. 



2. Mwa banyabyaha mwe,— mutebuke Kuz' aho Yes’ ari Ntimutinde! Ubwo tuzabana Nawe, Yesu, mw’ ijuru 
 Tutanduye rwose, —Tuzishima.



3.Hahirw’ ababayo, Kukw’ Imana Ijy'ibanezeza—Bihebuje. Dutanguranirwe Ah’ ubwami bwa Yesu Buri, 
 n'ubwiza bwe—Budashira.



b. Ni mw’ ijuru ku Mana —Abizeye Bazateranirizwa— Mu mahirwe. Kubw’Umwuka w’ Umwami Bateraniyeyo.Bazerura ngo, Shimwa—Shimwa,Mwami!



2. Umwana w’iman’ubwe,—yavuyeyo   Ngw ajy'atunyuza neza— Mu nzira ye. Tujye twibuk'iteka Kw’ ari W' utwigisha;Tuvuge tuti: Shimwa Shimwa,Mwami!Mwami!



3.Twebwe twes’ ab'iyi si,—Tumushake Na bene wacu bose—Tubijyane. Tunezerwe, twizere, Twebw' abacunguwe, 
 Twerure tuti: Shimwa,—Shimwa!Mwami!

title: 213.Hariho indi si irut’iyi cyane
lyrics:
213. Harihw indi s’ irut’ iyi cyane: Ni nziza, ni nziza  Ntiyagerwaho, n’ ikibi cyose : Ni nziza, ni nziza ! Ni ho tuzajya 
 kubw’ Umukiza! Baduherey’inanga nziza nshya,Ducurangane n’abamarayika: iyo si ni nziza .



2. kandi nta mwijim’uriyo rwose: iyo si ni nziza !Nta mubabaro, nta muborogo:iyo si ni nziza !Banywa ku mugezi w'ubugingo, Kandi bareb'uwabapfiriye, Bakishimir’ ubwiza bwe bwinshi :iyo si ni nziza !



3. Nubw' ibyaha byacu bikabije Kandi bigwiriye, Umukiza yaradupfiriye Ngo tubikurweho.Nukw abizey' Umukiza twese, Tuzatunganywa n'urwo rupfu rwe, Kandi nyuma tuzimana na We iyo si ni nziza!

title: 214.Hari umurwa mwiza  w’abera b’Imana
lyrics:
214. Har’ umurwa mwiza—W'abera b'Imana: Nta gihumanya,—Nta gihumanya Kizajya muri wo. 
 

2. Mwana w’uwiteka,—Mukiz’ubundaje:Nyoz’ untunganye,—Nyoz’ untunganye !Nkiz’ ibyaha byose!


3. Mpindur’ ubu, Mwami, Ngo Mb’ umwana wawe; Unkomereshe,—Unkomereshe Amaboko yawe!	
 

4. Nuk’ uzansohoze—Mu bera b'i Wawe, Ntafit’ inenge,—Ntafit’ inenge, Mur’iyo si nziza

title: 215.Tujye duhimbaza iteka
lyrics:
215.Tujye duhimbaz’ iteka Ururembo rw'i wacu, Twarwubakiwe na Yesu Mw ijuru ry'Uwiteka 


ref:iyaba mfit’ amababa Nk’ abamarayika, mba ngurutse, nkagerayo, Nkab’ i Siyon’ iteka.
 

2.Kand’ amazu yaho yose Ararabagirana, Kand’ aruta cyane rwose Ay’ abantu bubaka.


3.Yes’ ariyo, ni We Mwami Utwar’ abaho bose, Kand’ abamarayika bajya Bamuhimbaz’ iteka.
 

4.Munsi y'intebe y'ubwami ni hw isok’ikomoka ivamo ya mazi meza ubugingo bw’iteka.
 

5.Kand’aho ni ho hamera Igiti cy'ubugingo: lbibabi byacyo byiza Ni byo bikiz’ abantu.
 

6.Duhimbaz' urwo rurembo Rwo mw ijuru rw'Imana: Ni rwo Yesu Kristo wacu Yadutunganirije,
 

7.Yes' utungany' imitima Y'abakwizeye twese, Tujye dukor’ iby’ ushima, Tuzabane mw’ ijuru.

                                                            (indirimbo y'Abagande bishwe babahora izina rya Yesu)

title: 216.Singishaka ubutunzi
lyrics:
216. Singishaka ubutunzi Bwo mur'iyi si mbi; Ndifuz’ubwo mw ijuru No kuzagerayo. Mu gitabo cy'ubwami
 Cyanditswemw abera, Mbese, Yesu Mukiza, Jye wanyanditsemo ?



ref:Mu gitabo Cyawe, harimw iryanjye se ? , Mu gitabo cy' ubwami, Mbese, nanditsemo ?



2. Mfit’ ibyaha bingana N'umuseny’ ubwinshi. Ngwino, Yesu ubirohe Mu maraso yawe. Wadusezeranije
 Yukw ibyaha byacu, Nahw ari nk'umuhemba, Ng’ uzabyeza dede.



3. Har' umurwa mw ijuru Urimw inzu nyinshi; Nta n'ikibi kibayo.N' ah’abacunguwe. Ubwo nogejw’ibyaha
 Mu maraso yawe, Nzi ko wandits' iryanjye  Mu gitabo cyawe.



Mu gitabo Cyawe,iryanjye ririmo: Mu gitabo cy'ubwami, Mbese, nanditsemo ?

title: 217.Mu isi ndi umushyitsi
lyrics:
217.Mu isi ndi umushyitsi;—Si ho nzab'iteka;Nzayivamo, ntahe—Mw ijuru kwa Data.
 

2.Kandi nzamusanga—Ku ntebe y'ubwiza. Nawe azanyakira. Amp' ubuntu bwinshi
 

3.Maze, mban' iteka—Nawe, nta gahinda.Sinzaruh’ ukundi Hariy' amahoro.
 

4.Mpore muhimbaza,—Nikubit’ imbere Y'uwo Mutabazi—Wankuye mu rupfu.
 

5.None, mfit’ ubwuzu—Bwo kuzahagera, Ngo mve mur’iyi si  Njye mu mucyo wawe.

title: 218.Kubana na Yesu
lyrics:
218. kubana na Yesu iteka mw’ ijuru Biduter’ umunezero, Bikatwishimisha. ; Mw’ isi nd’ umushyitsi : Sinzayihoramo; 
 ahubwo ndi mu rugendo  Runjyana mw ijuru. 



2. Urugo rw'Imana Ajy'arunyereka, Ndurora runyegereye, Arumpishuriye; Bituma nifuza Cyane kugerayo :Ni ho mwandu w'ab'Imana, yerusalenu nshya.



3.Paulo yaravuze, Ati : Tuzabana Iteka ryose n'Imana; Ni ko tubisoma. Iryo sezerano, Urinsohoreze,

 Tubane no mur' iyi si, Uhor'undengera.



4.N’ ugenz’ utyo, Mwami, Umwuka n’ uhera,Urupfu ruzanyinjiza Aho batagipfa : Ni ho nzakumenya, Nkuko unzi 
 Mukiza, Niratir’ imbere yawe Ko tuzahorana.

title: 219.Ubwo nzamara imirimo
lyrics:
219.Ubwo nzamar’ imirimo ngo nsezere kw'isi,Umugezi witw' Urupfu nywambutse, Ni ho nzagera mw Ijuru, 
 nsang' Uwamfiriye : Azanyakiran’ ubuntu n’ineza.



ref:Nzamumenya, nzamumenya  Nzaba mpagaz' imbere Ye, nnyuzwe, Nzamumenya, nzamumenya ; 
 Mbony’ inkovu zo mu biganza bye.



2. Nzanezerwa ni mbon’ubwiza bwo mumaso he, Kandi sinzasiba kumushimira Urukundo n'imbabazi n'ubuntu
 byatumye Nanjy' amboner’ ikibanza mw ijuru.



3.Abo nkunda bagezeyo mbafitiy’ ubwuzu:Wa Mugezi ni wo wadutanije. Ariko sinavug' ubwuzu bwinshi mfitiye

 Umukiza wanjye wanyitangiye .



4.Azanshisha mw iremb’ansohoze mu rugo i We.Azanyambikish’ umwenda wera de. Nzaririmb’ iya Mose n’ iy' Umwana
 w’intama ! Yewe, nzanyurwa nirebeye Yesu !

title: 220.Ubwo nzabona Umukiza
lyrics:
220. Ubwo nzabon’ Umukiza Ntumbira mu maso he, Nzanyurwa mwitegereje, Ari We wamfiriye.
 

ref:Nzamubona, Yes' Umwami, Turikumwe mu ijuru : Nzamwirebera mu maso, Njye musingiz' iteka!
 

2.Nkiri mu isi mu mubiri, Mbur' uko mwirebera. Urya muns' urenda kuza, Mbon' ubwiza bwe bwinshi !
 

3.Amakuba azaba ashize Nta byaha, nta mwijima : Ibigande biganduwe, Tuzishim' imbere ye !
 

4.Ni mwirebera mu maso, Nzicwa n'umunezero. Nzamumeny' Uwo wankunze, Akaz' akanshungura

title: 221.Bana,mw ijur' abiringiy’Umucunguzi
lyrics:
221.Bana, mw ijur' abiringiy' Umucunguzi Tuzaherway' ibintu byinshi. Azaduh' amakamba y'ubwiza bwinshi, Kand' atwambik' imyenda yera.

ref:Bana, tuzahabwa, tuzahabwa byinshi, Tuzagabirwa byinshi mw ijuru  Tuzahoran' ishimwe, tunezerewe, Ni twizer' Umukiza Yesu.

2.Tuzagendagenda mu muhanda wakozwe Mw izahabu n' ifeza nyinshi; Kandi Yesu ni We zuba ryaho ryiza : Nta n'ijoro riba mw ijuru.

3.Twe n'abera bose tuzacurang' inanga, Turirimbir' Umwami Yesu; Tuhanywere n'amazi y'Uruzi rwiza, Dusiz' urupfu n'amakuba.

4.Muze mwese, tujyan' iyi nzira ifunganye, Mumuhay' imitima yanyu. Nimuyoboke mwes' Uwabapfiriye, Abagezey' abanezeze.

title: 222.Mbese,tuzahurirayo
lyrics:
222.Mbese tuzahurirayo, Kuri wa mugezi mwiza Uca mw ijuru hagati, Uv' i bwami ku Mana yacu ?
 

ref:Koko tuzahurirayo, Tubonane n'abera ku mugezi, Ku mugez' utunganye w' Imana Uv' i bwami ku Mana yacu.
 

2.Tuzagendana ku nkombe Y'umugezi w'ubugingo. Tuzasengan' Uwiteka, Tuyisingiz' iteka ryose.
 

3.Nuko tutarahagera, Duturw' imitwaro yose, Dukizwe n'ubuntu bwayo : Izatwambik' imyenda yera.
 

4.Tuzahurira n'abera Ku mugez' ubonerana; Nta kizadutandukanya Kuk' urupfu rutagerayo.
 

5.Nuko, tuzagera vuba Kur' uwo mugezi mwiza, Turirimbane n'abaho Indirimbo zishimishije.

title: 223.Rya Joro Ryatowe  Rubanda
lyrics:
223.Rya Joro Ryatowe  Rubanda Ruryamye Mariya Na Yozefu Basa Bari Maso Barera Akana Kaje Kava Mw’ijuru

2.Rya Joro Ryatowe Intumwa Z’Imana Zamenyesheje Ba Bungeri Icyabonetse Mw’isi Yacu Y’uko Yesu Yavutse

3.Rya Joro Ryatowe Umucyo W’ukuri Twese Waratumurikiye Ng’udukure Mu Byaha Byacu Kuko Yesu Yavutse

4.Rya Joro Ryatowe Rituma Twishima Dufatanye N’abo Mw’ijuru Kuririmbir’akana Yesu Tuti:Shimwa,Mukiza

title: 224.Wasize ubwiza war’ufite mu ijuru
lyrics:
224.Wasiz' ubwiza war'ufite mu ijuru, Ubwo wazaga mw isi, Yesu; No mwivuka ryawe nta hantu hariho Hagutunganiye, Mwami.
 

ref:Ngwin' uze mu mutima wanjye, Umbemo, ndabikwemereye. Ngwin' utahe mu mutima wanjye, Wiboneremw aho kuba. 
 

2.Mbes' abamarayika ntibagushingije, Ubwo wimikwaga, Krisito ? Ariko, Mwami, wicishije bugufi, Utuvukir'utyo mw isi !
 

3.Dor' inyoni yos' igir' aho yarika, Na y' ingunzu ntibur' intaho. Ariko Wowe, Mwami Yesu, wabuze Ah' urambik' umusaya.
 

4.Waj' uzany' Ijambo rizima, Krisito, Ryo kubatur' abantu bawe. Bakwitura kwang' urukundo rwaw'ubwo, Bakumanika ku giti.
 

ref:Ngwin' ube mu mutima wanjye : Nizigiy' urwo rupfu rwawe  Ngwin' utahe mu mutima wanjye : Nizigiy' Umusaraba
 

5. Abari mw ijuru bazagusingiza, Nuza kwima ya ngoma yawe. Nzumv' umbwir' uti: Mfite aho nkugeneye, Ngwino, wimane nanjy' ubu !
 

ref:Bizanezeza cyane Yesu, Ubwo nzumv' ijwi ryawe ryiza ! Bizanezeza cyane, Mukiza; Nzagusingiza, ntahwema!

title: 225.Mw ivuka ryawe, Yesu
lyrics:
225.Mw ivuka ryawe, Yesu, bakuryamishije Mu kiraro kigawa, mu muvure w'inka. Wasasiwe, Mukiza, ahadakwiriye. Nubw' ur' Uwaturemye, ni ko wagiriwe!



2.Nimuze, yemwe bana, tumuhimbarize Ko yaryamishijw' atyo, mu muvure w'inka Dushim' Umwami Yesu, tumukundir' ibyo
 Ko yabay' umukene kubw' abanyabyaha



3.Umfashe, Mwami Yesu, kuguhora hafi. Ngo ngukunde, tuban' iminsi yanjye yose, Kandi n'abandi bana, 
 nabo ubiyereke Bagukunde, dushiman' urukundo rwawe.

title: 226.Mukiza wacu Yesu
lyrics:
226.Mukiza wacu Yesu,tukwakire dute?tukwakire twishimye:ngwin'utwiberemo.wez'imitima
 yacu ,kand'utumenyeshe ingeso nziz'ukunda n'ibikunezeza.

  

2.Wasiz' ibyawe byose,Uza mur'iyi si, Uraduhumuriza Kuko tubabaye. Nta watunyag’ ubwami Bwawe bw'amahoro : Uhor' udutabara, Ukaturokora.



3.wasanze tur' imbohe,Uratubohora, Twar’ ibisenzegeri, Uraducungura, Ngo tub’ intore zawe,
 Duhoran' iteka, Tubone n'ubugingo Butazarangira.



4.Mbe n'iki cyaguteye Kuv’ahw’ Iman’ iri? Nta kindi, n' urukundo N'imbabazi zawe. 
 Ntushak' abanyabyaha Ko bazarimbuka;Byatumy’udutabara,Turababarirwa.

title: 227.Ku rurembo rwa Dawid’Umwami
lyrics:
227.Ku rurembo rwa Dawid' Umwami,Kera harih’ uruhongore; Umwan' ahabikirwa na nyina Mu muvure w’inka warimo. 
 Uwo mwana ni we Yesu, Kandi nyina yitwaga Mariya.



2.Yaje mw is' asig'i We mw’ ijuru,Bamuraza mu ruhongore; Kand'uburiri bwar' umuvure,Nubwo yar’ Umwami wa bose Umukiza wacu wera Yabanye n'aboroheje nka twe.



3.Kand’ akir’ umwana, yubahaga Ababyey ‘akabakorera; Yabagandukiye muri byose;Yabakundaga bihebuje, Natwe, nubwo tur’ abana, Tumere nka Yes’ uko yar’ ari.



4.Yatubereye nk'uworoheje,Kand' ari we Nyir'imbaraga ! Yarakuraga nk'abandi bana :N' icyitegererezo cyacu.We yababaranye natwe; Bituma tunezeranwa na We.



5.Uwo Mwana mwiza wo gukundwa None ni W' utegeka byose ! Azagaruka, twe tumubone,Yes’ Umwami n'Umucunguzi. Kand' ashorera tw’ abana Ngw’ atugeze mw ijuru, tubane.



6.Azaboneker' abamukunda,Atakiri mu ruhongore; Azab’ ari mw’ ijuru ku ngoma, I buryo bw'Iman' ihoraho :Tuzamwikubit’ imbere, Tumusingizany’ iteka ryose.

title: 228.Bahungu,bakobwa,nimuze mwese
lyrics:
228. Bahungu, bakobwa,—Nimuze mwese I Betelehemu—Mu ruhongore; Tureb' ibyo Data—Uri mw ijuru Yaduhaye twese—Mur'iri joro !
 

2. Hamwe n'abashumba,—Dushim’umwami Uryamye mu byatsi—Nk'uworoheje. Dusang’ ababyeyi—Banezerewe; Duhuze n'Intumwa—Kumusingiza.
 

3.Nimupfukamire—Umwami mwiza Uduh’ ubugingo,—Mumuhimbaze ! Muvuze n'impundu—Hamwe n'Intumwa; Mubwire n'abandi—Ibyo mwabonye.
 

4.Twese tumushime,—Wa Mwami mwiza Tumuhimbarize—Kukw adukunda. Dufatanye twese,—Tuvuz’ impundu, Ngw abatamumenye—Baze gukizwa.

title: 229.Abungeri barindaga
lyrics:
229. Abungeri barindaga Intama n'ijoro, marayik' abiyereka  Mu cyubahiro cye.


2. Babony' icyo cyubahiro, Baterwa n'ubwoba, Marayik’ arababwira Ati: Muhumure !
 

3. Nimwumv’ ubu, mbazaniye Inkuru y’byiza :Mu rurembo rwa Dawidi, Havuts' Umukiza.
 

4. Ndabah’ iki kimenyetso;Nuko, murabona : Baryamish’ uruhinja Mu muvure w'inka.
 

5.Amaze kubivug’ atyo, Habonek’ umutwe w’abamarayika benshi, Bahimbaza bati:
 

6. Nukw’ icyubahiro kibe Ku Mana mw’ ijuru,Kand’ ab’ ikunda bo mw’ isi Bahabw' amahoro.

title: 230.Umv’intumwa zo mu ijuru
lyrics:
230.Umv' intumwa zo mw’ ijuru Ziririmbira Yesu. Ziti Iman’ ishimwe cyane : Amahor’ abe mw’ isi: Kuk’ Umwana way’ avutse Uzakiz' abanyabyaha; Yesu n' Umukiza wacu : Yaje kuducungura.



ref:Umv’ intumwa zo mw ijuru Ziririmbira Yesu:



2.Nubwo mu kiraro cy'inka,Arimo wavukiye, Ur’ Iman’ isumba byose: Twese tugusingize.  Tugushime cyane, 
 Yesu : Ur’ Iman’ uri n'umuntu .Ur’ Imanuweli wacu : Imana turi kumwe.



3.Ur' izuba rituvira,Ur' amahoro yacu; Wemeye kuva mw ijuru.ub' umuntu wo gupfa. Watuzaniy’ ubugingo, 
 Ngo tukwizere, tubeho. Tunezererw’ uyu munsi Ko duhaw’ Umukiza,



4.Nuko amoko yos’ ashime Krist' Uwera w'Imana. Hose hose bumvikane  Indirimbo z'ishimwe Amahoro nabe mw isi, Kuk’ Umwami Yes’ avutse. Yesu ni We Nshuti yacu, N’ Umuvunyi duhawe

title: 231.Umwana yavukiye mu murwa
lyrics:
231.Umwana yavukiye  Mu murwa wa Dawidi Ni we Yes' Uwiteka Yadusezeranije.
 

ref:Duhimbaz' uwo munsi Yesu yatuvukiye; Tubyamamaze hose Yuko haj’ umukiza
 

2.Habayehw’abungeri,Babona marayika, Baratinya; naw’ ati : Noneho, mutinyuke !
 

3.Ati : Krist’ Umukiza Yaje mu gihugu cye; Umuremyi wa byose Yavukiye mw’ icumbi !
 

4. Mwana wera, w' Imana, Turagupfukamiye, Tugushimira cyane Yuk’ utujemo, Yesu !

title: 232.Munezero,munezero
lyrics:
232.Munezero, Munezero,Birori bishimisha ! Mu ndirimbo zo mw ijuru, Dushyiremo n'izacu Yesu yaje kudukiza, 
 Tumuhawe n'Uwiteka : Munezero, Munezero, Birori bishimisha !



2.Munezero, Munezero,Imitim’ inezerwe ! Tumwitabe,tumwitabe,Yes’aduhamagara .Dukunze kw’ aturokora, 
 Tureke kubirazika : Munezero, Munezero, Imitim’ inezerwe !



3. Munezero, Munezero,Jyan’ ishimwe ku mana! Amahoro n'amahoro Ni ko  Intumwa zivuga. Yesu ni w' uhira bose :

 twese tumuririmbire : Munezero,Munezero, Jyan’ ishimwe ku Mana !

title: 233.Yemwe bungeri ba kera
lyrics:
233.Yemwe, bungeri ba kera, Mutubwir' ibya Yesu, Ibyo mwabonye rya joro, Igihe yavukaga.



ref:Shimwa Rurema !Shimwa Rurema,  Shimwa, Rurema, shimwa ! Wow’ usumba byose. 
 Shimwa Rurema !Shimwa, Rurema!  Shirmwa, Rurema, shimwa! Amahoro abe mu isi !



2. Twar’ aho turaririye Umukumbi n'ijoro. Maze, tugubwa gitumo N'urangurur' aty' ati:
 

3.Marayik' aratubwira, At' i Betelehemu Habavukiy’ Umukiza : Ni We Mwami Krisito!
 

4.Uwo mwanya, haz' umutwe W'ingabo zo mw ijuru, Zigoswe n'umucyo mwinshi; Zirasingiza ziti:
 

5.Natwe turahaguruka,Tujy’ i Betelehemu, Dusangayo rwa Ruhinja, Ni ko kurushima, ngo :
 

6. Bungeri turabashimye; Byose turabyumvise. Tujye kumusanga natwe, Tumusingize  tuti :

title: 234.Inkuru nziza yavuye mw  ijuru
lyrics:
234.Inkuru nziza yavuye mw ijuru Yazanywe no kuduhumuriza; Igaragazwa n'Umwami w'urukundo Wavukiy’ abanyabyaha bose
 

2.Uwo wa muhanuzi yahanuye,Akamubwiririz’ amahoro, N’ Umwami Yesu watuvukiye twese : Tumuririmbire n'iri joro !
 

3.Ajy'adutera kwiringira rwose,Adusezeranir' amahoro, N'abafit' imtim' ihagaz' iganya, Abibuka ngw abah’ ubugingo.
 

4.Dushime twes'Umucunguzi wacu Kw atadutinye tw' abanyabyaha! Kand’ubuntu bwe budukomeza mw isi. Tumwitabish’ imitim' ikunze

title: 235.Bakritso,nimuze,munezerwe
lyrics:
235. Bakristo, nimuze, munezerwe mwese, Nimuze, tugeran' i Betelehemu. Muze kureb' Umwami wahavukiye!
 

ref:Nimuze, tumusenge ( x 3) Ni Kristo Yesu.
 

2. Imana Rurema, nubw’ isumba byose, Ntiyanze kubyarwa n'uwo woroheje. ryaturemye, dor’ uko yamanutse !
 

3. Muririmbe cyane, bamarayika mwese, Mut’ Isumba byos’ ihabw’ icyubahiro, Kand’ amahor’ abe mu bo yishimira !
 

4. Tuje kukuramya, Mwami Yes’ uvutse, Tuje kugusingiza, Mukiza Yesu, Nubw’ ur’ Imana, none turaturanye.

title: 236.Umukiza wac'ubwo yavukaga
lyrics:
236.Umukiza wac' ubwo yavukaga,Nta cumbi yabonye, keretse mu nka. Nubwo bamuhej' i Betelehemu, Twe kumwim' icumbi: twe, tumwakire!
 

2.Marayika yaj' asang' abungeri; Izo nkuru nziz' azibabariye, Bagend' uwo mwanya kumusingiza. Natwe twe gutinda, tumusingize.
 

3.Na ba banyabweng’ aho baboneye Ya nyenyer' irang' Umwami Krisito. Bamusanze vuba, ihayobora, Bamutur' ibyiza bamuzaniye.
 

4. Ko nd' umwana muto, namutur' iki ? Simfit' izahabu nk'abanyabwenge, Nta n'intama mfite, nka ba bungeri. Mfite kimwe gusa : muh' umutima!

title: 237.Tur'abami bayobotse
lyrics:
237.Tur' abami bayobotse, Tuje ngo turabukire Uyu Mwam' usumba byose, Dukurikiy' inyenyeri.
 

ref:Ye... we. . Wa nyenyeri nziza we, Komez' utuyobore, Tujy' imbere; gumy' ugende, Tuger' ahw Umwami ari!
 

2.Nje gutur' Umwami Yesu, Nzany' izi zahabu nziza. Ni We nyir'isi n'ijuru, N' Umwami w'abami bose.
 

3.Nje gutur' Umwami Yesu, Nzany' iyi mibavu myiza : Byerekana yukw atwumva, iyo tumusenze hose.
 

4.Nje gutur' Umwami Yesu, Nzany' ishangi rihumura : Byerekana yukw azapfa Mu cyimbo cy'abanyabyaha.
 

5.Tuje kugushengerera :Ur' Umwami n'Umukiza. Akir' amaturo yacu, Mucunguzi, Nyirigira

title: 238.Kera har'abungeri mu gihugu
lyrics:
238.Kera har' abungeri mu gihugu cyera, Bumv' inkuru y'ibyiza ko Yes' avutse. ku musozi n'ijoro,bumv' amajwi menshi Y'ingabo zo mw ijuru, zishima, ziti : 



ref:Noel! Noel! Noel ! Noel! Havuts' Umwami w' Isirayeri !



2.Mu gihugu cya kure, har' abanyabwenge. Bahishurirw' ikintu cyabatangaje. Babony' ikimenyetso cy'inyenyeri nini, Kibarangir'aho Yesu yavukiye.



3.Nukw Iman' iberetse k' Umukiza yaje, Bajy' ahw ar' uwo mwanya ngo bamusenge. Baramupfukamira,bamutur' ibyiza : By'izahabu n'icyome n'ishangi nayo.



4.Natwe tumusang' ubu; n' Umukiza wacu; Yaj' aciye bugufi kubwac' ababi. Nyuma, ku Musaraba, 
 yaradupfiriye, Aduhongerera ngo tutarimbuka.



5.Nuko, umushimire ko yatuvukiye, Tumutur' imitima yac' imenetse. Uyu munsi wa none, yonger' avukire Mu mitima ya benshi, bamushimishe.

title: 239.Nkuko ba banyabwemge
lyrics:
239.Nkuko ba banyabwenge Barebye ya nyenyeri, Bakayikurikira N'umunezero mwinshi, Natwe twifuze dutyo Kureb' Umwami Yesu.
 

2.bo batebutse vuba gushak'urwo ruhinja; bararupfukamira,ni rwo Mwami w'ijuru;natwe dushake Yesu twiboner'Umukiza
 

3.Bah' Umwan' amaturo Y'igiciro kinini; Baramurabukira, Urut'ab'isi bose : Natwe tugire dutyo, Duhe Yes' imitima.
 

4.Yes' Uwera w'Imana, Uturindir' iteka Mu nzira yaw' ifunganye; Hanyum' uzatujyane Mu bwami bwo mw ijuru, Ah' umwijim' utaba.
 

5.Abo mw ijuru bose, Nta tabaza bifuza : Ni Wowe mucyo waho N'izuba ritarenga. Yes' uzatujyaneyo, Tuguhimbaz' iteka.

title: 240.Wa mwanya mu Getsemani
lyrics:
240.Wa mwanya mu Getsemani Sinawibagirwa, Ubwo wabirag' ibyuya Bisa n'amaraso.
 

ref:Sinibagirw' amakuba Wabonye kubwanjye. Wunamye n'umubabaro Ur' i Getsemani.
 

2.Wari mu biti n'ijoro Kubw’ibyaha byanjye Byaragushenjaguye pe : N’urubanza rwaniye.
 

3.Intumwa zagusizeyo, S’arakuzinukwa. Natwe nta bwo twashobora Kubigereranya.


4. N’ubona ko mbyibagiwe,Yes’uzanyibutse Bya byuya byawe wabize Kubwanjye, kubwanjye !

title: 241.Mbes'uriy'ubabaye
lyrics:
241.Mbes’uriy’ubabaye,  Wambay’ibitabutse Birihw amaraso ye, Mutubwir’uw' ari we. Dor’ukunt' 
 ananiwe N’igiti yikoreye ! Ko yaboshywe nabi se, Ninde kand’aziz’iki ?



2. Uwo munt' ubay’atyo Niwe Nyir'ubugingo. Ibicumuro byawe Ni byo bamujijije. We kujarajar’utyo:

 Sang’Uwagupfiriye; Pfukam’i Gologota, Wihan' ubabarirwe.



3. Dor’amahw' asongoye Ni yo kamba yambitswe, Kand’intebe y'ubwami Yabay’ Umusaraba.

 Mbes’Umwam' ugizw’atyo, Namumenyeshwa n’iki ? Soma icyo kirego, ngo Yesu w'i Nazareti.



4. Umva Yes’avug' ati: Nshuti yanjy’umenye ko Icyankuye mw ijuru ar’ukukubeshaho. 
 Ni wowe mbabarizwa, Bakanshinyagurira. Emera nkurokore, Nkuzuze n’Iman’ubu.



5. Ndakwihaye, Krisito, Byos’ubimbabarire, Umpumur’umenyeshe Imibabaro yawe. 
 Non’ inzir’undangira Niyo nzajya nyuramo, Nger’i Wawe mw ijuru, Nzahore ngusingiza !

title: 242.Mwana w'Imana
lyrics:
242.Mwana w'Imana, mbega wakoz’iki,Cyatumy’ucirw’iteka iy’ababi ? Impamvu n'iki yaguteye gupfa ?Uyitubwire, turakwinginze.



2. Wapfuy' urupfu rw'abagome, Mwami
 Uhemurwa, ushinyagurirwa. Ntangajwe n'uko wemeye kubambwa, Upfa nab’utyo ku Musaraba.



3.Ayo makuba wayatewe n'iki ?
 N’ibyaha byanjye bakujijije ! Ni jye wapfiriye, nd’umunyabyaha : Sinkwiriy’izo mbabazi zawe!



4. Nta cyaha wigeze gukora, Yesu :
 Ubuntu bwawe burantangaza  Ibyaha byanjye bitagir’ingano Warabyikorey’ urandokora.



5.  Reka ngushimir' ubwo buntu bwinshi !
 Nariha nte kubabara kwawe? Akir’ubwenge bwanjye n'ubugingo. Sinkir’uwanjye: waranshunguye

title: 243.Umunyamibabaro
lyrics:
243.Umunyamibabaro n’ izina rintangaza Ry’Umwana w’Uwiteka: Tumushime, n’ Umukiza!
 

2. Yemeye guhemurwa No gushinyagurirwa, Apfir’ abanyabyaha:Tumushime, n’Umukiza!
 

3. Twatsinzwe n'urubanza : We nta kibi yakoze, Yatuberey’inshungu :Tumushime, n’Umukiza

title: 244.Har'umusozi wakure
lyrics:
244.Har' umusozi wa kure Hafi y'ururembo, Ah’ Umukiza yabambwe Watubabarijwe. 
 

2.Ntabwo twabasha kumenya Uko yababajwe! Twizeye gusa kw’ari twe Twatumy’ apfa nabi.
 

3.Ni cyo cyatumy’ ibyaha byacu Byos’ uko bingana Bikurwaho n’Uwiteka, Tukazaban’ i We,
 

4.Nta wundi wabasha kuba Inshungu y'Ibyaha; Ni we watwugururiye irembo ry'ijuru
 

 5.Nuk’ubwo yadukunz’ atyo,Natwe tumukunde, Twiringir’amaraso ye, tumwumvire rwose.

title: 245.Iyo nibwiye mu mutima
lyrics:
245. Iyo nibwiye mu mutima Igit’ Umwami yatangiyeho,Nzinukw' ibyo niratanaga; Mbireba nk'ibitariho rwose.
 

2.Sinkirat’ikindi, Mukiza, Keretse ko wankunz’ ukamfira;Ndeke n'ibyo nishimiraga, Ngushimir' uko wanyitangiye.
 

3.Ishavu n'ibambe bivanze Byavuye mu mutima wa Yesu;Mbese har’ undi Mwami  nka we Wateg’ ikamba nk'iryo ry'amahwa ?
 

4.Mwam’ Iyo mba mfit’ isi yose, Nkemera kuyitanga h' ubwishyu,Nta bwo yarangiza na hato Kwishyur' umwenda wanjy’ ukomeye.
 

5.Urwo rukundo wankunz' utyo Rukwiriye kuntangisha byose,Ibyanjye n'umutima wanjye, Bikab' ibyaw’ ukabitegeka.

title: 246.I Gologota,ku giti
lyrics:
246.I Gologota, ku Giti, Ni ho Yesu yabambwe; Yabambiwe kugira Ngo tubone kudapfa.
 

2.Yes’ amaze kunesha, Avug’ ijwi rirenga, Abivuga yeruye,Ati: Birarangiye !
 

3.Amaze kuvug’ atyo, Aherakw arunama, Yunamishwa n’ibyaha Byanjye nanze kwihana. 
 

4.none ansabye imbabazi,nihane,mukureyo,mumanure ku giti,aruhuke umutima.
 

5.abantu batihana bongeye kumubamba,n'umuruho munini,umubabaza iteka.
 

6.twari twararuhijwe,twiganyira,twihebye,none turaruhutse:Yesu ni uburuhukiro
 

7.nuko abishwe n'ibyaha,ni muhunge,mukire muze,mubikurwemo:Yesu ni uburuhukiro
 

8.Mukiza,ndakwihaye ni wowe wantaruye,uko nzaba ndi kose,Yesu,nzagusingiza.

title: 247.Unyigishe Mukiza
lyrics:
247.unyigishe Mukiza,Iby’ Umusaraba   N'icyatumy’ uza mw isi,Ukatubambirwa. Umenyeshe umumaro
 W'umunyabyah’ umwe, Umbwire n'igiciro Wanshungurishije !



2.Unyigishe n'impamvu  Y'isok’ itukura Yo mu rubavu rwawe,Urwo bacumise, Ari jye gusa mw isi: Wacumuy’ Imana, 
 Uba warayavuye Ngw’amber’ impongano.



3.unyerek'urukundo rutarondoreka rwamanutse i kuzimu ku bwacu abihebe uyu mutim'ukonje wuzuy'inarijye
 ,uwatsemwo urukundo ruva i Gologota



4.unyigishe,Mukiza:ndi umunyabyaha pe icyantabara,mwami ni ubuntu bwonyine Yesu ni jy'ugukennye:
 mu bo wapfiriye b'abanyabyaha babi,ni jyewe ukabije



5.Mukiza wanjye,Yesu ni wowe nizeye maze ubwo umpamagaye,ndakwiyeguriye none ubwo unyakiriye,njye

 nshima imbabazi na rwa rukundo unkunda,mbivuge ndinde mfa.

title: 248.Hafi y'umusaraba
lyrics:
248.Hafi y'Umusaraba,aho ntura iteka,niho mperwa ku buntu amazi y'ubugingo.
 

ref:nirata umusaraba kugeza ubwo nzaba mbonye uburuhukiro hakurya y'uruzi


2.nahageze nshobewe,nsinzwe n'urubanza,Yesu arambabarira,angotesha urukundo
 

3.mwami Yesu unyibutse uwo musaraba,kugira ngo ngendere mu gicucu cyawo.
 

4.Ni w’utuma nemera Kwang' iby'isi rwose, Kukw ariw’unkundisha Yesu wamfiriye.
 

5.Hafi y'Umusaraba, Ni ho ntur’iteka, Ntegerej’ igihe cyo Kwambuka rwa Ruzi.

title: 249.Nitegerej'umusaraba
lyrics:
249.Nitegerej’Umusaraba Wo Yesu yadupfiriyeho, Nywubonye, ndamutakambira Ngw ambabarire.
 

ref:Yes’umwami ahimbazwe izina rye ryogezwe  Yanyogesheje amoroso ye: Yes’ahimbazwe.
 

2.Iman’ ishimwe kukw inkiza Imbaraga z'ibyaha zose. Bituma Yes’ambamo neza, Akantunganya.
 

3.Ya soko nziza yoz' ibyaha, Nejejwe n'uko nayinjiyemo; Ni yo Yes’ahor’ankirisha; Ni y’ anyejesha.
 

4.Ngwino kw isoko ngari nziza ! Ca bugufi, wa mutindi we! Jya ku birenge by'Umukiza,Ngw agutunganye.

title: 250.Shimwa,Mwami Yesu
lyrics:
250.Shimwa,Mwami Yesu,—Ko wamviriye Amaraso yawe—Ku Musaraba.
 

2.Mur' ayo maraso,—Ni mo mbonera I neza n'ubuntu—No gusugira.
 

3.Umugezi wayo—Ni w' uboneza Abawibiramo—Ntibarimbuke.
 

4.Ibuk' ay'Aberi—Ko yatakiye Imana ngw ihore—Uyavushije.
 

5.Nyamar' aya Yesu—Ajy' ansabira Uwitek’Imana—Kumbabarira.
 

6.Iy’aminjagiwe—K’uwacumuye, Satan’ aratinya,—Agahamuka !
 

7.Non’abari mw isi—Tuyasingize ! Namwe mwikirize,—Bamarayika !
 

8.Ab’Imana twese—Turangurure, Dushim’ amaraso— Yaducunguye !

title: 251.Munsi y'umusaraba
lyrics:
251.Munsi y’Umusaraba W’Umukiza Yesu Ni ho nifuza rwose Guhora mpagaze N’ibuye ry’igitare
 Rimber’ igicucu Rinkiz’ impagarara Mu rugendo rwanjye



2.Uwo Musaraba we Wabay’ ihuriro Ry’ukuri n’urukundo By’Iman’ ihoraho Unyibutsa za nzozi
 Yakobo yarose Umbereye nk’urwego Rugenza mw’ ijuru 



3.Hirya y’Umusaraba Mbonay’ umworera N’umunwa w’i kuzimu Wakamw’ umuriro
 Nyamar’ imbere yawo Har’ Umusaraba Uteze nk’amaboko Ng’unkize, ntagwayo



4.Kur’ uwo musaraba Ndasa n’ushobora Kureba yesu abambwe Ari jy’ apfiriye
 Ndatangaye Mukiza Ntiwar’ ukwiriye Kungirir’ iryo bambe Jye waguhemuye!



5.Munsi y’Umusaraba Nzagumay’ iteka,  Naho nabur’ ibyanjye Nywubonamw’ inyungu
 Nta soni mfit’ uretse Iz’ ibyaha byanjye Nzajya nirata gusa Uwo Musaraba!

title: 252.Yes'Umucunguzi
lyrics:
252.Yes' Umucunguzi—Yashyizwe mu mva; Yategerezaga—Igihe cye.



ref:Ku wa gatatu arazuka, Az' atsinz' urupfu n'Umubi: Ava mu mwijima yabinesheje. Yimanye mw ijuru n'abacunguwe. 
 Yarazutse ! Yarazutse ! Tumushime ! Ariho !	



2.Barindiy' ubusa—Umwami wacu; Bakingiy' ubusa—Cya gituro.



3.Ingoyi z'urupfu—Yaraziciye, Ntizamuheranye :—Yavuyemo !

title: 253.Haleluya!Haleluya!
lyrics:
253.
 a. Haleluya ! Haleluya ! Haleluya !
 

1.Yesu yarangij' intambara Kuko yanesheje Satani. Tunezerwe, tumusingize !Haleluya !
 

2.Imbaraga z'urupfu zose Ni We wazinesheje rwose.Tuvuz' impundu, twishimane :Haleluya!
 

3.Kuri wa munsi wa gatatu, Yazuts' afit' icyubahiro; Non'ubu yimanye n'Imana :Haleluya!
 

4.Non' udukiz' ibyaha byacu, N'urubori rw'urupfu na rwo, Tubeho, turirimba, tuti:Haleluya !



b. Haleluya ! Haleluya ! Haleluya !
 

1.Hashimw' Uwatuzukiye ! Kukw avuye mu gituro;Duhuze hamwe,—Twishime tuti: Haleluya !
 

2.Yesu, waradupfiriye,ub' Umwam' ubahw iteka. Uradukunda;—Uradushaka : Haleluya !
 

3.Uri mu bwiza bw'ijuru, Uhadutegerereje Udushakisha—Ubuntu bwawe :Haleluya !
 

4.Tuguh' imitima yacu, Uyitware, Mwami Yesu,Ikwishimire—Iminsi yose : Haleluya !

title: 254.Nimureb'igitangaza
lyrics:
254.Nimureb’igitangaza: wa munyamubabaro yanesheje wa mugome;tumukomer’ amashyi:Haleluya,Haleluya Tumwimike, n ‘umwami



2.Tumuh' ikamba ry'ubwiza,Ngo tumushengerere. Tumuh' Intebe y'ubwami.Twese tuvuz' Impundu :Haleluya, Haleluya  ni we Nyir'imbaraga 



3. Mwambur' Ikamba ry'amahwa Bamwambitse baseka. Mwambik' Ikamba ry'Ubwami,Mwemere kw ar' Umwami.Haleluya, Haleluya  Tegeka,Nyir'ingabo 



4.Vuz’ Impundu, rangurura : Yanesheje Satani. Ari mu twicarabami, Tumukurir' ubwatsi. Haleluya,Haleluya ni We Mwami w'abami.

title: 255.Yesu Kristo yarazutse
lyrics:
255. Yesu Kristo yarazutse : Twese tumushime : Haleluya Uyu munsi, tunezerwe,Twese tumushime : Haleluya 
 Kera ku Musaraba, Ni ho Yesu yatubabarijwe, Ngw ab' impongano y'ibyaha byacu : Haleluya, reka tumuhimbaze 



2.Yes’ Umwami wo mw’ Ijuru, Twese tumushime:Haleluya  Kukw ar’ umukiza w’abo mw’isi,Yarabambw’arahambwa 
 Ajya n’i kuzimu mu bapfuye.Maz’arabinesh’ava mu rupfu Haleluya, reka tumuhimbaze 



3.Ibyo yababajwe byose, Umukiza wac' abishimirwe Ni byo byonyine byatumye Tugir' ubugingo budashira.
 None, yimye mw ijuru, Ahw abamarayika baririmba, Tumusingizanye na bo, tuti : Haleluya, reka tumuhimbaze.

title: 256.Yesu Krist'arazutse
lyrics:
256.Yesu Krist' arazutse : None ntidutiny' urupfu,Kuko yarunesheje, Nta butware rugifite.Haleluya 
		 
2.Non' urupfu n' irembo Ry'ubugingo budashira.ibyo bidutinyure, Ni tujya kurinyuramo.Haleluya 
		  
3.Yesu wadupfiriye Ariho : natwe tubeho Tumushimish' ingeso. Ni We Databuj' iteka.Haleluya 
		  
4.Ariho : nta cyabasha Kudutandukanya na We.Aturindira hose, Akagez' iteka ryose.Haleluya 
		  
5.Turi mu maboko ye : Koko, nta wamutunyaga Naho yaba Satani, Cyangw' ibyago, cyangw' urupfu.Haleluya 
		  
6.Ariho : ni We Mwami W'ijuru n'isi wenyine;Tuzajy' aho yagiye, Duhorane na W' iteka.Haleluya

title: 257.Shimwa,Mukiza
lyrics:
257. Shimwa, Mukiza—Utuzukiye  Tuguhimbarize—Ko wanesheje  ,Imana yashatse—Mu gihe cyayo,Gutsindish  'urupfu—Umucunguzi.

ref:Shimwa, Mukiza—Utuzukiye Tuguhimbarize—Ko wanesheje 

2. Nimumurebe :—Ni We, ni Yesu Mwe gushidikanya :—Ni We Shobuja  Munezerwe mwese,—Bantu b'Umwami, Nimuvuge, muti :—Yatuzukiye 

3. Nta cyo ngitinya :—Yesu ntagipfa Niwe mpora nshima:—N' uw'amahoro. Aramfash' iteka;—Arankomeza Mu kubaho kwanjye,—Nta cyo ngitinya.

title: 258.Umwami yazutse
lyrics:
258 . Umwami yazutse ! inkuru yasakaye.Mw ijuru no mw isi, Bashim' Umukiza. Yaganduye byose, Kuko yadupfiriye. Turatunganiwe : Umwami yazutse 

2. Ntugir’ icyutinya: Umucunguz’ ariho Wizer’ ukomeje:Arakurengera Utowe na Yesu: witiny’ aragushaka;Yarakwishyuriye Umwami yazutse 

3. Twebw’ abacunguwe Tuzava mu bituro; Azadukangura, Aduh' ubugingo. Kandi hamwe na We Tuzicara kwa Data Mu bwiza bw'iteka. Umwami yazutse

4. Noneho, nimuze : Twih' Umukiza wacu Dukundane nka We, Tub' abera nka We. Ubwo turi mw isi,Tumwigane, tubeho, Turindir' ijuru. Umwami yazutse

title: 259.ubu tunezerwe
lyrics:
259.Ubu tunezerwe Kuk' umubabaro n'ibyaha bishize. Umukiza wacu N'ukuri, ni muzim'ubu  Yarazutse 
	
ref:Kuko ntabw' imva ye Yaherany' umurambo we None twiringiye Ko Yes'uwo yazutse Yazutse Yazutse Yazutse  N'ukuri, ni muzima 
		  
2.Umunt' iy’ apfuye, Aruhuk' umubir' igihe gitoya;Arindir' umunsi Abapfa bose bazava mu bituro.
		  
3.Urupfu n'ubwoba,Yesu yarabineshej' arabihamba. Yes' aradukunda : Abana natwe, turiho no mu rupfu.

title: 260.kuri wa munsi tuzazukaho
lyrics:
260.Kuri wa munsi tuzazukaho, Yes' azaduh' imibiri mishya;Kurira no kuboroga Ntabwo bizaba bikiriho.
		 
2.Ubu bugingo n'uyu mubiri Ntabwo byabura gutandukana.None, mubiri, sinzira, Urindir' uwo munsi mwiza.
		  
3.Uyu mubiri waruhanyaga Ni wo turambitse mu butaka;Nuk' ubugingo bwonyine Bwazamutse, bujya mw ijuru.
		  
4.Ubu bugingo n'uyu mubiri iherezo, bizasubirana, Bihabw' ishusho ya Yesu; Ntibizatandukan' ukundi.
		  
5.Mbeg' umunezero mwinshi cyane ! Koko mw izuka, tuzishima pe Ni hw imva zose zo mw isi Zizashiramw abapfu bazo
		  
6.Maz' ababyeyi n'abana babo N’ abavandimwe batandukanye N’abishwe n’urukumbuzi Bazabonanira mw ijuru.
		  
7.Bazabanayo mu bwami bwawe;Bazaba batagitandukana Kubw’umusaraba wawe,Uzadusohozeyo natwe.

title: 261.bene data mwese
lyrics:
261.Bene data mwe mwese,ni muze dufatanye ibi byago tubonye tubisangire
		 
ref:Kubakunzi b’ Imana ,Amahoro n’ibyago birafatanya Kuzana ibyiza
		  
2.iyi nshuti ya twese None yadukuwemo. Yadufashaga cyane :Ni y' ituriza.
		  
3.Twibuk' imihati ye N'uko yakiranutse No kwitanga kwe kose No gutinyuka.
		  
4.Twese yatugiriye Umumaro w'ukuri, Kandi yatuyoboye Mu byo gukizwa.
		  
5.Twagira ngw azab' ino imyaka myinshi cyane, Ariko kuva mw isi Kwari kugeze.
		  
6.imigambi y'Imana Si nk'ibyo twibwiraga. Non' ubw' ibitegetse, Turabyemeye

title: 262.umva gusaba  kwanjye
lyrics:
262. Umva gusaba kwanjye, Mwuka w'imbaraga  Shyir' ububasha bwawe Mu mutima wanjye. Mwuka Wera, hishura ibyaha bindimo; Mpesh' ubugingo bushya, ibyaha bimvemo. 

2.Za mu mutima wanjye Mbese, nabaho nte, Ntagufite ng' umbemo? Najya nizera nte ? Mwuka, nyobora neza :Nzajya nkwemerera; Ump' ubugingo bushya N'umutima mwiza.

3.Ne kongera gutinya iby'Umwanzi mubi, Kuk' ukunda kumfasha,Ukampa kunesha. Mwuka, nyemez' ibyawe Mu mutima wanjye; Uwuzuz' ubugingo No kunesha byose

title: 263.Mwuka wer'udukunda
lyrics:
263. Mwuka Wer' udukunda Ni Wow' ujy'utwigisha Kwifuz’ impan' imwe nsa irut' izindi.

2. iyo mpan' ihebuje N' urukundo rwa Yesu. Kand' umunt' uyibuze, Nta cy' ab'amaze.

3. Urukundo ni rwiza; Rujya rugira neza; Nta n'ishyari rugira; Ntirwirarira.

title: 264.Mwuka wera wo mu ijuru
lyrics:
264.Mwuka Wera wo mu ijuru, Mugabyi w'ubugingo we. Manuka, turakwinginze, Sang' imitim' ikwifuza.

2.Utwerek' uko tur' uku, Ko twishwe n'ibicumuro; Utwereke na Krisito, Ukw ari n'ukw arokora.

3.Dore, turakwiragije, Kuk' uz' ibidukwiriye; Tumaremw ibyaha byacu, Utwerek' Umucunguzi.

4.Twikish' umuriro wawe imyand' ubonye muri twe, Nk'ishyari, nko kwihimbaza, N'ibindi byangwa na Yesu.

5.Uduh' ubuntu bwa Yesu, N'ineza n'amahoro bye, Uduhe n'urukundo rwe. No kumuyobok' iteka.

6. Rwanga n'iby'isoni nke; Ntirwishakir' ibyarwo; Rwemera gufashanya; Ntirurakara.

7.Kand' ibyaha by'abandi. Ntabwo rubyishimira, Kuko runezererwa ibitunganye.

8.Rwihanganira byose; Rwizigira n'abandi; Nta n'ikibi rukeka Ku muntu wese.

9. Kwizera, kwiringira, Cyane cyan' urukundo, Ni zo mpano z'iteka, Ukw ar' eshatu.

10. Ni zo mpano nifuza, Mwuka Wera w'Imana; Ariko kurutaho, Ump' urukundo.

title: 265.ubwo Yesu yaragiye gusig'abantu be
lyrics:
265.Ubwo Yesu yar'agiye Gusig' abantu be, Ngw azamuk' ajye mw ijuru Ku Mana Se
		 
2.Yasezeranye kubaba Umwuka we Wera, Ngw ahumuriz' ayobore Aba Yesu.
		  
3.Yiturira mu mutima W' umuntu wihannye; Asukamw urukundo rwe N'amahoro.
		  
4.ijwi rye ryongorerera imbere muri twe, Rikaduhendahenda ngo Dutinyuke.
		  
5.ibyiza dukora byose Ni W' ubidutera : Ni W' udutekereresha ibya Yesu.Mwuk' ureban' imbabazi  intege nke zacu, Udutungany' imitima, Uyibemo.

title: 266.Man'ubwami bwawe
lyrics:
266.Man' ubwami bwawe—Buze mur'iyi si  Tsind' Umurimbuzi,—Wic' ubutware bwe.
		  
2.Mwami, dukumbuye —iyo ngoma yawe.Usimbuz' ineza—inzangano z'isi.
		   
3.Turagukumbuye —Ngwin' uc' intambara.Uce n'ingeso mbi,— Zos' uzimareho.
		   
4.Zana n’imbaraga;_Uz’uduhembure.Turakurindira;_Amas’ahezeyo.
		   
5.Dor' ukw amasega—Amarahw intama, Kandi hagwiriye—Abatakwitaho.
		   
6.Amahanga yose—Ari mu mwijima; Yesu, wa zuba we—Non' uz' uyavire

title: 267.Imitim'ikomezwano kwiringira
lyrics:
267.Imitim' ikomezwa No kwiringira cyane Ko Yes' azagaruka.Azaza vuba, ntazatinda. Tuzagir’ ibyishimo. Yes'ubw' uzagaruka.

2.Kand' abo twakundaga, iyo tubapfushije, Tukababara cyane,iryo ni ryo ritwiringiza  Turorere kurira : N’aza, tuzabonana 
		   
3.Ni tugir' amakuba, N'ibyo kutunaniza, Twe gukuk' imitima Mw isi s' i wacu : duhumure  N'ibyo kwihanganirwa Kugez' ahw azazira.

4.Tugeze ku meza ye,Dusangir' urwibutso Rw'umutsima na vino; Bisur' ameza yo mw ijuru : Ni ko tuzasangira NaW' ubw' azagaruka.

title: 268.Ubw'umwami Yes'azaza
lyrics:
268.Ubw' Umwami Yes' azaza Kwend' abo yatoye, Ab' akunda b'abatoni, Bamuyobotse. 
		   
ref:Bazaka nk'inyenyeri Zitatse kw ikamba rye; Bazatangaza cyane, Bakize rwose.
		    
2.Ubw' azaz' akorany' abo Yatoye ba hose, Bera baboneye rwose, B'abatoni be.
		    
3.Yemwe bantu, yemwe bantu,bakund' Umukiza, Ni mw' akunda. ni mw' akunda Nk'abatoni be.

title: 269.Yesu n'az'umwijim'uzahunga
lyrics:
269.Yesu n' az' umwijim' uzahunga. Kand’urupfu na rwo ruzashira; Nta n'uzac' ukundi mu gicucu Cya cya Gikombe kibi.
		   
ref:Dukumbuye Yesu cyane ! icyaduh' akaza vuba Tuzishima twese, Yesu naza gukorany' intore ze 
		    
2. Yesu n' az' azac' umuborogo; Azamara mw is' umubabaro; Azahanagur' amarir' ubwo Kuri tw' abakunzi be.
		    
3.Yesu n' az' impundu zizavuga, Aje kudukorany' intore ze. Azatwakiran' umunezero, Tuban' akaramata

title: 270.uwadupfiriye kera
lyrics:
270 .Uwadupfiriye kera Azaz' ava mw ijuru; Umwam' azamanukana N'aber' inzovu nyinshi.Haleluya, Haleluya ! Umukiz' azagaruka 
		   
2.Azaboneker' abantu Bos' afit' ubwiza bwe. Kand' abamusuzuguye, Bakamubamba kera, Bazaboroga bamenye Yukw ari Kristo w'ukuri.
		    
3.Kand' inkovu z'imbereri Azaza zikiriho, Kand' abacunguwe bose Bazazinezererwa. Mwam' ubwo tuzazireba, ibyishimo bizatwica.
		    
4.Nuko twese tugusenge, Yes' ushyizwe hejuru  End' icyubahiro cyose, im' ingoma, n' iyawe! Haleluya, Haleluya! Ni Wowe Mwami wenyine 

4. Noneho, nimuze : Twih' Umukiza wacu Dukundane nka We, Tub' abera nka We. Ubwo turi mw isi,Tumwigane, tubeho, Turindir' ijuru. Umwami yazutse

title: 271.ubw'impanda z'Uwiteka zizavuzwa
lyrics:
271.Ubw' impanda z'Uwiteka zizavuzwa mw ijuru, Habay’urya munsi mwiz' uhebuje, Abakijijwe bo mwisi bose bazamwitaba,Abakoranirije mw ijuru rye.

ref:Ubw' aza... z' ahamaga.. .ra, Amazi.. .na y'abe bo.. .se, Mu Gita.. .bo cy'ubugi.. .ngo, Nzi ko nzumv' izina ryanjye, nkitaba.

2.Uwo munsi, hazazurw' abapfiriye muri We, Bave mu bituro nk'Umucunguzi. Bazahurira mw ijuru n'abazaba bariho . Nzaba mpari nanjye—sinzaburayo 


3.Yesu. Databuja, nzamukorera, ntacogora:Nkwiz' ubuntu n'urukund' amfitiye.Maz' imirimo yo mw is' ajy'ampa,ni nyirangiza.Azampamagar’ angeze mw ijuru.

title: 272.Umwam'ageze kw irembo
lyrics:
