272.Umwam' ageze kw irembo, Wabambwe ku Musaraba; Yaje kudukorany' abe,Tubane mw ijuru.
 

ref:Kw irembo  Kw irembo ! Ub' ari kw irembo! Nukw araje, nukw araje, Kand' ageze kw irembo.
 

2.Ibyerekana kuza kwe Birihuta kuboneka : Agiye kutugabira Kubaho kw'iteka.
 

3.Ntihazabur' intambara; Ntabw' amahor' azahora. Keretse Yes' atsembyeho Urupfu n'ibyaha.
 

4.Maze, mw isi yagizwe nshya, Tuzahaba, dusugire, Kudapfa kwakuye gupfa,Tutakibabara.

title: 273.dukanguke,dukanguke
lyrics:
273.Dukanguke, dukanguke ! Dukor' imirimo cyane, Twitange, tub' igitambo Cyo guhimbaz' Uwiteka.

2.Kera twagirag' ubute; None, reka tubwihane, Dukorer' Imana yacu, Dufit' umwet' ukwiriye.
 
3. Ahar' uyu muns' urupfu Rwaza, rukadutungura. Cyangwa Yesu yagaruka. Bisange dukiranutse 

4.Twang' uburiganya bwose, Twibuke yuk' Uwiteka Areb' ibyo mu mitima Kand' atagir' icy' ahishwa.
 
5.Nkukw Imana yaduhaye izuba ryo kutuvira, Tumurikir' abafite Umwijima mu mitima.
 
6.Dukanguke, tuyishime, Turirimban' indirimbo N'abayishimir' iteka Mw ijuru no mw isi yose.
 
7.Mukiza, turakangutse ! Utwuzuz' Umwuka wawe. Dushimish' Imana yacu Amagambo n'imirimo.

title: 274.Mukiza,tuguhaye uyu munsi
lyrics:
274.Mukiza, tuguhaye Uyu munsi, n' uwawe : Ntituz' ibiribube:Ni cyo kidushakisha Yuko waturengera Muri byose, Krisito.

2.Niba turibubone Amahoro yonyine, Utuber' ibyishimo Birut' ibindi byose. Haz'ibyag'uduheshe Kukwizera muri byo.

3.icyo tugushakaho Kirut' ibindi byose N'uko watuboneza, Twirirwe dutunganye, Twirind' iby' udashima, Yesu, tugushimishe.

4.Tuz' intege nke zacu igice gusa, Mwami. Nyamara. Mucunguzi, Wowe ntutuyoberwa : Uz' akaga turimo, Nuk' ujy'uturengera. 

5.Turashaka kwemera Rwos' ibyanditwe byera no kujya twingingira,ubuntu bwawe,Yesu,no kub'imbata zawe,tugukorera gusa

6.Mwam'utwumvir'uduhe impano twingingira Tugir' umutim' umwe Utishakir' ikindi Keretse gukor’ ibyo Udushakaho, Yesu.

title: 275.iri joro Mana yanjye
lyrics:
275.iri joro, Mana yanjye, Ndagushimir' umugisha Wampay' uyu munsi wose; Non' umpishe mu mababa.

2.Kubwa Yesu, mbabarira ibyaha nakoze none,Ngo mbe nuzuye na bose, Ntaragondwa n'ibitotsi.

3.Unyigish' ingeso nziza, Ngo mpore nzigir’ iteka. Ne kuzatinya no gupfa, Nkuko ntatiny' ibitotsi.

4.Umpe gusinzira neza, Niringira yuk' undinda; Binsubizemw imbaraga; Maz' ejo nzagukorera.

5. Nimbur’ ibitotsi, Mwami, Untekereresh' ibyiza, inzozi zo kumbabaza, Satani ye kunshogoza

6. Mana, Nyir'ibyiza byose, Ushimwe n'abantu bose, Ushimwe n'abo mw ijuru, We Man' imwe mu Butatu.

title: 276.Data ngiye gusinzira
lyrics:
276.Data ngiye gusinzira :Ngwin' undind' iri joro, Umbundikiz' amababa, ibibi bitanzaho. (x 2)
 

2.Umbabarir' ibi byaha Nagukoreye none, Kand' Umwuka wawe wera Untere kukumvira. (x 2)
 

3.Kand' uryamish' amahoro Bene wacu n'inshuti Bato na bakuru bose, Ubarind' ubiteho. (x 2)
 

4.ineza yaw’ Iboneke Mu bababaye bose, Kand' ukenur' abakene, Abarway' ubakize . ( x 2)
 

5.Mwami, ndangije gusenga, Nsinzire nkwiseguye, Marw' ubwoba no kumenya K' undindish’ urukundo. (x 2)

title: 277.Mwam'ubugingo bwacu ni nk'umunsi
lyrics:
277.Mwam' ubugingo bwacu ni nk'umunsi: Ni buke rwose ntiburama cyane; Kand' ibyishimo byabwo 
 birashira:Mwam' udahinduka, tugumane.



2.Gumana nanjye, kuk' umuns' ukuze, Dore burije, Mwami, ndagushaka; Ni mbur' abandi bose bo kumfasha,
 Tugumane,  Mwami, tugumane



3.Iminsi yose mba ngushaka, Mwami, Iyo Satan' antey' andwanya cyane, Nta wundi mfit' ubasha kuntabara;
 Tugumane, Mwami, tugumane.



4.Singir’ umwanzi n'umwe turi kumwe, Kand' amakuba ntambabaza cyane; Intorezo y'urupfu yaracitse;
 Byose ni byiza, ni tugumana.



5.Amaso n' aremb' uzambonekere, Nzabon' ubwiza bwawe bwo mw ijuru, Nzasiga vub' umwijima wo mw isi,
 No mw ipfa ryanjye, tuzagumane !

title: 278.Mukiza ,ni wowe zuba ryanjye
lyrics:
278.Mukiza, ni Wowe zuba ryanjye Nta joro ngir’ iyo turi kumwe. Iby'isi bye kub’ igicu Kinkingiriz' umucyo wawe !
 

2.Kand' iyo mbony' ibitotsi byiza, Bikanduhur' umubir' urushye,Nibuke yuko mw ijuru,Nzahora nkwiseguye, Yesu. 
 

3. Tujye tuguman’ umunsi wire, Kuko ntabaho tutari kumwe;Tugumane na n'ijoro;Tutabanye, natinya gupfa.
 

4.Niba hagiz' uwasuzuguye Ijwi ry'Imana kur'uyu munsi,Tangira none, Mukiza,Kumuyobor' inzira nziza.
 

5.Mwam' abarwayi, mubane maso, Uh' abaken' imigisha myinshi,Kand' abapfushije nabo,Mwam’ ubasinzirize neza.
 

6.Kandi, Yesu, tuzakangukane, Dukor' imirimo, turi kumwe,Nyuma tuzajye mw ijuru Tugoswe n'urukundo rwawe.

title: 279.dor'umuns'urakuze
lyrics:
279.Dor' umuns' urakuze:Reb' aho rirengeye !Reb' ukwezi n'inyenyeri : Dore, biragaragaye, Bitwakira.
 

ref:Data wera, wera, Mwani Imana, Wuzuy' isi n'ijuru; Twese tugusingize, Nyir'ingabo !
 

2.Rurema, Nyirigira, Ngwino, turakwifuza.Twes' utwuzuz' urukundo, Utugir' ubwoko bwawe, Tukuramye.
 

3.Ni hacur' umwijima. Utugotesh' umucyo !Weyur' ibikingiriza Imitima yacu twese, Tukubone.
 

4.Duhe kukwiringira : Ni dupfa, Mucunguzi,Tuzabon' umucyo mwinshi, Nukw’ ijoro rye kubaho, Tugushime!

title: 280.imins'irahita vuba
lyrics:
280.Imins' irahita vuba, Irahita yihuta. Ukw ihita, benshi bapfa Batameny’ Umukiza. Hari twakora : 
 Tugikoran' umwete : Dutabar' ubu vuba, Imins' itarashira.



ref:Irashira, irashira ! Dor' iminsi irashira!  Dutabar' ubu twese, Twe gukererwa dutyo!



2.None, bib' imbuto nziza mu mitima y'abantu; hanagura n'amarira y 'abanyamibabaro.  Renger' abapfakazi,

 Kand' ubyuts' abaguye, Uhumure n'impumyi,  Ibiseb' ubivure.



3.Iby' uzabishobor' ute ? Ntibizakunanira, nib' ufit' Umwuka Wera N'urukundo rw'Imana :  ibiduh' itimanye, 
 Tubishatse byukuri. Tuyisengan' umwete, Dukor' iby'imbabazi.



4.Icy' Umwami Yes' ashaka N' ukugendana natwe, Ngo yikiriz' abarushye Bamutey' umugongo. Kandi yaravuz' ati :

 Uzanyizera wese Azabwir' imisozi Ngo nitabwe mu nyanja.



5.We gutiny' ibir' imbere : Yes' azagushoboza. Umuh' umutima wawe, Awutegeke rwose ! Isi yubahe Yesu ! 
 Yadutsindiy' urupfu N'abadayimoni bose. Ubu ni We dufite.



6. Sigaho kwizera guke :Na wa wundi yakizwa ! Wibuke ko Paulo na we Yar' umwanzi w'ibyiza; Yamufash' atunguwe, 
 Yemera gukizw' ubwo, Ab' intumwa ya Yesu, Yamamaz' ubuntu bwe.



7. Tyo n'ubu, mugende mwese, Muri kumwe na Yesu; Mubamwerek' abakize, Bos' abazabyemera.  Kandi mwe  gucogora

 Cyangwa se kunanirwa, Mutarabasohoza Ku Mukiz' ubifuza.

title: 281.ngiy'inkuru twumvise
lyrics:
281.Ngiy' inkuru twumvise ;N'uko Yes' akiza! Vuga hos' iyo nkuru Yuko Yes' akiza ! Menyesh' abarimbuka, 
 Abo mu birorero N'abo mu midugudu, Yuko Yes' akiza !



2.Menyesh' abananiwe Yuko Yes' akiza Menyesh' abashobewe Yuko Yes’ akiza!  Yavuy' amaraso ye Kera ku Musaraba,

 Ngw abakize, be gupfa:  Ni ko Yes’ akiza !



3.I Rukig' ubabwire Yuko Yes' akiza ! Umvish' i Bugesera Yuko Yes' akiza ! Vug' i Bunyambiriri N'i Ndorwa n'i Bumbogo,

 Bwira n'i Bufumbira Yuko Yes' akiza !



4.Banyarwanda, mumenye Yuko Yes' akiza ! Nimwihane, mwemere Yuko Yes' akiza ! Umvish' abacuruzi, No mu nkik' ubivuge,

 N’ i buzungu n'i bwami, Yuko Yes' akiza !

title: 282.Abantu benshi cyane batay'Uwiteka
lyrics:
282.Abantu benshi cyane Batay' Uwiteka, Bazimiye nk'intama Zahabiye kure, Zihagaze ku manga, Zikicwa n'imbeho,Impyisi zikazirya : Ni kw abo bameze!



ref:Nimuze, tubashake Twe tubatarure  Bizatunezeza cyane, Tuzany' intam' imwe



2.Hemeye nde kugenda Gushak' inzimire, Ntiyite ku makuba No kubiruhanya, Ngw agire umwete mwinshi  Nk' ushak' itungo rye, Agend’ ashak' intama Yesu yapfiriye 



3.Nubw' uri mu mahoro, Mbese, wumv' ufite Ishyaka rikujyana Gushak' iza Yesu? Nahw ar’ aboroheje
 Cyangw’ abagayitse N' abantu b'igiciro Mu maso ya Yesu.



4.No kw irembo ry'urugo.Yes’ arahagaze, Ahamagar’ intama, Azugururiye.Abuz' abazicyura :
 Ni wow’ abwir' ati: Ushak' intama zanjye, Izo napfiriye



5. Byab' ari byiza Yesu Bwakwira tukaza, Tukakubwira tuti :N'ukuri twiriwe Dushak' intama zawe,Izi zazimiye. 
 Ngizi, turazicyuye : Zishyire mu rugo !

title: 283.N'ijwi ry'umwengeri twumva
lyrics:
283.N' ijwi ry'umwungeri twumva; Ari mw ishyamb' ashak' ize, Zose zagiye intatane, Zavuye mu ruhongore.
 

ref:Tarura, tarura Izo ntama ze zazimiye;Tarura, tarura Izo ntama uzimushyire.
 

2.Ni nde wafash' Umwungeri Kujya gushak' inzimizi Zicwa n'imvura n'imbeho,Akajya kuzitarura ?


3.Abantu bazimiye Bageze kure mu byaha. Yesu ngo, Gend' ubazane, Baz' ababere umwungeri.

title: 284.har'intama urwenda n'icyenda
lyrics:
284. Har 'intama  urwenda n'icyenda  Zari hamwe mu rwuri; Arikw imwe yar' izimiye,Ivuye ku Mwungeri, 
 Mu bihanamang'izerera,itaye umwungeri wayo mwiza.



2.izo ufit' urwenda n'icyenda, mbese, ntizihagije? ;uwo mwunger' ati: Sigaho !  nayo n' iyanjye ! naho  
 yab' igeze kure he, ngiye  gushak' iyo ntama yanjye. 



3.mu bacunguwe nta wamenya imigezi yambutse no kuzerera mu mwijima,ashak' iyo ntama ye ! yumva  
 intam' ihondobereye, asanga  ivunitse, yenda gupfa. 



4.iyi nkora mbona n' iy'iki, Kw irimw amaraso se ? ati:ntuzi ko nanyuze aho,nshaka intama izimiye?
 ibiganza byishwe n'iki se? byishwe n'amahwa muri iri joro.



5.umva,ngiry'ijwi rirangira ry'uwo mwungeri mwiza,ati mbony'iyo najimije,ni munezerwe mwese! 
 nuko abamarayika bose bavuz'impundu,banezerewe!

title: 285.kiz'abarimbuka
lyrics:
285.Kiz' abarimbuka; renger' abapfa; Bakiz' ibyaha n'urupfu rubi! Shak' abazimiye; byuts' abaguye; Menyesha bose ko Yes' akiza.
 

ref:Kiz' abarimbuka, renger' abapfa, Bageze kwa Yesu, ngw’ abakize !
 

2.Abamushungera, na bo ntabanga;Ategerej' abihana neza. Bahate bihane, bizere Yesu. Ujy'ubasabira ngo bakizwe.
 

3.Toz' abazimiye, be kuzuyaza, Barek' irari ridakwiriye : Non' ubakangure, bisubiremo, Bagarukir' Uwabacunguye.
 

4.Kiz' abarimbuka : yaragutumye,Kand' akubashish' uwo murimo. Bos' ubayobore mu nzira ntoya! menyesh' indushyi ko zaruhuwe !

title: 286.biba mu gitondo imbuto z'ineza
lyrics:
286.Biba mu gitondo imbuto z'ineza; Jy'ubiba ku manywa n'ikigoroba Rindira ko zera,baze basarure,Tuzatund' imiba, tunezerewe.
 

ref:Tuzanezerwa! Tuzanezerwa! Ni dutund'imiba, tuzanezerwa. 
 

2.Bib' izuba riva; biba mu kibunda :Ntugatiny' ibihu n'imbeho nyinshi. Amasarura n'imirimo bishize, Tuzatund' imiba, tunezerewe.

title: 287.Yes'azaganz'ibihugu byose
lyrics:
287.Yes' azaganz' ibihugu byose,Iyo biva bikagera. Ndetse n'iyi si yos' izab' ubwami bwe, Ari we Mwami w' abami.
 

2.Bazamusenga badacogora;Bazamusingiz' iteka. Izina rye  rizababer' impumuro, Ikwire mw is' isandare.
 

3.Twihute, twamamaz' ibye hose,Mu moko yose yo mw isi, Ngw indimi zose zizavug’ ishimwe rye, Zemere yukw ar' Umwami.
 

4.Ku ngoma ye, n' amahirwe masa: Imboh' arazibobora, Kand' abakene na b' akabakenura, Indushy' akaziruhura

5.Nimuze mwese, mwa byaremwe mwe Mwubah' Umwami w'abami; Namwe bamarayika, turirimbane, Tut' Urakaz' uhimbazwe

title: 288.urukundo rwa Yesu
lyrics:
288.Urukundo rwa Yesu Nzi ko rwatugezeho. Rudukuraho rwose Urubanza rwo gupfa.
 

ref:Yes' arankunda, (x3) Kuko yamfiriye.
 

2.Abatari bahabwa Ubugingo bw'iteka, Twihute tubabwire Urukundo rwa Yesu.
 

3.Nkuko yadukunz' atyo, Akadupfira twese, Natwe dukunde dutyo Abakiri mu byaha.
 

4.Nuk' ubw' azagaruka, Aje kwim' ingoma ye, Tuzumv' ijwi ry'Umwami, Ati: Mwakoze neza.

title: 289.igitabo cy'Imana
lyrics:
289.Igitabo cy'lmana, Ndagikunda, n' icyanjye : Ni cyo kimbwir' ukuri, Yuko nd' umunyabyaha.
 

2.Kinyigish' urukundo Rw'Umucunguzi wanjye : Iyo nyoby' inzira ye, Vuba kirantarura.
 

3.iyo ntewe n'ibyago, Kimar' umubabaro; Nigishwa na cyo yuko Nd' umusuhuke mw isi.
 

4.Igitabo cy' Imana Kimbwira yuk' umuntu Azanesha n'urupfu, Yizey' Umucunguzi.
 

5.Kimbwira k' utihana, Agapfan' ibyaha bye, Azarimbuka koko, Ntabane n'Uwiteka.
 

6.Kandi nigishwa na cyo Kw’ abakunzi ba Yesu Bazahabw' ibyishimo Bitazashir’ iteka.
 

7.Igitabo cy'lmana Gihora kinyigisha Amagamb' ahebuje : Ndagikundir' ukuri.

title: 290.ijambo ryaw'urimfungurire
lyrics:
290.Ijambo ryaw' urimfungurire, Nkuko wahagije bya bihumbi, Yes' ubasaturiy' umutsima, Nonub' umpaze nanjy' undengere.
 

2.Ni Wowe mutsima w'ubugingo; Nkizwa n'ijambo ryawe ry'ukuri. Rimber' ifunguro ry'umutima, Nkunde n'ukuri kwaw’ unyeretse.
 

3.Yes' ump' Umwuka waw' andengere, Ankore no ku maso, mpumuke. Mbon' ibihishwe by'ijambo ryawe, Nawe, nkubonemo, Mucunguzi !
 

4.Icyo gitab' ukimpishurire, Kinshinj' ibyaha byanjye, nkwizere, Niho nabaturwa, nkabohorwa,Ni hw amahoro yawe yanzaho !

title: 291.nubwo nd'umwana muto bwose
lyrics:
291. Nubwo nd' umwana muto bwose, Jye nd' agatama ka Yesu; Mbasha no kwinjira mw irembo Rijya mu Bwami bw'Imana.
 

ref:Njye nshyira neza, (X 2) Murokozi, Kwizera kwanjye ( x 2) Muri Wowe.
 

2. Nubwo nd' umwana muto bwose, Yesu, war' umeze nkanjye; Umwuka wawe n' ump' ubwenge, Ni bwo nzasa nawe rwose.
 

3.Nubwo nd' umwana muto bwose, Nsa n'urum' iyo hakeye; Yesu ni we munyabubasha, Anshorez' ukuboko kwe.
 

4.Jye ndi muto; ndacyari mw isi, Mfit' ubugingo bugufi : Mukiz' ubwawe n' ubw'iteka; Muri bwo mbone kurama.

title: 292.tugiye gutaha
lyrics:
292.tugiye gutaha: ntitwibagirwe amagambo yera batwigishije
 

2.Uyu munsi mwiza—Twumvir' Umwami N’ umunsi w'izuka—Ry'Umucunguzi.
 

3.Twubahir' Imana—Ahantu hose, Twumvir' ijwi ryayo—Rituyobora.
 

4.Iman' itwigishe—Kubar' iminsi, Twibuke kw ari Yo—Itubeshaho.
 

5.Tuyiririmbire,—Tuyishimire, Kuko yaduhaye—Umwami mwiza.

title: 293.uko njya mbona mw'ijuru
lyrics:
293.Uko njya mbona mw 'ijuru Njya mbwir' Umwami, nti Ndakwinging' unyigishe Kuguh' umutima.
 

2.Iteka mu gitondo,Njya mbwir' Umwami, nti : Nyiriz' imbere yawe, Mana yanjye nkunda.
 

3.Kenshi cyane mu munsi, Njya mbwir' Umwami, nti : Ni Wowe turi kumwe: Uhor' ushimisha.
 

4.Kand' iy' ijoro rije, Njya mbwir' Umwami, nti : Mukiz' ureba hose, Mpa ku byiza byawe !
 

5.Kugez' igihe nzapfa,Nzabwir’ Umwami, nti: Ni kuri Wowe, Data, Njya mperw' umugisha.

title: 294.har'ubw'abagore bazany'abana babo
lyrics:
294.Har'ubw' abagore Bazany' abana babo, Abigishwa ntibemera Ko barushya Yesu. Nyamara Yes' abony’ibyo,Arabahamagar' ati :Mwemerer' abana ngo baz' aho ndi !



2. Ati : Ndabakira, Mbashyire ku bibero; Ntimuzi ko nd' Umwungeri W'abana bato, se? Ni banyisunga bitanze,Nzabaha kujya mw ijuru : Mwemerer'   abana ngo baz' aho ndi !



3. icyaduh’abana bo mu mahanga yose ! kumv’ inkuru za Yesu, bakaza kuri we abayeruriy’ umwijima , abakiran’ imbabazi
 twemerer’abana ngo baz’ahwari!

title: 295.Mumushime,bana bato mwese
lyrics:
295.Mumushime, bana bato mwese :
 N' Umukunzi wanyu. Twese, twese, tujye tumushima : Adukunda twese.
 

2.Mumusenge, bana bato mwese:
 N’ Umukunzi wanyu. Twese, twese, tujye tumushima : Adukunda twese.
 

3.Mumusange ...............	
 

4.Mumukunde...............
 

5.Mumuture................
 

6.Mumukorere..............

title: 296.tuzany'amaturo
lyrics:
296.Tuzany' amaturo—Yo gushimisha : Yose n' aya Yesu;—tumutur' ubu !

ref:Tumuture, tumuture,—Tumutur' ubu ! Yose n' aya Yesu—Tumutur' ubu !
 

2.Ava mu biganza—Byac’ aba Yesu; Turayamutuye,—Tut' abana be.
 

3.Ubu turi bato:—Ni yo dufite. Ubwo tuzakura,—Tuzasumbyaho !
 

4.Ibike dufite,— Yes' ubyakire. Ubwacu utwihe Non' utwemere !

title: 297.Yesu ntahinduka
lyrics:
297.Yesu ntahinduka, Ntahinduka, ntahinduka;Yesu ntahinduka Na hato !
 

2.Yesu yanyogeje, Yanyogeje, yanyogeje; Yesu yanyogeje Ibyaha.
 

3.Ni We wampagije, Wampagije, wampagije;Ni We wampagije : Ndahaze!
 

4.Yes' azanyakira, Anyakire, anyakire;Yes’ azanyakira, Ngez' i We.
 

5.Ni We tuzabana, Tuzabana, tuzabana;Ni We tuzabana Mw ijuru.
 

6.Mpore musingiza, musingiza, musingiza;Mpore musingiza, Nishimye !

title: 298.mbe nk'umurase w'izuba
lyrics:
298. Mbe nk'umurase w'izuba Aho ngera hose, Mbonesh' umucyo wa Yesu Mu mwijima w'isi.
 

ref:Yesu, Mucyo w'isi, Mbe nk'umurase ku bwawe,Ngez’ umucyo wawe Mu mwijima w'iyi si !
 

2.Mbe nk'umurase w'izuba  weyur' umwijima wo mu mitima y'abantu Bataz' Umukiza.
 

3.Mbe nk'umurase w'izuba,  Mfash' ab'i muhira, nkwiz' amahoro ya Yesu  Mu bo duturanye.
 

4.Mbe nk'umurase w'izuba :Mbisezeranye  ntyo. nerekan' ingeso nziza ; Ziva kuri Yesu.

title: 299.amaboko yawe
lyrics:
299. Amaboko yawe, Yesu Mukiza, Yagirag' ineza n'iby'imbabazi, Kand' abana bat' akabakikira, Agakiz' indembe n'abamugaye.
 

2. Amaboko yanjye ndayaguhaye. Ab' ayawe, Yesu, uyakoreshe ! Umpe kuba nkawe, njye ngukorera, Njye nkoran' umwet' umurimo wawe !

title: 300.bana,ntimugire icyaha mukora
lyrics:
300.Bana, ntimugire—Icyaha mukora, Ntimutonganishwe—N'uburakari.
 

2.Bana, kuko muri—Aba Yesu Kristo, Nukw ingeso zanyu—Zib' ingeso ze.
 

3.Yavugag’ iteka—Iby'ukuri byose, Nta by'isoni Yesu —Yigez' akora,
 

4.Nta n'umwe yigeze—Kugirira nabi Kuko Yes' iteka—Yangag' ibyaha.
 

5.Har' ufit' ubwenge—Bwo kuboshya nabi: N' Umwanzi Satani—Uhora hafi.
 

6.Abasezeranye—Kwimura Satani No kurek' ibyaha,—Mwe kumwumvira.
 

7.Yes' azabafasha—Kumurwanya cyane, Kuk' ubwe wenyine—Yamunesheje

title: 301.ndi agatama ka Yesu
lyrics:
301.Ndi agatama ka Yesu, Ndanezerewe cyane. Mfit' Umwungeri mwiza; Ajy' andagira neza. Arankunda, ndabizi; Ijwi rye ndaryitaba.



2.Ajy' anyahura neza; Ntanyica, ntankubita. Kand' angenza buhoro, Ajy’ andagir’ aheza. N'iyo nagiz' inyota, Anshor' amazi meza,



3.Singitinya, noneho :Ndi mu ntama za Yesu : igihe ni kigera, Akanshyura mu rugo  Nzagir' umunezero; Nta bukene kwa Yesu.

title: 302.Mukiza,mwungeri mwiza
lyrics:
302.Mukiza, Mwungeri mwiza, Uturinde tw' abana bawe; Iri jor' utube hafi, Ngo turamuk' amahoro.



2.Wiriw’ uturinze hose, Uturagiy' intama zawe; Kandi wadutunze neza : Nuko, wumv' ibyo dusaba.



3.Yesu, Mwunger' udukunda, Tubabarir' ibyaha byacu; Rind' abo dukunda bose; Nyum' uzatugez' i Wawe!

title: 303.Yesu,mwungeri wamjye
lyrics:
303.Yesu, Mwungeri wanjye, Nd' agatam' undagire. Byose ndabitinyuka : Nta wuzakunyambura !
 

2.Mwami, waramfiriye Kera ku Musaraba : Mbonye n'ibikomere Mu biganz' unteruje.
 

3.None,njye ngusingiza, Muri byose nkumvire ! Urukund' umfitiye, Ni rwo runyishimisha.
 

4.Yesu, Mwungeri mwiza, Non’ unyiyegereze !menyereza noneho, Nzinukwe kuzimira!
 

5.Mwami Yes’ undohorere, nshe mu nzir’ifunganye; Nta cyo nanz' untegeke : Wow' uz’ ibinkwiriye!
 

6.Ngez' ah’ uri mw ijuru, Ibijya binyobera,Ni ho nzabimenyera, Nshim' uko wandagiye !

title: 304.harihw' inshuti y'abana
lyrics:
304.Harihw Inshuti y'abana  Ihoraho mw ijuru, Ibakund' urukundo Rutagir' iherezo. 
 Nubw'inshuti zo mw’isi Zaduhararuka,  Inshuti yacu, Yesu, Ntiyaduhemukira.



2.Kandi mw ijuru ry'Imana, Har' uburuhukiro Bw'abana bamukunda Bakambaz' Imana, Se Ahw abagenzi bato Bajya basohora;   Baruhukir' iteka Mu mahor’ adashira.



3. Nyir'urugo rwo mw ijuru N' Uwatubabarijwe. Ahamagar' abana Ngo binjire muri rwo.N’ urugo rwiza cyane Rw'amahoro masa; Kand' ibyishimo byaho Birut' iby'abo mw isi.



4. Harihw amakamba yera Y'abana bakijijwe Bazaherwa mw ijuru  Na Yesu bakoreye. Abamushimishije Bakunz’ izina rye, Azabagororera Ingororano nziza.



5. Harihw indirimbo nziza  Y'abana bakijijwe  Bazaririmb' iteka,Basohoye mw ijuru:Ishim’ urukundo Uwabacunguye;Kand' abayiririmba Ntabwo bazacogora,



6. Hariho n'imyenda yera Y'abana bakijijwe  N'impundu z'ibyishimo N'inanga z'izahabu.Abakunz' Umukiza Bazabigabirwa, Tukiriho dukunde Yes' urukundo rwinshi.

title: 305.uwo ni nde
lyrics:
305.Uwo ni nd' urambitswe Mu muvure w'inka se ?
 

Ref: N’Umukiz' Umwami wacu  n’ igitangaza tubonye. Ngwino, tumwunamire, Tumuramy' atwimemo !
 

2.Uriya wasonzeye Mu butayu ni nde se ?
 

3.Kand' uriya wigisha Bos' ibyiza ni nde se ?
 

4.Ni nde se bazanira Abarwayi n'indushyi ?
 

5.Mbese, ni nd' uririra Lazar’ amaze gupfa ?
 

6.Ni nde se basingiza, Ahetswe n'indogobe ?
 

7. Mbese, ni nd' ushavuye, Aseng' i Getsemane ?
 

8.Uhaw' iby' atakoze Ku Musaraba ni nde?
 

9.Ni nde watuzukiye Ngw atubohor' ibyaha ?
 

10.Ni nd' ugeze mw ijuru, Afit' icyubahiro ?

title: 306.twishimir'umunsi w'Imana
lyrics:
306.Twishimir’ umunsi w'Imana, Tubonahw ibyishimo. N' umunsi turuhukiraho,
 Tuvuye mu mirimo, Imibabaro yac’ ivuyeho No kwiganyira kose. N’ umuns' abakuru n'abato Basingiz' Uwiteka.



2. Imana yarangije byose Kur' uyu munsi mwiza; Kandi ni ho Kristo yazutse Urupf ‘arunesheje, Ngo dukizw' ibyaha n'ingeso mbi;
 Maz' atwoherereza Umwuka w'Iman' ihoraho, Wamanutse mw ijuru.



3.Iyo tugejej' uyu munsi Tubon' ubukiriro, Tuba dusa n'abasohoye Ahitwa Paradiso. Twari tuguy' umwum' ukabije;
 None tubony' amazi; Kand' isi twasezeranijwe Tuba tuyigezemo.



4.Non' ingoma nyinshi zavuze Guhamagaz' abayo, Bateranire gufungura Ifunguro ry'Imana: Ubutumwa buramurikira 
 Bos' abo mu mwijima, Kandi busa n'amazi meza Ahembur' imitima.



5.Nuko dusab’ Iman' iduhe Ub' umugisha mushya Kugira ngo tuzasohore Mu bwami bwo mw ijuru. Ni ho tuzajya duhimbarisha
 Ijwi ry'umunezero Data wa twese n'Umwana we Kandi n'Umwuka Wera.

title: 307.haleluya!haj'umunsi
lyrics:
307.Haleluya ! Haj' umunsi Wo kuruhukir' Imana, Uyu munsi ni w' urusha Iyindi yos’ amahoro. Iteka, 
 twumv' ibyishimo Biva ku Mana yacu.



 2.Uburuhukiro bwiza Bubaho mur'uyu munsi. Umucyo w'Imana yera Ub’ uratumurikiye.
 Ni w' utweza mu mitima Ku munsi w’ Uwiteka.



3.Mbega, nambar' iki none, Mbone kwizihiz' Imana ? Dor’ umwambaro yampaye N’ ugukiranuka kwayo, Kugira ng’umubi nkanjye
 Nerekan' ubwiza bwe.



4.We yamviriy' amaraso, Kuko ngir’ ibicumuro; Gukiranuka kwe ni ko Kwez' uyu mutima wanjye. Ibyo n' umwambaro wanjye
 Ukwiriy' icyumweru,

title: 308.Mwami Yesu
lyrics:
308. Mwami Yesu, turaje Kumv' amategeko yawe; Ushyire mu mitima Ijambo ryawe riryoha. ibyo mw’ isi tubireke, Dutekerez' iby'ijuru.


2.Nta cyo twebwe twamenya, Iyi mitim' icyijimye,Itakiwe n'umucyo Uva mu Mwuka w'Imana. Utwigishe kuyoboka, Ngo tujye dukora neza.
 

3.Dore, Mwana w'Imana, Twebwe twese tugusaba Ng’ utweresh' imitima Umwuka wawe w'ukuri; Tujye twumva, turirimbe : 
 Tunezez' Imana yacu.

title: 309.inzu yawe,Mana
lyrics:
309.Inzu yawe, Mana,—Turayishimira : Ni h' ujy'uhurira—N'abo wakijiije.
 

2.Duteraniramo—Guseng' Uwiteka, Tukamwaturira—Ibitubabaza.
 

3.Dufashirizwamo—N' Ijambo ry' Imana: Tukirisomerwa,—Twunguk’ ibya Yesu.
 

4.Tubwiririzwamo—Ibidukomeza Mu ntambara nziza,—Bikatunezeza.
 

5.Tuharirimbira—Ishimwe rya Yesu, Twagera mw ijuru,—Tukazarushaho.
 

6.Mw is' ujy'unkundisha— Kubana n'abawe; Nzaguhimbazanye—N'abera mw ijuru

title: 310.Iki gihe twamaranye
lyrics:
310.Iki gihe twamaranye Tuyobowe n'ibendera; Dutandukany' amahoro, Twifitiy' umunezero.
 

2.Mwa nshuti zacu nziza mwe, Dusangiye gucungurwa N'intambara ya Krisito, Ajy' abarind' iyo mujya.
 

3.Mwumv' iri jambo dusoma Mu Gitabo cy'Uwiteka : Mutumbir' Umurokozi, Mwihararuk' inzira ye.
 

4.Ahar' amaso yab' aya, Ntitwongere kubonana. Nyamara tw’ abakijijwe Tuzahurir’ i Siyoni.
 

5.Yes azah' abakijijwe Ingororano mw ijuru. Mukomez' ibyo mwahawe Na We, katanga ka mbere.
 

6.Mwa nshuti mwe dukundanye, Twabonany' Umusaraba Mur' iyi minsi twabanye, Mugendane n'Uwiteka.
 

7.Ituza riva mw ijuru Ritwuzure tw' aba Yesu, Itorero rye ryo mw isi Rikiz' imitima myinshi.
 

8.Twihane gukiranirwa Kw'abatubah’ Uwiteka, Tumenye yuko twe twese Tuzageran' imbere ye.
 

9.Ngaho, murabeho mwese, Bagenzi twafatanije, Tuzaba hamwe mw ijuru, Duhoraneyo na Yesu

title: 311.yemwe nshuti twabanye
lyrics:
311.Yemwe, nshuti twabanye Kandi twafatanije, Tubasezeyeh’ ubu, Murabeho : Ku Mana.
 

2.Tugiye gutangira Urugendo runini : Mujye mudusabira , Iman' ibane natwe.
 

3.Noneho, mwa nshuti mwe, Turashaka kugenda.Ngo tujyane na Yesu, Hamwe n'Uwiteka, Se.
 

4.Ariko ntitwihebye Kubw' inzira ducamo: Tuzi ko twarushyize Mu maboko y'Imana.
 

5.Murabeho, bagenzi, Abo twafatanije.Mu byago no mu byiza. Yes' agendane namwe.
 

6.Har' uburuhukiro Bw'abakijijwe bose Ni dupfa, tuzabayo K' Uwiteka mw ijuru.
 

7.Ahar' amaso n' aya Yo kubonana mw isi; Nyamar’ abakijijwe Tuzabana mw ijuru.
 

8.Murabeho, bagenzi Dusubiy' i wac' ubu. Nimugende mwizeye, Tubaragij' Imana.

title: 312.abakund'Imana mwese
lyrics:
312.Abakund' Imana mwese,Ni hagir' abapfa muri mwebwe, Cyangwa se natwe tugapfa, Tuzahurir' i Siyoni twese.
 

Ref:Turashima iyatumye Tumaran’ iyi minsi.
 

2.Nta mwenda wose dufite : Twiteguye gufashwa n'Imana No kwamamaz' Ubutumwa Mu bihugu tugiyemo byose.
 

3.Iki gihe tumaranye, Twari dufatanirije hamwe;None natwe turagiye, Namwe musigarane n'Imana.
 

4.Nshuti zacu, twarabanye; Tubasezeranyeh’ urukundo.Dushim’ Imana yatumye Dufatany' iki gihe tumaze.
 

ref:None, ngaho, murabeho ! Iman' ibane namwe .

title: 313.Umukiza abe hamwe namwe
lyrics:
313.Umukiz' abe hamwe namwe, Ababer' umujyanama, Abaragire nk'intama, Abarinde mu mahoro ye !
 

Ref:Hamwe namwe, ye, hamwe namwe  Kugeza ku mperuka y'isi  Hamwe namwe, ye, hamwe namwe, Umukiz' abe hamwe namwe.
 

2.Mu rugamb' abe hamwe namwe,Ab' ingabo yany' ikinze, Abarinde mu makuba, Abahishe mu mababa ye !
 

3. Mu miruhw abe hamwe namwe, Mubuyerezwa n'ibyago, Mu bukene no mu ndwara, Abaramiz' amaboko ye.
 

4.Mu mahor' abe hamwe namwe,No mu gihe cy'urushyana,  No mu mvura no ku mucyo, Mub’ iteka mu mahoro ye.
 

5.No mu ntambara yo hanyuma,Har’ urupf’ imbere yanyu, Mwenda kwambuka rwa ruzi, Azab' ari hamwe namw' ubwo.

title: 314.gukundana kw'aba Yesu
lyrics:
314.Gukundana kw'aba Yesu Ni ko kudukoranije, Ariko murunga w'abana b'Imana Yabanje gukund' abayo.
 

2.Duhore dusabirana Ngw iduh' imitim' ihuje, Ngw imare muri twe ibyaha n'ubwoba, Iduh’ umugisha wayo.


3. Twabon’ umukristo wese Watay' iyi nzira yayo, Tuzinging' Imana ngw imwibuts' ibyayo Ngo yonger' arebe Yesu.
 

4. Kand' iyo dutandukanye, Tujyanye n'Umwami wacu, Uhor' uturindish' ubuntu n'ihirwe, Dukomej' ubumwe bwacu.

title: 315.Imana yakoze neza ibidutangaza
lyrics:
315.Imana yakoze neza Ibidutangaza, Abantu bo mur' iyi si Batari babona.
 

2.Muhimbaz’ Iyateguye Inzira ducamo. Ni Y' itubonanij’ ubu Tutishwe n'ibyaha.
 

3.Twaherukanaga kera,Nyamara noneho Dusubiye kubonana, Dufit' ibyishimo.
 

4.Yemwe bagenzi dukunda,Nta kibi twibuka Mu byo twafatanyemo; Turabashimiye.
 

5.Ku Mana, bene Data mwe,Mw isi, niko biba. Abifuza Siyoni nshya, Tuzaban' iteka.
 

6.Non' umugisha w'Imana Uhorane namwe. Ibah' ibibanezeza Mu nzira mucamo.

title: 316.Man'itang'itimana
lyrics:
316.Man' itang' itimana, Twese tuguhimbaze :
 

ref:Kokw imbabazi zawe Ntabwo zizarangira !
 

2.Tugushimiy' izuba Waturemeye, Mana ;
 

3.Waduhaye n'ukwezi Kutwakira n'ijoro :
 

4.Tugushimiy' imvura Imez' ibyo tubiba :
 

5.Kand' imirima yacu Wayihay’ umugisha :
 

6.Mana, waduhesheje Ibigega byuzuye:
 

7.No mu mitima yacu, Wez' imbuto wateye :
 

8.tugukuriy'ubwatsi kubyo twejeje byose:

title: 317.Mukiza,wadutoreye kuba nk'umubir' umwe
lyrics:
317. Mukiza, wadutoreye Kuba nk'umubir' umwe; Urashaka yuko twera, Twihanganira byose.Ntushaka n'ibitatanya Abo waje gukiza; Urukundo rwawe, Mwami,Ruduhuz' imitima.



2.Yemw' abakundwa na Yesu,Na none nimwongere. Muvuge mwes' imbere ye
 Ibyo mwasezeranye. Kandi ni mwongera kumva K' urukundo rwatubye, Mumwingingish' imitima, Yemere kubuzuza.



3.Bana b'Imana Rurema,Ntimutinye kwitanga ; Mu kubaho kwanyu kose,Mukundane  mw 'ihwema ! Umukiza wacu Yesu
 Ni kw ajy' atugirira, Ngo haboneke muri twe Ubuntu bw'Uwiteka



4.Mwami Yesu, wakomeje Isezerano ryacu; Kand' utwigishe kubana Mu rukundo nyakuri. Mwam' ujy' uruduh' iteka,
 Rudacogora rwose; Ni bwo bose bazamenya Yuko watwitoreye.

title: 318.hose habera heza
lyrics:
318.Hose habera heza Inshuti zibana : Zirakundana neza, Zibanye na Yesu.
 

2.Nkukw iy' imvur’ iguye, Ihembur' imyaka, Ni kw Iman' ibigenza, Yez' abakundana.
 

3.Kubana kwabo kwiza,Barahugurana, Ngo be kugwa mu cyaha, Babon' amahoro.
 

4. Umwuk' uhamagara Abo mw isi yose, Ngo bazab' ishyo rimwe, Umwunger' ab' umwe.

title: 319.Aho mwumvis'ijwi
lyrics:
319.Aho mwumvis' ijwi ry'Umwami ? Ati, Basore, mubyuke ! Turi hano, tugandukire Rwos’ amategeko yawe.
 

Ref:Tuguhay ubusore bwacu N’urukundo rwacu, Mwami: Mu ntege nke zacu twuzure Tujye duhoran' iteka.
 

2.Twifuza cyan' umucyo wawe N'urukundo n'amahoro; Twishiman' ibendera yawe, Tuyuyane mw isi yose.
 

3.Dufatish' ukuboko kwawe, Ujy' udushorer' iteka. Nubwo duterwa n'ibitwoshya, Ujy' ubidukiza byose.
 

4.Duh' umwete nk' Intumwa zawe, Duhore dukora nka zo; Duhwane na zo mu kwizera No kugupfir' ubishatse.

title: 320.Mwa bagore mwe b'i Rwanda.
lyrics:
320.Mwa bagore mwe b'i Rwanda.Muze, mwitabe Yesu  Dor' imirimo ni myinshi:
 Tujye kumukorera. Dutabare bene wacu :Ubu bararimbuka.Mwa bagore mwe b'i Rwanda. Yes' arabashoboza.



2.Mwa bagore mwe b’I Rwanda,None nimutebuke! Imibabaro n'indwara
 Biragwiriye mw isi. Nimufungur' imitima, Umukiz' ageremo. Mwa bagore mwe b'i Rwanda, Mureke gupfapfana !



3. Mwa bagore mwe b'i Rwanda, Mw isi har' umwijima. Nimujyan’ amatabaza,
 Mwakire bene wanyu. Abagore n'abakobwa Baheze mu mwijima. Mwa bagore mwe b'i Rwanda, Mubamurikir' ubu !

title: 321.Mana Data wo mw ijuru
lyrics:
321.Mana Data wo mw ijuru, Washyingiriye Adamu Na Haw' i Paradiso, Umaze kubateranya, Ubaha n'umugish' uti: Mub' amahoro masa. Muzabyare,—Muzaheke, Muzagwire,—Mwuzuz' isi, Muyitegeke n'ibyayo.



2.Mujye mwitegeka neza, Mufashanye, mukundane,Murengerane mwembi. Mw ihirwe no mu makuba Mu bworo no mu bukire,
 Muzahimbaz' Imana. Mana Data,—Ubarinde, Ngo bagume—Kuri Wowe, Mwami, jy'ubiyegereza.



3.Wa mukwe n'umugeni mwe, Nimugir' umutim' umwe,Mubane mu mahoro. Nuk' Umucunguzi wanyu Azabakomez' iteka,
 Arind' urugo rwanyu, Abageze—Mw ijur' i We, Ngo mutahe—Na bwa bukwe Bw'Umwana w'intama, Yesu.

title: 322.Aba bombi, Mana Data
lyrics:
322.Aba bombi, Mana Data, Bashyingiranyw’ amahoro, Ujy'ubarinda neza. Mugwaneza w'ubutunzi, Ubatere kwizigira,
 Kubw' imbabazi zawe. Bakwizere,—Bagusenge, Wowe, Data,—Kuk' ukunda No kubikiriz' iteka.



2.Bahimbaz' izina ryawe; Rinda guterana kwabo Kubw' urukundo rwawe. Kand' amahoro yaw' abe i wabo none n'iteka
 hamwe n'ubuntu bwawe. Amen ! Amen !—Ubemeze, Ubafashe,—Ubarinde Mu kubaho kwabo kwose.

title: 323.Mana Data wa twese
lyrics:
323.Mana Data wa twese,Muremyi wa byose, Kera wateranije Adamu na Eva, Non' aba bana bawe
 Ubah' umugisha Uva mu buntu bwawe, Baterane neza.



2.Yesu, Mukiza wacu,Wejeje bwa bukwe Bw'i Kana kera, n'ubu
 Ubah' umugisha. Butah' ubwawe, weze Inzu y'aba bantu, Amahor' adashira Ajy' abamw iteka.



3. Mwuka w'Imana mwiza, Non' ubahumure, Bareb' u bwiza bwawe N'urukundo rwawe
 Ubarind' amahane Yic' imibanire, Ahubw' ubakoreshe Iby' ushima gusa.



4. Ab' ari Wowe, Data, Ububakir' inzu, Kugira ngw ibyishimo Byabo bidashira. Wez' urukundo rwabo,
 Ruhorehw iteka, Babane muri Wowe. Bahuj' umutima.

title: 324.Mana Dat' ukiranuka
lyrics:
324.Mana Dat' ukiranuka, Ababatizwa none, Ubah' umugisha wawe, Kand' ubarind' iteka; Bahame mu bawe rwose,Bagushimishe, Mwami, Kandi babe mw Itorero, bitez' ubwami bwawe.



2.Mwam' isezerano ryabo,Ngo baryibuk' iteka, Ubakomeze mu byawe Kuko wabapfiriye; Babeho mu byawe byiza,
 Bagukunde mu kuri, Kuko waje kubakiza, Bemere gucungurwa.



3.Mwam' ubah' Umwuka wawe,Bakuyoboke rwose, Ntibazatanire mw isi.
 Bakundane na bose ; Babone no kwamamaza Ibyiza byawe byose. Niho twese tuzahabwa Ikamba ry'ubugingo.

title: 325.Ababatijwe none,Ubarinde
lyrics:
325.Ababatijwe none,Ubarinde, Mwami, Ub' umubyeyi wabo,Kukw ar' abangizi. Bajya mw ijuru bate ?
 Ntabwo bakwijyana, Keretse bakwizeye, Wowe, Mucunguzi.



2.Bashakish' urukundo,Ujy' ubaramira. Bakwiringire, Mwami,Bahunge Satani; Muvunyi Yesu, ngwino,
 Ubakiz' ibibi. Twese tuguhimbaze, Ng' udukiz' iteka.



3. Mwam' ubwawe wenyine, Ubabatirishe Umwuka wawe wera,Bajye bakwizera; Twese tuzafatanye,
 Tuzab' umwe rwose, Duhore dukundana Nkuko wadukunze.

title: 326.Utuzanye hano gusangira Igaburo ryera
lyrics:
326.Utuzanye hano gusangira Igaburo ryera, Mwami Yesu; Nuk' uyu munsi mwiza, Ngwin' utwibutse yuko Watubabarijwe, udupfira.
 

2.Ur'umutsima wera umanyurwa N'iyi vin' isukwa bitwibutsako mu mukumbi wawe Ababigira nkana Uzabibahora : bazacibwa.
 

3.Nukw iri Gaburo ritwibutsa Yuko wapfiriye kudukiza !Dukiranuke twese, Tuguhimbaze rwose : Turakwihereje : utwimemo.

title: 327.Ni byiza kureb' ab'Imana Baterana
lyrics:
327.Ni byiza kureb' ab'Imana Baterana bakundanye; Mwuka Wera naw' ubakunda.
 Ubazenguruts' umucyo. Gusenga n'indirimbo byabo   Bitumbagira mw ijuru.	



2.Iyo bagez' imbere yawe, Baje gusangira nawe, Urukundo ruva mw ijuru
 Rurabanezeza cyane; Imitima yabo yizeye Ijy' igusingiz' iteka.



3.Ubwo bugingo bubeshaho Abacunguwe ba hose, Imitima yab' inezezwa
 N'ukw ihor'ibon' ibyiza. Itorero ryawe ritunze Ubuntu bwawe busaga.



4. Mana y'urukund' utwigishe Gukundana neza rwose, Ngo duhabw' Ibyo kurya Byera,
 Tweger' Uruhimbi rwawe. Irari ry'imitima yacu rib'iryo guhazwa cyane

title: 328. Yes’ ur' Umukiza wanjye
lyrics:
328. Yes’ ur' Umukiza wanjye : Kuv' ubu, jye mb' uwawe. Nuhagiwe n'amaraso Yawe, Mwana w' Imama.
 

ref:Tugusingize, Mukiza, Yesu, Mwana w'intama. Nuhagiwe n'amaraso : Ngushime, Murokozi
 

2. Kera nararushye cyane Ngo nihesh' amahoro. None ubu, namaramaje Kwirangiriza Yesu.


3. Nzajya mbwir' abantu bose Agakiza ka Yesu, Gashyitse, katar' igice  N'ubugingo bw'ubuntu.
 

4.Nzajya namamaza Yesu, Nshiz' amanga, nta soni : Uko yambohoy' ingoyi No kunkiz' akankiza.
 

5.Mpimbaz' Uwanshunguy' atyo,Ankirish' imbabazi ! Ajy' andind' amp' amahoro : Nukw asingizw' iteka !

title: 329.Nezerwa cyane
lyrics:
329.Nezerwa cyane, wa si we; Araje Shobuja ! Mwa bayibamo mwese mwe, Musangwe mwinonosoye, 
 Ni mu mukingurire, Mu mwakir' abiharire; Kand' ibyaremwe byose bimuhimbaze !



2.Nezerwa cyane, wa si we, Ko yimy' ingoma ye ! Mwa bantu mwe, twishimane, Tunezerwe bihebuje. 
 Namwe, bamarayika, Turirimban' ishimwe rye. Namwe misozi mwese, nimurangire !



3.Non' ibitovu n'amahwa Nimubirimbure ! Twanizwe n'ibicumuro N'intimba byatumezemo.

 Yes' araturcngera Ngw abirandure muri twe, Wa muvum' awusimbuz' umugisha we.



4.Yazanywe no kuganz' isi,Ngo twes' atwereke Ishimwe n'icyubahiro Bituruka mu kwera kwe No mu rukund' afite, 
 Urw' akund' abacumuye. Tumuhimbaze : n' Umukiz' utangaje

title: 330. Wowe, Man' ikiranuka
lyrics:
330. Wowe, Man' ikiranuka, Turashim' izina ryawe Kuk' uduhay' udukiza. Ujy'utuyobor' i Wawe.
 

2.Waduhay' Umwami Yesu, Aza kutwigisha neza Ibir' i Wawe mw ijuru. Ngo tukuyoboke neza.
 

3.Wow' udusabir' iteka, Ube mu mitima yacu; Natwe tujye tugukunda, Kuk' ur' Umuvunyi wacu.
 

4.Uhimbazwe, Mwami Yesu : Twibuka k' uzagaruka Kudushaka, twe n'abacu, Ng' uduh' ubugingo bushya.

title: 331.Hoziyana ! Twese dushim' Uwaje
lyrics:
331.Hoziyana ! Twese dushim' Uwaje Mw izina ry'Umwami. Hoziyana mw ijuru ! Ubwo yaje mw izina ry'Umwami, (x 2)
Hoziyana ! Hoziyana ! Hoziyana mw ijuru !( x 2)

title: 332.Turirimbe na none
lyrics:
332.Turirimbe na none Ubuntu bw' Umwami; Umunezero mwinshi Ube mu mitima. Agakiza kacu Kavuye mw ijuru : Dufit' Umukiza. (x 2)
 

2.Imana ntirakara :N' amahirwe yacu. Ibabarir' umubi Wayisuzuguye. Umukiza wacu Yikorey' ibyaha Byatwicaga rwose. (x 2)
 

3.Ni dushakan' umwete Ijambo ry'Imana, Tuzagirirwa neza N'Umukiza Yesu. Ni We ntwari yacu : Araturwanira, Agahor' atsinda. (x 2)
 

4.Abacunguwe bose Aberek' inzira; Ashyir' umucyo mwiza Mu mitima yabo. Umwuka we wera Uhor' utwigisha Iby'ukuri byose. (x 2) 
 

5. Kand' azava mw ijuru, Mu bwiza bw'Imana; Azaba yanesheje; Azaturokora. Abizeye bose Bazishim' iteka, Bamubony' ukw ari. (x 2)

title: 333.Nimuze, dusange Yesu
lyrics:
333.Nimuze, dusange Yesu : Ni W' udukesh' imitima. Turirimbe, tunezerwe, Kuko tur' intore ze 
 

2.Data yatumy' Umwana we Ngw ‘atuzanir' ubugingo. Niw' ubw' uzatuzamura.Atujyane ku Mana.
 

3.Abemey' ayo magambo Bayashima mu mitima, Bameny' Imana Rurema Kandi bavuz' impundu.
 

4.Yesu, kubw' ubuntu bwawe, Uzatwijyanir' i Wawe, Ahw abatowe n'Imana Bicara bakishima.

title: 334.Wa mutima wanjye we
lyrics:
334.Wa mutima wanjye we, shim' Uwiteka Mwa bindimo byose mwe, mushime  Njye mpimbaz' izina rye, ne kwibagirwa  Iby'Imana yankoreye byose.  Imbabarir' ibyaha nakoze byose. Niy' inkiz' indwara zamugaje. 
 Inyambik' imbabazi zayo nk'ikamba, Ikampaz' ibyiza bidashira.



2.Ijy' ikor' ibyo gukiranuka gusa. N'abarenganyw' ikabarengera. Ic' imanza ziboneye zitabera, 
 Kand' igir' imbabazi n'ibambe. Imenyesh' abayubah' inzira zayo Uwitek' atinda kurakara; Umujiny' ntiyawuguman' iteka. Akunda kugirira nez' abe.



3.Uwiteka ntiyatwituy' ibihwanye N'ibicumuro twamucumuye, Kandi nkukw ijuru rye ryitaruy' isi. 
 Ni kw imbabaz' agira zingana. Ibuvazuba n'iburengerazuba.Dor' uko hitaruye kure pe. Niko yajyanye n'ibicumuro byacu Kure yacu. Turamuhimbaza !



4.Nkuko se w'aban' abagirir' ibambe, Ni kw Imana yac' irigirira Abantu bayubaha, kukw izi neza Ubukene bwacu n'intege nke. iz' ubugingo bwacu ko butarama;Buhwanye n'ubwatsi bushiraho. Ntibutinda; si nka za mbabazi zayo, Zo ntizizashir' iteka ryose.



5.Uwitonder' isezerano ry'Imana, Ni ryo ryakomejwe n'amaraso Ayo Yes' Umwana w'Intama yavuye, 
 Kand' akumvir' ibyo yategetse, Niw' ugirirwa neza n'Iman' iteka,  Non' akiri mw isi no mw ijuru,Iman' izamwerek' imbabazi zayo N'umurava no gukiranuka.

title: 335.Umuhanuzi Yesaya Yeretsw' ibyiza kera
lyrics:
335.Umuhanuzi Yesaya Yeretsw' ibyiza kera. Yerekw' Imana mw ijuru Iri mu rusengero : Abakerubi n'Abaserafi
 Bayishyize hagati, Bajya bayishim' iteka, Bayisingiza bati:



2.Mwam' Uwer' Uwer' Uwera:Ibyo mw isi n'ijuru Byuzuyemw ishimwe ryawe, Bose baguhimbaze. Baracyaririmba batyo,
 Kand' abantu bo mw isi Na bo barashim' Imana, Umukiza n'Umwami.



3.Natwe tuyihimbazanye N' abamarayika bose, Tuti : Mwami nyir'ingabo, Ni Wow' usumba byose; Ur' Uwer' Uwer' Uwera :
 Ibyo mw isi n'ijuru Byuzuyemw ishimwe ryawe. Bose baguhimbaze !

title: 336.Mwuka Wera w'Imana
lyrics: 336.Mwuka Wera w'Imana, manukir ubu ! Mena ! Mbumba  Nyuzura ! Nkoresha ! Mwuka Wera w'Imana, Manukir' ubu !

title: 337.Imbabazi z'Umwami wacu Yesu
lyrics:
337.Imbabazi z'Umwami wacu Yesu N'urukundo rw'Imana No kubana n'Umwuka Wera Bibe muri twe, 

twebwe twese : Amen.

title: 338.Mwami, vuga
lyrics:
338.Mwami, vuga, nanjye ndumva
 Ndindiriy' icy' umbwira; Kijya kinezeza cyane, Kimpan' ibicumuro. Mwami, ngutez' amatwi : Icy' unshakaho n' iki ?

title: 339.Non' amaganya yawe yose
lyrics: 339.Non' amaganya yawe yose, Ngwin' uyashyir' Umucunguzi ; Ari ku Ntebe y'Imbabazi, Ngwin' ayakuruhure!

title: 340. Umutima wanjye wizera Kugusaba
lyrics:
340. Umutima wanjye wizera Kugusaba, Mana Data; Unyumvane za mpuhwe zawe.Jye umwana wakugomeye. Ni Wowe wenyine nizeye Kw ari Wow' ump' umugisha.



2.Ndagusanze nguhungiyeho Kukw ari Wowe nizeye. Umpe n'Umwuka wawe wera.Ump' intege ninanirwa, Nimbon' ibyago, nkwizigire K' unyakiran' imbabazi.



3.ku manywa mba mu mucyo wawe; N'ijoro nkakwegamira; No mu gitondo, nki gusenga,Ujy'untegurir' inzira: No mu maryama, Data mwiza, Undinganiriz' iby'ejo.

title: 341.Fat' ukuboko kwanjye
lyrics:
341.Fat' ukuboko kwanjye,—Ungendeshe; Tujyan' ungez' aheza—K' Uwiteka. Sinagir' aho ngera,—Ntagufite.Mwam' ah'ushaka ko njya,— Uhanjyane



2.Ibyago ni bintera.—Mpumuriza; Unturiz' umutima,—Ni mbabara. Naje nguhungiyeho,—Ngo nduhuke :Sintinya turi kumwe,— Mwami wanjye.



3.Ubu naho nahishwa—K' untabara, Nizeye k' unzanjyana.—Ukankiza. End' ukuboko kwanjye,—Unyobore,Tujyan' ungez' aheza—K' Uwiteka.

title: 342. Njye nsindagizwa
lyrics:
342. Njye nsindagizwa n'ukuboko kwawe, Jy' umwana waw' ufit' intege nke. Ni Wowe, Mwami, nisunze wenyine, Nimba naniwe, nta kizanyobya.



2.Njye ntegekeshw' uko kuboko kwawe,
 Nezerewe, ndi no mu makuba. Ngukundish' umutima wanjye wose Kugira ngo mb' uwawe. Mukiza.



3.Njye nkomezwa n'uko kuboko kwawe Mu mutima wanjy' ushidikanya: Reb' agahinda n'ishavu 
 njya ngira Umpumurize, Mwami, ntunsige.

title: 343. Munyabyaha, nturushye se ?
lyrics:
343. Munyabyaha, nturushye se ? Sanga Krisito ! Umv' iri jambo ryiz' avug' ati : Ruhuka!



2.Yes' afit' ibimenyetso Bimutwereka ? N'umutwe n'ibiganza bifite Inkovu.



3.Kw ar' umwami se, nta kamba Yesu yambaye ? Ye namubonye yambay' ikamba Ry'amahwa !



4.Ni mpakwa kur'uwo Mwami, Nzagabirw' iki ? N' ugufatanya na W' imiruho N'intimba !



5.Nimusaba kunyakira,Ntari bumpeze ? Haba na gato, ntiyabikora ! Witinya !



6.Nimwiyeguriraho se,Yamp' umugisha? Umv' abo mw ijuru babihamya. Bati : ye

title: 344.Muze mwese, muz' aho ndi
lyrics:
344.Muze mwese, muz' aho ndi, Abananiwe! Yesu ni kw 'ahamagara . Abo mw isi.

	

2.Si wow' umushak' ahubwo Ni W' ugushaka ! Wi kwirirwa witonganya Uz' uk' uri.

	

3.Dor' ahagaze ku rugi Arakomanga. Ahamaz' iminsi myinshi : Mwinjiz' ubu !

	

4.Ngwin' ureb' iby' Umukiza Agukorera ; Aribugukiz' indwara Z'umutima.



5. Ntutsinzwe se n'urubanza Rw'ibyaha byawe? Rek' akubabarir' ibyo Byaha byose !



6.Yesu kw ar' umunyebambe.Umwangiy' iki ? Ko byatuma yigirayo, Ababaye ?



7.Amaganya yawe yose N'imibabaro,  None byos' abiguture, Uruhuke !

title: 345. Umv' iryo jwi rikwinginga
lyrics:
345. Umv' iryo jwi rikwinginga : N' irya So wo mw ijuru ! Yiriw' aguhamagara : Umwitabe nonaha !
 

ref:Nonaha ... nonaha ...  Sanga Yesu nonaha 
 

2. Ko wamaz' imyaka myinshi Uzerer' uzimiye, Mbese, ntiwaz' uyu munsi  Ni byo bigukwiriye !
 

3. Wabuz' amahoro mw isi; Wuzuy' umubabaro : Banguka, wisunge Yesu; Ni We buruhukiro !
 

4. Bwira Yes' ibyaha byawe, Na W' akubabarire. Herek' ugendane na We, Mu nzir' ijya mw ijuru !

title: 346.Ngwino, witabe Yesu
lyrics:
346.Ngwino, witabe Yesu; Akuri bugufi. Watur' ibyaha byawe, Usang' Umukiza.
 

ref:Haguruka Haguruka  Arakurindira. Wature ibyaha byawe; wakire n'umugisha! Awuguher' ubuntu; Nuk' umusingize 
 

2.Ngwino, witabe Yesu,Uve mu mwijima  Reka gushidikanya : Imins' irahita.
 

3.Ngwino, witabe Yesu, Gend' umuganaho ! Dor' atez' amaboko, Ngw 'akubabarire !
 

4.Ngwino, witabe Yesu :Mbes' uratiny' iki ? Yapfiriy' abagome : Ngwin' umwiringire !

title: 347.Yesu nguriy' ahw ahagaze
lyrics:
347.Yesu nguriy' ahw ahagaze; Dor' ukw aboshywe n'abanzi be  Umva Pilat' arabaz' ati :Yesu mugirire nte ?

 
ref:Uramugenza s'ute ?hitamo nonaha  Naw' utazibaz' ubundi, Uti  Arangenz' ate ?
 

2.Ibyo na non' ubihitemo ! Wabyemera, wamuhinyura, Cyangwa wamwimika wishimye.Uramugirir' ute ?


3. Ubwo Pilato yashakaga Kwirengagiza guhitamo, Byaramunaniye : naw' ibyo Ntibyagushobokera.
 

4.Petero yaramwihakanye; Ni ko guhitamo nabi pe ! Wowe s' ahubwo ntiwakunda Gupfa bamuguhora ?
 

5.Yes' umusubize nez' uti :Nd' uwawe, Mwami, ndakwihaye; Umpe kujy' aho wanyobora, Nishimiy' iby' ukunda !

title: 348.Mbese, mu mutima wawe
lyrics:
348.Mbese, mu mutima wawe, Ntufitiye Yes' ahw aba ? Dor' ahagaze ku rugi :Munyabyaha, mwinjize 
 

ref: Uh' Umwami Yes' ahw aba : Umvir' Ijwi rye ryinginga  Kingur' umutima wawe, Yinjiremo, yimemo 
 

2.Dor' imirimo n'iby'isi Bikwihariy' umutima : Ntagufitemw ahw atura,Nubwo yagupfiriye.
 

3.  Mbes' uracyabuz' uburyo Bwo kwita kur' iryo jwi rye ? we gutind' uyu n'umunsi Wawe wakirizwaho.


4. Uhe Yes' ahw aba none, Kukw imins' ihita vuba, Udatungurwa n'urupfu, Rya jwi rigaceceka !

title: 349.Reba Yesu ku Musaraba
lyrics:
349.Reba Yesu ku Musaraba ; Reb' uko twatumy' agirirwa : Huguka nonah' umwitabe, Umutumbire !
 

ref:Umuhang' amas' ubu: Ni h' uzab' usugiye. Nuk' uyahang' Umusaraba Bamubambyeho.


2.Ibyaha byarakuboshye pe : We kwanga yukw agukiz' ubu ! Emer' aguh' ubugingo bwe : Umutumbire 
 

3.Uyamuhange; yarazutse ! Banguk' uburyo bukiriho. Agutangariz' umucyo we: Umutumbire !
 

4.Ni w' uduhuza n' Imana, Se. Azi gukiz' akiraniwe. Akujy' imber' akuyobore. Umutumbire !

title: 350.Yemw’ abaguzwe n'amaraso
lyrics:
350.Yemw’ abaguzwe n'amaraso Ya Yes' Umucunguzi, Nimuze, mumupfukamire :
 

Ref:Musang' Umwami Usumha byose.
 

2.Dor' isoko y'amaraso ye Yashyizweho ku bwanyu : Mumwitabe ngw aboze namwe :
 

3.Dor' aya mazi y'ubugingo :Nimuze, muyanyweho, Mumwitab' abamar' inyota :
 

4.Kand' intege nke z'umubiri N'imanga y'umutima Bimarwa n'Umusaraba we :
 

5.Mwa ndushyi mwe ziremerewe,Nimwemere, mwihane Ni mworoshy' imitima yanyu !

title: 351.Yemw' abahung' Umukiza
lyrics:
351.Yemw' abahung' Umukiza,Ni nd' ubirukana se  Ariko ni We Mushumba Udushak' intama ze.
 

2.Nkuk' umwunger' ajy' ashaka iyazimiye yose, Uko ni ko Yesu yaje Ngw adupfir' intama ze.
 

3.Mudatiny' ibyaha byanyu :Amaraso ya Yesu, Ayamenekeye twese; Ni y' abyeyura byose !
 

4.Naho byaba byinshi bite, Bikabaremera, Umukiza wacu Yesu Ntazabyibuk' ukundi.
 

5. Yemw' abifuz' ubugingo Butazashir' iteka, Ntimugir' undi musanga : Yes'arabiteguye !
 

6.Mwe gukund' ibyaha byanyu Kubirutisha Yesu, Kuko byatumy' adupfira, Ngo tubane mw ijuru.



7.Muzahabw' ibyiza byose Yadusezeranije, No kudapf' iteka ryose : Muze, mwe gucikanwa 
 

8.Ni Satani waduhumye :Twabay' ibiretwa bye. Noneho, turamucitse; Twitaby' Umucunguzi.
 

9.Yes' Umwami yatubwiye at' Abaremerewe N'abarushye, muz' aho ndi, Mbaruhure by' ukuri !
 

10.Mwami Yesu, sinz' umunsi Uzanjyana mw ijuru. Icyo nzi n' ukuba maso, Ng' unsange niteguye 
 

11.Ubwo tuzager' i Wawe,Tuzanezerwa cyane, Twicaranye nawe, Yesu, Hamwe n'abakijijwe.
 

12. Mwami Yesu, singitinze ; Ubu dore, nditabye. nejejwe n'ubwami bwawe; Tuzabane mw ijuru !

title: 352.Muze kureb' i Gologota
lyrics:
352.Muze kureb' i Gologota Yes' ukw ashinyagurirwa, Murebe Yes' ukundwa na Se Amenets' umutima we.
 

ref:Nitw' apfira ku Musaraba  Tumwizere twihannye. Bantu b'Umwami. mushime Yes' Umucunguzi wanyu 
 

2.Bamwambits' ikamba ry'amahwa: N' ibibi byacu yazize. Ubuntu n'urukundo byawe, Mbe, twabirondora dute ?
 

3.Ni mwumv' ijwi ry' uko yinginga :Ngo, Dat' ubababarire ! Natwe twes' adusabir' atyo, Tw' abanyabyaha yazize.

	

4.Nimwumve mwes' uko gutaka, Uko yatatse cyan' ati : Mbe, Mana yanjye, Mana yanjye, N'iki kikundekesheje ?
 

5.Nimwongere mwumv' iryo jwi rye,Ngo, Byose birarangiye ! Umwuka we wenda guhera Ati : Dat' uz' unyakire !
 

6.Dor' uko tugupfukamiye.Turakuramya, Mukiza. Kand' ibyaremwe byose na byo Bizagusingiza, Yesu.
 

7.Dufatany' ubugingo bumwe,Dushim' Uwadupfiriye. No mu bugingo no mu rupfu, Yesu Mwam' umbwire byose!

title: 353.Amaraso yose y’intama
lyrics:
353.Amaraso yose y’intama n'ihene Y 'ibitambo by'Abayuda Nta cy' atumarira.
 

2.Ariko wa Mwana W'Intama w'Imana Ni We wenyin' ushobora Kudukiz' ibyaha.
 

3.Yabay'igitambo Kiruta bya bindi; Nta yandi maras' ariho Yo kutwoz' ibyaha.
 

4.Ndambits' ikiganza Ku mutwe wa Yesu, Mushyizehw’ ibyaha byanjye, Mbyatuye nihannye.
 

5.Umutwaro wanjye Yarawikoreye,Ari ku Git' amanitswe, Ari jyew' azize.
 

6.Twizeye, dushima Wa Mwana w'lntama, Kuk' umuvumo twarimo Wavuyeho rwose.

title: 354.Man' ishobora byose
lyrics:
354.Man' ishobora byose, Umv' uko nkwinginga : Umpishurire Yesu, Meny' ibyo yankoreye.
 

Ref:Yarahemuwe Ku Musaraba: Mpumur' amaso, ndebe Kw ari jye yazize,
 

2.Mbony' inkon' akubiswe N'amahwa yambaye; Mbonye na za mbereri N'umutim' ucumiswe.
 

3.Yemeye kwiranguza Igikombe kibi : Yakinyoye kubwanjye, Maz' amp' ubugingo bwe.
 

4.Reb' uyu Mucunguzi Urupfu yapfuye  Nta n'ikibi yakoze: Nuko sinzarimbuka !
 

5.Ni jyewe yabambiwe,Uwamugomeye. Yesu, ndagushimiye : Non' uture muri jye.
 

6.Yesu, we kunkundira Ko ngusigirira. Ku Musaraba wawe, Ni ho nkuy' ubugingo.
 

7.Mana, ndagushimira K' utimanye Yesu, Ngw amfire nkiraniwe. Yewe, warankunze pe !

title: 355.Nejejwe n'uko nacunguwe
lyrics:
355.Nejejwe n'uko nacunguwe N'amaraso ya Yesu; Yarankijije : Ndamushima cyane.
 

Ref:Haleluya (x 3) ku Mukiza haleluya (x 3); Amen
 

2.Kand' iyo ntewe na Satani,Maze ngacik' intege, Ninging' Umwami, Na W' akandengera.
 

3.Umutima wanjy' unejejwe N'uko mbonye Umukiza.Nanyuzwe na We, Mu mutima wanjye.
 

4.Urukundo rw' Imana yanjye Runteye kuyikunda :Njya ndwumv' iteka Mu mutima wanjye.
 

5.Munezerwe, mushim' Imana, Yemw' abaz' Umukiza; Mushim' Imana, Mwe, rubanda mwese .

title: 356.Batoboy' ibiganza bye
lyrics:
356.Batoboy' ibiganza bye, Byabumby' imisozi, byaremye byose, Byarambikwaga ku bana bato,Byakizag' indembe n'impumyi nyinshi.



2.Batoboy' ibirenge bye, Byatambagiye ku nyenyeri zose, Byagendagenze no mw isi yacu. 
 Bisur' abakene n'abanyabyaha.



3.Bacumis' umutima we, Wakundag' indushyi n'aboroheje; Uvamw amaraso yoz' ibyaha, Atemba nk'uruzi kubwac' ababi.



4.Uwo mutima wa Yesu N'ingingo ze nziza byaziz' iki se ? Ni jye byazize n'ibyaha byanjye,I Gologota, ku Musaraba we.



5.Uko ndi, Yes’ unyakire, Ingingo zanjye n'umutima wanjye, Ko wanshunguye, nakwiyima nte ?Njye nkor' iby’ukunda, mb' imbata yawe!

title: 357. ubwo nari nshinjirijwe cyane Na Satani
lyrics:
357. ubwo nari nshinjirijwe cyane Na Satani n'ibyaha byanjye, Haj' Umwami Yes' arakomanga, Ati : Kanguk'unkingurire !
 

ref:Ati: Kingura !Kingura ! Nkingurira, nkwinjiremo ! Umutima waw' uranezerwa, Wemeye yuko nkwinjiramo.
 

2.Yarandaritse mu birori bye, Ngo dusangir' ibyiz' afite; Maze, ndanyurwa, ndamuhimbaza :Sinavug' ibyo yankoreye !
 

3.Ku rugamba rwanjye na Satani, Yesu ni We ngab' inkingira. Kuba muri We byarantinyuye,Ajy'ansubizamw imbaraga.
 

4.Ni we Mwungeri mwiz' undagira, Nta cyo nkena, ndi kumwe na We. Nd' ino mw is' itek' aranyobora:Nyuma, nzasugira mu nzu ye.

title: 358.Twemere Yesu
lyrics:
358.Twemere Yesu—Ko yaje mw isi Kutubwir' amahoro ye. Ni We nshuti nziza.—I Gologota,Yahaw' abazimiye.Mpora nizera,—N'ubu nizeye Yuko Yesu yampfiriye; Ku Musaraba,—Yaranesheje; Ambohora mwizeye.



2.Inzira yanjye—Ni Yesu wanjye;Anjyan' aho yangeneye. N' umugiraneza;—Nta muntu n'umwe Yanga guh' agakiza Mpora nizera,
 —N'ubu nizeye Yuko Yesu yamfiriye; Ku Musaraba,—Yaranesheje; Ambohora mwizeye.



3.Mwami w'ubuntu,—Uhimbarizwe Kuk' uturarik' iteka. Tukwitabe twese,—Twumv' ijwi ryawe Rihamagara hose.

 Twizere twese,—Twe guhinyura Ko Yesu yadupfiriye; Ku Musaraba,—Yaranesheje; Abohor' abizeye

title: 359.Iyo ntinye ko kwizera Kwanjy' ari guke
lyrics:
359.Iyo ntinye ko kwizera Kwanjy' ari guke, Kand’ iyo ngiye kuneshwa, Yesu ni W' umfata.
 

Ref:Yes' aramfata, Akankomeza, Kukw ankunda bihebuje : Arankomeza.
 

2.Urukundo rwanjye ruke Ntirwamufata. Sinamugundir' ubwanjye : Yesu ni W' umfata.
 

3.Ntiyandeka, kukw ankunda.Nubwo ndi mubi; Anyishimir' ubwo nd' uwe ; itek' aramfata.
 

4.Ntiyakundir' ubugingo Bwanjye kubura; Yabucunguj' igiciro : Itek' aramfata

title: 360. Rukundo rwinshi
lyrics:
360. Rukundo rwinshi,—Buntu butarutwa, Umwami Yesu—Kw agiriwe nabi, Akubitirwa—Ibibi nakoze ngw’ anshungure rwose:—Abishimirwe
 

ref:Ubuntu bwawe—Bumfasha, Mwami.  Busumba cyane—Impano zose. Njya ntekereza,—Nkir' aha mw isi, Ubwo buntu bwinshi—Bwanshunguye 
 

2.Kand’ iyo ngoswe—N'umwijima mwinshi Inshuti yanjye—Imfat’ ukuboko; Singitiny' ubwo,—Ari y' imfashije : Ntumbira mw ijuru,—Yes' antinyuye.
 

3.Umusaraba—Wawe ni w' unkiza; Ni W' unduhura—Rwos' imibabaro. N' ubuhungiro—Bwanjye buhoraho; Umbera n'icyiru—Ku Mucamanza.

title: 361.Uwo njya nikomezaho
lyrics:
361.Uwo njya nikomezaho, Nta wundi, ni Krisito. Reka mubashimire, nti :Yesu ni W' umpagije. Yanyitangiye hw icyiru,
 Angur' amaraso ye; Nukw anyuzuza n'Imana : Yesu ni W' umpagije.



2.Nubw' ab' is’ ar' abatunzi,Yesu ni W’ umpagije. Bafit’ iby'igihe gito : Arampaza wenyine. Nta mugish' uri mu by'isi :
 N’ umuram' utumuka. Ibya Yesu ntibishira : Arampaza wenyine.



3.Naho naba mu bukene,Yesu ni W' umpagije. Naho napfush' ibyo nkunda,
 Arampaza wenyine. Nahw imirima yarumba, Singir' icyo nsoroma, Naho napfush' amatungo, Arampaza wenyine.



4.Naho naterwa n'Umwanzi, Yesu ni W' umpagije. Nzajya nesha kubwa Yesu : Arampaza wenyine. 
 Naho nahanwa n'inshuti, Ni ko bamumereye. Ni We nshut' irut' izindi : Arampaza wenyine.



5.Ubwo nzagera mu rupfu. Yes' azab'ampagije. Azanjyan' i We, nduhuke : Yes' azab'ampagije. Nzaba nambutse rwa Ruzi,
 Nzamutse, njya mw ijuru. Nzamwirebera mu maso : Yes' azab'ampagije.

title: 362.iyi s’ izashira
lyrics:
362.iyi s’ izashira :Yesu n' uwanjye; Nubwo byose byabura, Yes' uwo n' uwanjye ! Ubu harijimye :ntiturareb' i We.Tuzanezerwa cyane, Ni tubana na We.
 

2.Sinzajya nanirwa :Yesu n’ uwanjye; Nzatsind' amoshya yose, Yes' ubw' ar' uwanjye. Byose ni bishira, Nta cyo bizantwara : Uzansang’ amahoro. Yes' ubw'ur’ uwanjye.
 

3.Hoshi, mwe nzozi mbi !Yesu n’ uwanjye; Naho bwatinda gucya ,
 Yes' uwo n' uwanjye ! Umutima wanjye Yarawuhagije; Ubu ndi kumwe na We : Yes’ uwo n' uwanjye !
 

4.Genda, wa rupfu we : Yesu n' uwanjye ! Nzahoranaho na We :
 Yes' uwo n' uwanjye ! Kand' urukundo rwe N'iby' ajy'ankorera, Ni byo binyereka ko Yes' uw' ar’ uwanjye.

title: 363.Jye mpisemo Yesu
lyrics:
363.Jye mpisemo Yesu; murutish' iyi si yose; Andutir' amafaranga cyangw' izahabu.
 Jye nkund' Uwabambwe, murutisha n'amatungo. Andutira n'amasambu n'amazu meza.



Ref:Uwanyimika, nkab' Umwami w'ishyanga rinini rite, Nd’imbata y'icyaha cyose,
 sinabikunda. Ahubwo niragije Yes' Umukunzi wanjye : Sinkita ku biri mw Isi: Yes' aranyuze !



2.Jye mpisemo Yes' Umucunguzi wanjy' unkunda; Andutira no gushimwa n'ab'isi bose. Umv’ icyo nifuza : 
 sinshaka kumenyekana; Njye nyobok’ Umwami Yesu iminsi yose. 



3. Andyohera cyane : nta buki buryoha nka We; Ni mwiza; n' uw'igikundiro cyinshi cyane;
 Ahumura neza kurush' ibirabyo byose : Nabur' iki se, mufite, kw andangirije?

title: 364. Yes' Umwami ndamubonye
lyrics:
364. Yes' Umwami ndamubonye, Kandi sinkimwimura; Yemeye kunyoz' i byaha Byambuzag' ubugingo.



Ref:Nta kirut' Umwami Yesu Mw’ isi cyangwa mw ijuru. Ni We watuguz' amaraso Kera ku Musaraba.



2. Amaras' arantangaza : Yarampembuye mpfuye. Ampesh' amahoro menshi No kubaho kw'iteka.
 

3.Ubwo wampinduy' umwana, Non' umpindur' ingeso, Kugira ng’ undeba wese Aguhimbaze, Yesu.
 

4.Ndagushima ko wanshatse Kandi ko wantaruye, Ukanyogesh' amaraso Kubw’ imbabazi zawe.
 

5.Mwami Yes' ump' urukundo, Rwo wakunz' abo mw isi. Umpe kugukunda rwose, Nkunde n'abawe bose.
 

6.Warampfiriye, Mukiza : Noneho, mpfane nawe ! Kand' usohoze muri jye ibyo kugushimisha.

title: 365.Mwami, nubwo nd' umunyabyaha
lyrics:
365.Mwami, nubwo nd' umunyabyaha,Njya mpora nkwinginga : Mana, wumve gusaba kwanjye, Unze mu mutima.
 

2.Narambiwe gukund' ibyaha Bituma nshumura; Ahubw' Umwuka wawe Wera Ab' ari Wo ntunga.
 

3.Kera najyaga nshidikanya :Ntacyo byanyunguye; None nshaka ko tuvugana, Nkureba, nkumvira.
 

4.Ndashaka kwaka cyane, Mwami,Murikirwa nawe ; Umwuka waw' ufash' uwanjye, Nkund' uko wankunze.
 

5.N'ukuri, Mwam' ubwo niyobya,Washaka wampana, Kuk' umutima mubi nk'uyu Utabana nawe.
 

6.Kand' amaraso yawe, Mwami,Nzi ko yamviriye. Twuzure rwose, ndabyifuza, Uk' ubinshakira.
 

7.Ni byo nsigaye njya nifuza;Mwami, ndakwinginze, Mbeshweho n'ubugingo bwawe, Kubwawe wenyine.

title: 366. Ngutuy' ubugingo bwanjye
lyrics:
366. Ngutuy' ubugingo bwanjye, Yesu, Mwana w' Imana; Ubwakire n'urukundo, Ngo bub' ubwaw' iteka.Nkuzaniy' ibyaha byanjye N'umutim' unangiwe : Mu maraso wamviriye, Unyoze, Mucunguzi.



2.Uz' uko mpora nirwanya Ngo nkomez' umutima; Uz' uko nari merewe N'ishavu n'agahinda. Ububasha bwawe. Mwami,
 Bundokore mu byaha Kand' Umwuka w'ubugingo Ujy' unkura mu bibi.



3.Nemeye kwitanga rwose,Nta cyo nishigarije; Mpisemo kujyana nawe No kukumvira, yesu. Njye nkuyobokan' ishimwe Kukw ari wow' ubimpa; Ujy' unyobor' inzir' ijya Mu bwami bwawe bwiza.



4.Reb' uyu muhigo mpize Nibwo nzivuguruza. Wukomeresh' amaraso N'urukundo wankunze. Itek' iyo nirebyeho,
 Ndiheba, nkazimira; Ariko kuk' ujy'unkunda, Uzamfasha, Mukiza.

title: 367.Yesu ndakwitabye
lyrics:
367.Yesu ndakwitabye,—Ntakwiriye : Imbabazi zawe—Zirantinyuye.Mfit' ibicumuro—Byuzuye muri jye; 
 Niringiye gusa—Ko wampfiriye.



2.Ibyo nacumuye—Ndabyihannye. Kand' uko ndi kose—Simbiguhishe.Nuk' unyuhagize—Amaraso yawe,Nyogemo, ntungane,—Ico rimvemo.



3.Mwami, mbabarira;—Ndakwizeye. Nkwikubis' imbere;—Ndakwiringiye. Amaraso yawe—Y'Umwana w'intama Anyoz' antembeho,—Anyeze dede !



4.Nuko, ndanezerwa;—Mb’ amahoro; Njyana n'Uwo nkunda,—Ntaramubona;Itek' uko ntewe—N'iby'isi n'ibyaha. Negamira Yesu,— Bikanesheka.

title: 368.Bene Data bizeye Yesu
lyrics:
368.Bene Data bizeye Yesu, Umucunguzi wacu mwiza, Mwitange mutagabanije, Nubwo benshi babinaniwe.
 

Ref:Aheza mw ijuru  Tuzahurirayo, bagenzi.x2 
 

2.Mwe gutinya ! Yes’ ubwe ni We Waneshej' urupfu n'ibyaha. Mwirinde, mwe guh' abanzi be Urwitwazo rwo kumutuka.
 

3.Yemw' ababyaw' ubwa kabiri, Yesu ni We mukunzi wacu; Ni We nzira y'abamukunda; Ni We mukuru w'ubugingo.
 

4.Yemw' abacunguwe na Yesu. Mugacunguzw’ amaraso ye. Yababohoye kwa Satani, Ababohoj' amaraso ye.
 

5.Tur' ishyanga rye yironkeye, Yadukuye ku Musaraba.Az' adushoreye hw iminyago : None, tujye tumunezeza !
 

6.Ntimugafatanye n'iby'isi; Mwemere kozwa n'amaraso: Mujye mwuzur' Umwuka Wera. Ibyo ni byo bimunezeza.
 

7.Yemw' abatura, ntimwihane, Mwe gushavuz' Umucunguzi ! Murabuz' abandi kwihana; Mukingiran’ Umwuka Wera !
 

8.Yes' umugabe w'ubugingo, Ni we twese dutegereje. Ntituzongera gushoberwa Nk'abatahaw' Umwuka Wera.

title: 369.Ngukunde Yesu
lyrics:
369.Ngukunde Yesu Mwami wanjye,Mukiza wanjye, ngukunde; Ngukunde, nkor' ibyo gushimwa N’ibikunezeza byose, 
 Ngeze ku munsi wo gupfa, Yesu, nkigukunda !



2.Nta wundi ngir' uhwanye nawe kuk' ungwiriz' imbabazi; Ngukunde, Yesu, ngushimishe Akanwa, no mu mutima. 
 Ni Wowe Yes’ ukuraho Ibyaha by'abantu.



3. Ngukunde. Yesu Databuja, Mwana w' Imana Rurema; Ngukundish’ imbaraga zose, Nahw amakub' ari menshi,Ngeze ku munsi wo gupfa, Yesu, nkigukunda !

title: 370.Urampamagara, Yesu
lyrics:
370.Urampamagara, Yesu, Kuk' uz' izina ryanjye; Nanjy' uwagucumuyeho Ubu ndihannye rwose.
 

2.Nshaka kukwiyegurira :mber' Umwungeri, Mwami; Ujy’ undagir' uk' ushaka. Kand' unyikenurire.
 

3.Wemeye kwitanga rwose Ng' unkize, Yesu wanjye; Iyo neza yaw' ishimwe, Naw' ushimishwe, Mwami.
 

4.Witinya, mutima wanjye,Yes' arakujy' imbere : Mu kubaho kwawe kose, Nta kizamukunyaga.

title: 371.Yesu, nd' uwawe
lyrics:
371.Yesu, nd' uwawe : nyakira N'ibyanjye mfite byose. Njye ngukunda, nkwizigire, Nkomeze nkuyoboke.
 

Ref:Nguhay' ibyanjye, Uko bingana. Mwami wanjye mwiz' unkunda, Unyiharire !
 

2.Yesu nd' uwawe : nyakira,Niyoroshye, nkuramye. Mpaz' ibyishimo byo mw isi. Ubu, Yes' unyakire.
 

3.Yesu nd' uwawe : nyakira Ngir' uwawe by’ukuri Tum' Umwuka Wer’ ambwire Yuko naw' ur’ uwanjye.
 

4.Byose maze kubiguha;Numv' umpay' umwet' ubu. Nsingiz' ubwo buntu bwawe. Nkuramye bihimbaje.

title: 372.Nyigiza hafi, Mwami Yesu
lyrics:
372.Nyigiza hafi, Mwami Yesu; Nyakira, Yesu, nguhungiyeho.Mbumbatiz' amaboko yawe, Ni ho handutir' ahandi hose. ( x 2)
 

2.Nyigiza hafi, Mwami wanjye : Nta turo ryiza nkuzaniy’ ubu.Nzany' umutima wanjye mubi; Uwuhagiz' amaraso yawe. (x2)
 

3.Nyigiza hafi y’ Uwambambiwe ! Nihanny' ibyaha n'iby'isoni nke.Nzinutsw' ibyo nishimiraga. Ni Wowe nshaka, Yesu wenyine ! (x 2)
 

4. Iminsi yose, njye nkwegera, Ngez' ubwo nzager' i Wawe, Yesu Maze, mu bwami budashira, Nzakubahw akaramata, Yesu. (x 2)

title: 373.Harihw’icyo nkwaka Mwami
lyrics:
373.Harihw’icyo nkwaka Mwami Nubwo mpora ngucumuraho Mwami unyeze unyejeshe Amazi cyangw’umuriro
 

ref:Mpanagurwe hose Mwami N’umuriro nib’ushaka Nkir’ibyaha birimburwe Nkir’ibyaha birimburwe
 

2.Nuntunganiriza ubwenge Nzanezerwa,nzaguhimbaza Arik’umutima wera Ndawushaka kurutaho
 

3.Ninezw’umutima wanjye Ni bwo nzunguk’ubwenge bwose Bwo mw’ijuru bwo mw’ijuru Mwami mbubwirijwe na We
 

4.Ngerageza uko nshobora Kwibuza inama mbi z’ibyaha Nyamara njya mbyibonamo Jy’umboneza,jy’umboneza

title: 374.Uyu mwana w'uruhinja ni nde
lyrics:
374.Uyu mwana w'uruhinja ni nde,Wabyawe n'umukene? Dor' aryamye mu kiraro cy'inka Kukw icumbi ryabuze. 
 N' Umuremyi w’isi yose;Ni W' uhindutse muto; N' Uwiteka Nyirigira Utaremw’ udashira.



2.Uyu ni nde wishwe n'agahinda,Wuzuy' umubabaro, Uj' ashak' imbata za Satani, Byos' abyihanganira ?Ni We Mana yacu nziza idutunganiriza lbibanza byo mw ijuru N'ibyishimo by'iteka.

	

3.Uyu ni nd' uv’ amaraso cyane,Agahemurwa rwose, Agakubitw' ibipfunsi n'inshyi, Ntagir' umurengera? 
 Ni We Man’ ih' imigisha Abo yicunguriye, Kand' izacir’ urubanza Abayisuzuguye.

	

4.Uyu ni nd' ubambwe n'abagome Hagati y'abambuzi? Dor’ afit’ amahwa mu ruhanga : Arashinyagurirwa !Ni We Mana yimy’ iteka Mw ijuru ryera rya Se, Igahimbazwa n'abera Yacunguj' amaraso.

title: 375.Habay’umunsi w’ishimwe mw’ijuru
lyrics:
375.Habay’umunsi w’ishimwe mw’ijuru Yesu yitanga ngw’agere mw’isi Aza kubyarwa n’umwar’utunganye Uwer’aturana natw’ababi
 

ref:Dore urukundo rwatumy’ampfira Ibyaha byanjy’abibamba mu mva Maz’arazuka ngo ampuze na Se Nagaruka nzamushimir’ibyo
 

2.Habay’umunsi babamb’Umukiza I Gologota ku Musaraba Ahemurw’avumw’atukwa n’abantu Yikorera ibyaha byanjye byose
 

3.Habay’umuns’aruhukira mu mva Harindwa n’abamarayika be Niko yitanze ngo amber’Umukiza Bihebe mwese,mumwiringire
 

4.Habay’umunsi satan’aratsindwa Ntiyaheza Yesu mu gituro Nukw’arazuka,urupf’arutsinze,none ari mw’ijuru iburyo bwa Se
 

5.Hazab’umunsi tuzumv’ah’impanda Harabagiran’ijuru ryose Yes’uwo azaza mu bwiza bwe bwose Azim’ingoma uwo Mwami wanjye

title: 376. Mwami Yesu, Nyir'ubuntu
lyrics:
376. Mwami Yesu, Nyir'ubuntu n'ibambe, Menyesh' icyakwemeje Wa Musaraba kera !Ni kubwawe, mwana, Nemeye gutukwa No guhemurwa ntyo, Nzir' ibyaha byawe.



2.Mwami Yesu, Nyir'ubuntu n'ibambe. Dor' ibyaha nakoze ! Ndaje, nsaby' imbabazi.inshyi nakubiswe,Mwana, n'imibyimba, Ndetse n'imbereri, Ni byo bwishyu bwawe !



3.Mwami Yesu, Nyir'ubuntu n'ibambe, Nyuhagiz' amaraso, Ntungane mu mutima !
 Mwana, banshumise, Burya, mu rubavu !Shyiramw ibyo byaha Ngo bisibangane !



4.Mwami Yesu, Nyir'ubuntu n'ibambe, Ubwo wambabariye, Noneho ndakwihaye.
 umva,mwana nkunda,nagucunguriye ng'ub'uwanjye rwose utagir'inenge!

title: 377. Reka twongere twishimire
lyrics:
377. Reka twongere twishimire Rwa rukundo rudahinduka N'amaraso twahongerewe Ku Musarab' i Gologota.
 

ref: Twogez' ibya Yesu Tumusingiz' iteka ryose! Twogez' Ibya Yesu, Kugez' ubwo tuzaban' i we
 

2.Muze mwese, mwitabe Yesu, Mwisuke mu maraso none, Mwakir' ubuntu n'imbabazi, Mubiheshwe na za ntimba ze.
 

3.Turi mw isi, tunezererwa Imigisha dusogongeye, Ariko ni tumwirebera, Tuzicwa n'umunezero pe !
 

4.Tujye twambar' iryo zina rye, Tumukurikire mu nzira.Yes' azaza mu minsi mike; Tuzajya kumusanganira.
 

5.Yesu, wez' imitima yacu, Twuzure na bagenzi bacu, Ni ho tuzaba twiteguye Kugusanganir' ugarutse.

title: 378.Nuzuy' umunezero
lyrics:
378.Nuzuy' umunezero Kuko maze kozwa de Mu maraso ya Yesu Y'igiciro kinini.
 

ref:Yes' ushimirwe Ko wankijije !
 

2.Urukundo rwa Yesu Na bwa buntu bwe bwinshi Bisumb' uko twibwira; Bidukiz' imitima.
 

3.Mana, ndagushimira Urukundo wankunze : Waduhay' Umukiza Ngw adukiz' umuriro.
 

4.None, turabinginze,he kub' uwo muri mwe Utita ku mbabazi Z'Umucunguzi wacu.
 

5.umv' icy' icyo agushakaho:wihane ubabarirwe,umutima uwinjize mu maraso ya yesu.

title: 379.Umutim' ukomerekejwe
lyrics:
379.Umutim' ukomerekejwe,Utari womorwa, Ikiganza cyatobowe Ni cyo cyawomora.
 

2.iy' umutim' uremerewe,Hatemb' amarira, Har' umutim' umwe musa Wawuhumuriza.
 

3.Umuns' iy' ababajwe cyane N'icyaha yakoze, Isok' imwe y'amaraso Yamwoz' akera de !
 

4.Ayo maraso n' aya Yesu;Cya kiganza n' icye; Wa mutima w'imbabazi Nawo n' uwa Yesu.
 

5.Utwerek' ibyo. biganza bye Byatobowe, Mana; Duhungir' ibyaha byacu Mur'izo nkovu ze !

title: 380 .Nubwo ntsizwe n'ibyaha
lyrics:
380.Nubwo ntsizwe n'ibyaha, Yesu yarankijije; Yamviriy' amaraso, Angura n'urupf' atyo. Tuzab' akaramata, Ak'ishami n'igiti 
 

2.Urukundo rwa Yesu Rusaguts' ikirere ! Nta cyo twarugeraho : Ruzagumahw iteka. Ni We warumbwirije: Jye nubwo nari nduzi.
 

3.Nubwo ntsizwe n'ibyaha. Yes' andutira byose; Az' ibyo nkennye byose; Az' umubabaro; Namuberey' imbata: Nta cyago cyampangara.

title: 381.Yes' avukiye mw isi
lyrics:
381.Yes' avukiye mw isi, Yakuriye muri yo, Yigishwa n' Imana, Se, Gusobanukirw' isi.
 

2.Yesu yitegereje Ubugome bwo mw isi; Areby' uko bungana, Arababara rwose.
 

3.Nukw asang' ab'iyi si Banze gukiranuka; Bamuyoberwa rwose, Bati : Si we mukiza.
 

4.Yes' abony' ibyo byose Arabababarira,Ngo n' abo gucungurwa No kubon' igitambo.
 

5.Nukw amenya kw ari We Uwiteka yatanze Kubaber' igitambo Cyo kubahongerera.
 

6.Ntiyashidikany' ubwo, Yemera guhemurwa, Yiteguzwa n'Imana Kudupfir' abo mw isi.
 

7.Maz' abantu bo mw isi Bamubamba ku giti, Bamubabaza cyane :Ni ko yadukijije.
 

8.Mwami Yes' ushimirwe Ubwo buntu wagize! Wemeye kumbambirwa : Nzahora ngusingiza !

title: 382.Yes' aduh' amahoro
lyrics:
382.Yes' aduh' amahoro byukuri, Ahor'ayaduhesh' amaraso ye.
 

2.Nta mirimo se yayatwambura ? Yes' ahor'aruhur' abamwumvira.
 

3.Twayagira, tutaz' ibizaba ? Tuzi Yesu kw ari W' utwara byose !
 

4.Nta byago byadukur' imitima; Nta bwoba bagir' abamwihishemo.
 

5.Inshuti nubwo tutari kumwe, Nkukw aturind' arazirinda nazo.
 

6.Mu rupfu azaduh' amahoro ye : Rwaneshejwe n'Umutabazi wacu 
 

7.Ibyago byo mw isi bizashira, Umwam' atwinjize mu mahoro ye.

title: 383.Icyamp' ukanyikorerera
lyrics:
383.Icyamp' ukanyikorerera Amaganya yanjye yose, Yesu, Ngaturiz' Uwiteka, Nkamenya yukw ibyanjye byose Ubitegekesh'ubugwaneza N'ubwenge burutaho.



2. Kenshi ntiny' ibiribubeho, Ngahagarik' umutima, Mwami, Ngize kwizera guke.Icyampa nkarorera rwose Kwishingikiriza 
 ku by'iyi si, Nkakwizera wenyine.



3.Nabuzwa n'iki kuyisaba, Nkajya nyisunga, nkayikoreza Ayo maganya yose,Ngahumurizwa no kumenya Yuko Dat' ugaburir' inyoni Azanyumvira nanjye ?



4.Ntitwizer' uko bikwiriye; Umutim' uhagaz' ujugunya Rwos' amahoro yawo. Arikw inyoni n'uburabyo Binyigisha 
 k' umuns' ukwiriwe N'ibyawo byago gusa.



5.Umpe kumeny' ibyo nigishwa N'uburabyo n'inyoni, Mukiza, Nkwishingikirizeho ! Ngez' ah' ushaka, Mushorera, 
 Nuko menye, nkiri mu makuba, Amahor' adashira.

title: 384.Ben' Imana yizerwa
lyrics:
384.Ben' Imana yizerwa,Twiyonger' umwete; Maz' imbaraga zacu Tuzih' Umukiza Kuko yatwihaye.Dusingize dushima 
 Ubwiza n'urukundo By'Umwam' udukiza. x 2



2.Abashavuye mwese,Muze mudatinya : Abasenga bizeye Barahumurizwa. Umuvunyi Yesu Ni W' urengera bose,Kukw ar' umunyaneza; Ntabw' azabahana.  x 2



3.Yesu n' inshuti yacu; Tujye tumwinginga; Maze, mu byago byacu Ajy'aturengera. Ni W' uturerera Ubugingo twahawe, 
 Mu butunzi bwe, twese Akadukenura. x 2

title: 385.Murinzi we menyesha inzira
lyrics:
385.Murinzi we menyesha inzira Iwacu se n’i muhero? At’ijoro ryijimye cyane Buracya hanyuma
 Ntukarire,ukomeze,Nturorere kwiringira Kugez’igihe uzagerayo Ku muns’uhoraho



2.Murwanyi we,cyo mbwira nawe Ansubiza yitonz’ati Dore urugamba rurashira Guma mu ntambara Ntubabare wihangane wirek’imirimo yawe tuzabona igihembo cyiza nidutabaruka



3.Ndacyabaza ibyaremwe byose Binsubiza bitya biti: Iyi si yacu iza gushira Haz’ind’ihoraho
 Umeny’ibyo bimenyetso Bigaragaza kuza kwe Kand’ibyaremwe uko bingana Byitez’impanda ye



4.Twishime mu mitima yacu kukw’imuhira ari hafi.Duhumure,tuzaruhuka Tutakibabara Ntukarire,tuzabana Ibyago bizashira
 Ntituzaburay’amahoro Kwa Yesu mw’ijuru.

title: 386.Ntukajy'urambirwa ku mwizera
lyrics:
386.Ntukajy'urambirwa  ku mwizera,naho wababazwa  n'iby'umubiri. dor'agufitiye  ikamba ryiza pe,ikamba ryiza pe, ritangirika.
 

2.yemwe mwa nshuti mwe  mwicogora igihe ni gito tukaruhuka. tuzajya mw'ijuru  tube tutagipfa:twitange noneho   twe gucogora!
 

3.isi y'umwijima  izashira.ntabwo tuzongera  no kubabazwa. tuzaka nk'izuba, turabagirana, turebe cya giti cy'ubugingw'i we.
 

4.nuko mwa nshuti mwe,  mwibabara.naho mwarambirwa n'iby'iyi si mbi tuzumv'impund' ubwo,ni dutabaruka; ni bwo tuzashira umubabaro.

title: 387.Yesu n' ubugingo bwacu
lyrics:
387.Yesu n' ubugingo bwacu; Aduh' amahoro ye. Ni We rembo twinjiramo,Tukagera kwa Data, iyo tubuz' amahoro, Tuba tumuvuyeho.

 Tumwizere, ni we Nshuti; Twe kubur' amahoro !



2.Dor' ikizan' ubukonje N' ukutihan' ibyaha, Bikaguma mu mutima, Bikazinur' Umwuka. Yemw' abifuz' ubugingo,
 Mwe kuguma mu byaha  Yesu yaradupfiriye : Nta cyatuma dukonja !



3. Ni dutungurwa n'iby'isi, Tukabeshywa n'Umubi Yuko twigirir' umwete,Tukang' Umusaraba, Twang' iyo nzira — s' iyacu 
 Tuzagenda nka Yesu, Yambitsw' ikamba ry'amahwa, Yemey' Umusaraba. 



4. Mur'iyi si, si hw i wacu; Tuyinyuramo gusa. Tuyigendemo nka Yesu,Wemey' Umusaraba. Tuzi ko yisiz' ubusa,
 Nta n'icyo yisigiye, Kandi nta n'icyah' afite : Ni twe yaj' acungura.



5. Kuger' ikirenge mu cye. Emer' Umusaraba; Rek' ibir' inyum' iy' uva,Witiny' ibir' imbere. Yes' ubwe ni W' ur' imbere.
 Ari W' utubeshaho; Ni We no kunesha kwacu : Turabimushimiye.



6.kubw'abanze kwiha Yesu inzir' irakomeye.arikw' irimw' amaraso; ni y'ajy'adutsindira.none abatagira Yesu bazajya bananirwa:
 umubiri ntabwo uneshwa;ntunezez'uwiteka.



7.non'abemeye kwitanga kwemera umusaraba,amaras'abera mashya ukunda kumwumvira.
 mu makuba no mu byiza,tuzagendana na we.ntabw'azaduhemukira.kuko yabinesheje.

title: 388.Tunganir’Imana
lyrics:
388.Tunganir’Imana ubudasiba Jy’uhora uyisenga Kand’uyumvire Jy’ubana n’abayo,jy’ufash iindushyi Ntusibe na rimwe kuyikorera
 

2.Tunganir’Imana Jy’ubana nayo Nutumbira Yesu Uzaba nka We Bose bazamenya k’ubana na We Barek’ubugome Bitabe Yesu
 

3.Tunganir’Imana, ikuyobore N’uterwa n’ibyago,jy’usanga Yesu Ntiyirengagiza,umwiyambaza Uyoboke Yesu ni we Shobuja
 

4.Tunganir’ Imana,tuz’umutima Muby’ukora byose wihutiraho Jya wumvir’ Umwuka Gwiz’urukundo Nta son’uzagira,n’ubona Yesu

title: 389.Wa Mukristo muto we
lyrics:
389.Wa Mukristo muto we, Ujy'utiny' iby'abandi; Wibikoraho rwose, Haba no kubyifuza !
 

2.Byos' ibitar' ibyawe, Ntubikoreho rwose, Naho bizaba bike, Bidafit' igiciro.
 

3.Uwo Yes' akijije. Bimuber' umuziro; Yize no gutegeka Amaboko n'amaso.
 

4.Naho wab' umukene, Wemer' ibyo wahawe; Gendana na Shobuja, Itek' unezerewe.
 

5.Zinukw' ibibuzanywa, iby' Umwami w'iyi si Ajy'arimbuza benshi, Ababuz' ubugingo.
 

6.Izer' Umucunguzi, Ub' uwo kwiringirwa! Birut' ubutegetsi N'ubutunzi bwo mw isi.
 

7.Kand' uhore wibuka Ko yasezerany' ati : Uzanesha kubwanjye Azabona kuzuka.

title: 390. Ngabo z'umwete, mubyuke
lyrics:
390. Ngabo z'umwete, mubyuke, Nimurwanir' Umwami; Mwatoranijwe n'Imana :Kubwayo muranesha. 
 Mwitegure mu mitima, Mwirind' ibibashika; Isi muyigandurire Yes' Umwami w'abami.



2.Mubwiriz' ab'isi bose Urukundo rw'Imana; Abatuye mu mwijima Mubabwir' iby'umucyo. Abayobye batizera,
 Muti : Mwemere Yesu, Kukw akunda guhabura Imitim' izimiye.



3.Mujye mu bihugu byose,Mubwiriz' iby'Umwami; Mujyan' Umwuka we Wera; Muzavug' ibye neza, I torero rye rigwire
 Mu bari mw isi yose: Izina ry'Umwami Yesu Ripfukamirwe hose.



4.Hahirw' abizey' Umwami,Bakamubabarizwa; Bazabon' ingororano Umuns' azagaruka : Baziman' iteka ryose
 Hamwe n'Umwami Yesu, Mu bwami bwe budashira, Kuko bamukoreye.

title: 391.Kugeza gupfa, tuzakuyoboka
lyrics:
391.Kugeza gupfa, tuzakuyoboka: Kugeza gupf' ur' Umwami wacu. Duhagaritswe kw ibendera yawe ; 
 Tuzahapfira tukwiringiye.



ref:Kugeza gupfa, turwan' intambara; Ni kw ingabo z'Umwami zinesha; Kugeza gupf' Umusaraba wawe N' Ibendera yac' abacunguwe.



2. Kubwawe, Yesu, ni byiza kubaho; Inzira yaw' iratworohera. Ni nde wakwanga kugukurikira, 
 Wowe, Mukiza wadupfiriye?



3. Kugeza gupfa, dutegekwe nawe. Ubw' uriho, tuzabaho natwe ! Wumviy' Imana, ntiwanga no gupfa, Ndets' udupfira n'urupfu rubi.



4.Mukiz' uz' intege nke zacu rwose; tuzi ko twagwa mu nzira yacu, N' utaza gusohoz' isezerano Ryo kuturengera, tukiriho


5.Umwuka waw' udushorer' iteka,Kand' imitima yac' iwumvire, Ngo tub' ubwoko bwaneshej' urupfu Kubwawe, Yesu wadupfiriye!

title: 392.Basirikare ba Kristo
lyrics:
392.Basirikare ba Kristo, mubyuke, Murasane n'isi n'umubiri n'Umubi; Muze murwan' iyo ntambara nziza :Dor' ibendera mwahawe n' Umusaraba. Nimumuyoboke ! Arabarengera ! Tumufite, tuzanesh' Umwanzi Satani.



2.Ntumwa za Yesu, ngo, Mwese mugende,Mujye mu bihugu byose byo mur'iyi si. Mwumvish' abaremwe bos' ubutumwa,
 Muti : Yesu yabacunguj' amaraso ye. Muti : Mumwemere, nukw ababature! Ni We wadutumye kubwa rwa rukundo rwe.



3.Yemwe Bakristo, mubyuke n'ingoga! Nimucan' amatabaza, mube mas' ubu.Wa Mukw' araje : mumusanganire ! 
 Azajyan' abiteguy' i bwami mw ijuru. Mwitange, noneho  Ntimugapfapfane  Dor' araje niko yadusezeranije !

title: 393.Yesu, tugushimir' abera bawe
lyrics:
393.Yesu, tugushimir' abera bawe, Baguhimbarishaga kukwizera, None bari mu buruhukiro : Mwami wacu Yesu, tugushime cyane !


2.War' igihome cyabo n'urutare, War' umugaba wabo ku rugamba, N'izuba ryabo ryo mu mwijima. Mwami wacu Yesu, tugushime cyane !
 

3.Nkuko bagirag' ubutwari bwinshi, Kurwana kwacu natwe kube kwiza. Tuzahanwe nab' ingororano; Mwami wacu Yesu, tugushime cyane!
 

4.Gufatanya na bo kwacu ni kwiza; Bafit' ubwiza : twe tugir' inenge; Dusangira na bo Databuja. Mwami wacu Yesu, tugushime cyane !
 

5.Iyo tugiye gucogozwa rwose N'intambar' idasiba, ni bwo twumva Impundu zabo, tugakomera. Mwami wacu Yesu, tugushime cyane !
 

6.Dor' ubugingo bwacu ni nk'umunsi ; Bugiye kwira, maze turuhuke; Tuzabon' amahoro mw ijuru. Mwami wacu Yesu, tugushime cyane !
 

7.Bukeye hazaz' undi munsi mwiza, Bazazuka bafit' ubwiza bwawe; Umwami Yes' azazana na bo, Mwami wacu Yesu, tugushime cyane !
 

8.Kand' azakir' intore ze zo mw isi Ku mpera y'isi hos' aziteranye, Zijye mw ijuru zimusingiza.Mwami wacu Yesu, tugushime cyane !

title: 394.Duhurure ngo twitabe
lyrics:
394.Duhurure ngo twitabe, Tujye mu ntambara. Mbe, kwicara kumaz' iki,Satan' akiriho ? Dor' ar' imber' ahagaze.
 We n'abadayimoni. Twiringiy' Umucunguzi Ko yamunesheje.



ref:Kwizera Krisito ! Kwizera Krisito ! Ni ko kudushoboza Kunesh' iby'iyi si.



2.Twahaw' inkot' ikomeye, N' Ijambo ry'Imana. Ni yo yanesherej' abe Mu bihe bya mbere. Ingabo yitwa kwizera
 Yarabakingiye. Natwe ni y' idukingira Twiringiye Yesu.



3. Abanzi baragwiriye, Barwany' Uwiteka. Tuzabanesha, twambaye Intwaro ze zose: Ingofero y'agakiza, Umweko w'ukuri,

 Inkweto z'amahoro ye, Biradukomeza !



4. Unesh' ibyah' azambikwa Umwambaro wera. Yes' azavug' izina rye Ku Mana mw ijuru. Dukanguke, dutambuke,
 Turwan'intambara  Tunesh' abanzi, twizeyo Izina rya Yesu.

title: 395.Tumeny' ubwami buri mw ijuru
lyrics:
395.Tumeny' ubwami buri mw ijuru, Yesu yadutunganirije. Mur'ubwo bwami, nta buriganya; Abatuyeyo n' ab'ukuri.
 

2. Uwirarira n'uw'ibinyoma Ntazagerayo k' Uwiteka. Arik' uwihan' akamwizera, Umwami Yesu ntamuheza.
 

3. Icyamuzanye n' ugutabara Abanyabyaha bamushaka. Ni tub'intore z'Umwami Yesu, Tuzicar' i We mu mahoro.

title: 396.Ni heh' abizera bazajya kuba
lyrics:
396.Ni heh' abizera bazajya kuba ? Mur'iyi si nta ho tuzakirira. Nta hantu hatagerwa n'umubisha : Ibibi nta hantu twabihungira.
 Nta ho, nta ho, mw isi nta ho;  Mw ijuru ni hw i wabo w'abizera. 



2.Tuzimuka mw isi, tuger' i wacu; N' aheza twubakiwe n'Umukiza. Ku Mana yacu, har' amazu menshi Yubakany' isuku tutarabona.
 Ni ho, ni ho, ni hw i wacu;  N' ubuturo bwiza tuzahoramo.



3. Yesu ni W' ugir' amahoro meza; Urupfu n'ibyago ni W' ubitsinda. Abashak' ubugingo budashira Ni mumwizigire azabarengera.
 Muze mwese, dushengere;  Mw ijuru, tuzimanan'Umukiza.

title: 397.Mw isi tubonana n'inshuti
lyrics:
397.Mw isi tubonana n'inshuti, Tugatandukana vuba : Mw ijuru si ko biri.
 

ref:Tuzabon' ibyishimo, Ibyishim' ibyishimo. Tuzabon' inshuti zacu, Tutakibasha gutandukana.  

2. Ni hw abakund' Umwami Yesu Bose bazateranira, Batagitandukana.


3. Kandi tubony' Umucunguzi, Tuzagir' umunezero Urut' iyindi yose.
 

4. Kandi tuzajya duhimbaza Yesu. tumuririmbira Mw ijur' iteka ryose.

title: 398.Kwa Data mw ijuru
lyrics:
398.Kwa Data mw ijuru, nta wubabara,Nta wubabara, nta wubabara. Kwa Data mw ijuru, nta wubabara : Baranezerwa !
 

2.Kwa Data mw ijuru, nta wiganyira,Nta wiganyira, nta wiganyira. Kwa Data mw yuru, nta wiganyira : Ho n' amahoro!
 

3.nta wucumura bera  dedede !
 

4.nta nyot' ibayo Hariy' isoko !
 

5.nta nzar' ibayo Barahagijwe !
 

6.nta ndwar' ibayo Nibazima pe!
 

7.nta rukumbuzi Haba n'irungu!
 

8.nta n'abagipfa Babahw iteka !
 

9.ni hw i wanyu se ? Uzatahayo?
 

10.nanjye ndajyayo !Bamp'ikibanza.
 

11.nzasanga Yesu Nuko, nzanyurwa !

title: 399.Iyi si turimo
lyrics:
399.Iyi si turimo—N' iy'ibyago N'iy'umubabaro—N'amakuba; Isi nshya tujyamo, Yo n' iy'igikundiro N'iy'umunezero—N'amahoro.
 

2.Kukw ari ho Yesu—Atunganya, Ari hw azajyana—Abantu be.Abo yikuriye Mu bise by'urupfu rwe, Abo yikirije,—Bakab' abe.
 

3.Yemw' abakijijwe—N'amaraso. Mwaneshej' ibyaha—Kubwa Yesu,Muhore mukunda Umuremyi w'ijuru, Muhore mwifuza—Kuzabayo.
 

4.Nimuze, twibuke—Ababayo : Nta byaha bagira; n' ab'Imana.Natw' abakijijwe Dukund' Umucunguzi, Tunezerewe ko—Tuzab' i We.
 

5.Nimuze, tugire—Umutima Uzinukw' iyi si—y'umwijima, Kukw abari mw isi Bataz' Umucunguzi, Batandukanijwe—N'Uwiteka.

title: 400.Twebw' abasiganirwa aho dutegekwa
lyrics:
400.Twebw' abasiganirwa aho dutegekwa, Twitegey' ururembo Tuza gutahamo.

ref:Urwo rurembo rwera
 N'ibirimo byose Byubatswe n'izahabu Zirabagirana.
 

2.Reka mbaganirire Ibiri muri rwo, Mumeny' ibyiza byarwo, Murwifuze namwe
 

3.Urupfu ntirubayo,Nta no kunanirwa, Nta mbeho, nta n'izuba, Nta ndwara, nta byago.
 

4.Udakijijwe wese Ntabw' azatahamo, Kukw azahezwa hanze Hamwe na Satani.
 

5.Mbe, mur'izo si zombi, N' iyihe uhisemo? Mbes' iyi s' izashonga Ni y' uzahamamo ?
 

6. Musig' iby'ino mw isi Bitazahoraho, Mwiyegurire Yesu, Umwami w'ijuru.

title: 401.Iri  joro, yemwe bakristo
lyrics:
401.Iri  joro, yemwe bakristo  mwese,Turabibuts' Umwana w'Imana, Uko yaje kuducungura twese,Ngw Iman' izadukure mu byaha.

 Abo mw isi bose banezerewe Iri joro, bibuk' Umukiza. Mupfukame, mushim’Umucunguzi ! Tunezerwe, tunezerwe twese ! (x2)

                                                                                                                                                        

2.Kwizigira kwacu, bakristo mwese,Kudutere guhimbaz' Umwami; Inyenyeri y’ iracyaka kw ijuru Ahw abanyabwenge bayibonye. Uwo Mwami

 yashyizwe mu muvure: Mubimenye, rubanda mwese mwe ! Munezerwe kukw Iman' ibikiza. Munezerwe, mwambaz' uwo Mwami ! (x 2)



3. Umukiza yabakuye mu kaga No mu buretwa bw'umwanzi mubi. Mwes' abita ben' Imana Rurema; Abigish' iby'urukundo rwayo.

 Tumwerurire yuko tumukunda:Yadupfiriye ku Musaraba. Rubanda mwe, mwishime cyane none ! Tunezerwe, tunezerwe twese ! (x 2)

title: 402.Ijwi ryumviswe
lyrics:
402.Ijwi ryumviswe n'abantu Ribatunguye, riti: Shimwa, Mana : kuzwa mw isi. Amahor' abe bose! Mbes' izo ndirimbo twumva
 Zitangaza n' iza he ? Bungeri, n' abamarayika Bababwir' Ubutumwa.



2.Uw’ iyi si yatabaje Kuko yagwij' ibyago, Kuv' igihe yikoreye
 Umutwaro w'ibyaha, Umukiza wahanuwe Wadusezeranijwe, Uwiringirwa byukuri Non' aratuvukiye.



3.Shimwa, Mana ! Kuzwa mw isi !  Amahor' abe hose !Urukundo n'amahoro Biraduhishuriwe. Hamwe n'Intumwa z'Imana,
 Twese turangurure, Dushime no gushimisha Impano y'Umukiza.

title: 403.Nyenyeri yo mu museke
lyrics:
403.Nyenyeri yo mu museke, Ubonets' uri kw ijuru,Ur' umucy' utuvira. Tumurikir' imitima, Utweyurir' umwijima Ukunda kuba mw isi. 
 

ref:Mwami, Mwana—w'Uwiteka, Muri Wowe,—har’ umucyo: Jy udushorera, Mukiza.
 

2.Ni Wowe, Yesu, wanshatse Mu mwijima wa Satani,Ubwo nari muri wo, Wowe, Mucunguzi wanjye, Wankuye mu bwenge buke Kubw' urukundo rwawe.
 

3.Wiyambuy' icyubahiro, Wigira nk'umugaragu Utagir' agaciro. Uhorw' ibyaha nakoze, Mpeshw' amahoro n'ubuntu N'urupfu rwawe, Yesu.
 

4.Mucunguzi, mbane nawe, Njye nkwizeran’umurava :Uz' intege nke zanjye; Njye nkor’ iby' ushaka byose. Non' unshunshumurireho Umwuka wawe Wera.

title: 404.Yesu Krist' agiye kuza
lyrics:
404.Yesu Krist' agiye kuza :Tubyuke, ben' Imana. Igihe cye kiri hafi: Umwam' azaboneka. ( x 2)
 

2.Aje kwimana n'abera No gukiz' Itorero. Ni W' uzaryambik' ikamba Ry'ubwiza budashira. (x 2)
 

3.Ntutinye, mukumbi muto :Ukundwa n'Imana, So; Umusaraba wa Yesu Ni wo bendera yawe. (X 2)
 

4. Abo mw isi ni bakwanga, Biguhesh' umugisha; Urukundo no kwizera Bizaguha kunesha. (x 2)

title: 405.Dor' is' ukunt' ikwifuza
lyrics:
405.Dor' is' ukunt' ikwifuza : Mukiz' iragukumbura ! Umv' uko bagutakira, Ngo n'iki kigutindije ? 
 Uzaza ryari, Mucunguzi, Wime bwa bwami budashira, Ngw ibyaremwe byose byishime ? Icyamp’ ukaz’ udatinze !



ref:Umwami Yes' ubw' azaza, (X 3) Tuzamureba, tunyurwe !



2.Azazana n'ingabo ze, Impanda bazivugije, Abapfiriye muri We, Bazuke, bamusang' ubwo ! 
 Natw' abazaba bakiriho atujyane hamwe na bo, Tubane na W’ iteka ryose. Icyamp' akaz' adatinze!



3.Satani n'abadayimoni Bazahunga mu maso he, Ab'isi b'abagurano, Azaza ngw ababature ! 
 Kand' amahor' azatwar' isi; Azac' intambara, zishire, Ahindur’ ibi byose bishya. Icyamp' akaz' adatinze !
