4.Bagenzi, tube mas' ubu, Duhore tumwiteguye. N'ukuri, Databuj' uwo, Nta wuz' igih' azazira. Nyamar' azaza ku ngoma ye,

 Aya makub' ayamareho. Duhumure, dutegereze. Icyamp’ akaz’ adatinze!

title: 406.Jyan' umucyo mur'Afurika
lyrics:
406.Jyan' umucyo mur'Afurika ! Gend' uyimaremw umwijima ! Bwir' abantu bose barimo Yuko Yes' akiza,—Ko yagukijije.
 Ni We Mwami;—Ni We Mwami : Ni We Mana—Ijy'ikiz' abanyabyaha.(twebw' abanyabyaha)



2.Mbese, mur'Afirika hose, Ko harimw umwijima mwinshi ? None kugira ng' ushiremo, Yes' aragutumye—Kuvug' Ubutumwa.
 Wiceceka !—Wiceceka ! Jyan' umucyo—Umurikir' Afurika.(abo mw Afurika)



3.Harihw ingororano nziza Yesu yiteguye gutanga : Azazih' umuntu witanze Ngw avug’ Ubutumwa,—Ngw ajyane n'umucyo.

 Reba Rwanda !—Reba Rwanda ! Icyibaza :—N' ik' i Rwanda ikubaza ?(Mbe, n' ik' ikubaza?)



4.Reba Yes’ Umwana w'Imana Yari mw ijuru hamwe na Se; Maz' abonye tugiye gupfa, Ava mu bwiza bwe,—Aza mur'iyi si,
 Ni ko gupfa;—Ni ko gupfa Urw'isoni—Rwo ku musaraba mubi.(ari twebw' azize)



5.Mwami Yesu, nsabye k' umfasha, Ukankiz' ibyaha bindushya, Bigatuma ntabasha rwose Kuvuga k' ukiza,—Ngo

 nkuber' intumwa  Itatumwe—Itatumwe	 N'abakuru,—Itumwe n'Uwampfiriye.

title: 407.Umurimo wacu ni mwiza cyane
lyrics:
407.Umurimo wacu—Ni mwiza cyane : Dushakire Yesu—Abazimiye.Iyo babonetse,—Abo mw ijuru Bajya baririmba,—Bat' Aratsinze.
 

Ref:Uyu murimo ni mwiza; N'Umwami Yesu ntahwema. Dushishikare dukore: Ni W uduter' imbaraga.
 

2.Uwitek' ashimirw'—Umucunguzi Wadutoye twese—Ngo tube benshi. Tur' ab'intege nke:—Tujye twizera, Twe kugir' ubute—Tumukorera.
 

3.Uyu murimo we—Tuwuhoremo : Twibuk' izo mbuto,—Tuzibagare ! Nyir'ibisarurwa—Yaradutumye : Tuzagororerwa—Tuzimuritse.
 

4.Mu makuba yose—N'ibibabaza, Naho batugaya,—Tuzakomere. Twibuk' umurimo,—Tuwukomeze, Tub' ab'urukundo,—Ben' Uwiteka !

title: 408.abakijijwe mwese
lyrics:
408.abakijijwe mwese,abo dufatanije muze none twibaze ibyo twakora.
 

Ref:Abakunzi ba Yesu, Nkuko yadukijije, Ni ko bidukwiriye Kwamamaz' ibye.
 

2.Igihe kizagera, Iman' itwibarize Ab'iwacu mu rugo N'abaturanyi.
 

3.Nuko, tubageremo, Tubabwir' ibya Yesu, Kand' Umwuka w'Imana Adukoreshe.
 

4.Dor' abadakijijwe Baragwiriye bose : Bazakizwa bate se, Bataburiwe ?
 

5. Reka tubasabire, Kandi tubabwirize, Bene wacu bakizwe.Yes' ashimishwe.

title: 409.Yes' aradubamagara
lyrics:
409.Yes' aradubamagara,Ati : Nimubyuk' ubu : Ibisarurwa bireze,Unsarurira ni nde ? Uhamagawe na Yesu :
 Ni wow' ubwaw' ashaka ! Umwitabish' umutima. Uti : Mwami, nyakira !



2.Ntuzahere kure cyane Kwamamaz' ibya Yesu : Abaguye bari  hafi,N'abazimiye na bo. Umurim' uradutota;
 Dufit' umwete muke. N’ ubur' integ' umusange, Uti : Mwami, mfash' ubu !



3.Nubw' utazi gushyomoka Kuk' utar' umuhanga, Hamya gusa ko wamenye Ko Yes' ababarira.
 Ujy'ubwir' abandi bose Ibyo yagukoreye;Nuk' umwinging' agufashe, Uti : Mwami, nyigisha !



4.Hataboneka muri twe Uvuga kw ananiwe !Udushoboza ni Yesu Gukund’ ibyiza byose.
 Dukor’ iyo mirimo ye N'urukundo n'umwete, Maz’ ishize, tuzavuge, Tuti : Mwam' utwakire !

title: 410.Yesu, ni Wowe dushima
lyrics:
410.Yesu, ni Wowe dushima : Watuguz' amaraso yawe Cya gihe wadupfiraga. Imibiri n'imitima 
 N' iyawe kubw' ubuntu bwawe Buduhay' ubukiriro. None tur' abawe—Kuko wadutoye;Tugushime,—Udukere, Mucyo wacu, Twe kuguma mu mwijima.



2.Twebwe si twe twagushatse : Ni Wow' ubwawe wadukunze Kubw' ubuntu bwawe bwinshi. 
 Twebwe nta ntege dufite : Nta wabasha kugukorera, Utamuhay' imbaraga, Yobor' imitima !
 —Tujyane kwa Data Mu bwami bwe :—Ab'ukuri babushaka Ntibanga gusuzugurwa.



3.Garagaz' ubuntu bwawe Ku bataz' ubwami bw'Imana, Bigumiye mu mwijima. Kera kose ntibumvise

 Ubutumwa butunezeza Bukesh' imitima yacu. None, wategetse—Umucyo w'ukuri Ng'uboneke.
 —Mwami Yesu, tuyobore, Utwerek' inzira yawe.



4.Ibisarurwa ni byinshi, Abasaruzi ni bakeya: Tum' abagusarurira ! Duhatwe n'ubuntu bwawe 
 Guhamagar' abantu benshi, Bahabw' ibyiza by'Imana. Uwemerwa wese—Mu bwami bw'Imana Arahirwa;
 —Anezezwa n'amahoro Azagir' iteka ryose.

title: 411.Ai Data wo mw ijuru
lyrics:
411.Ai Data wo mw ijuru, Tur' abasaruzi,  Ubakure muri twe Babone kugenda, Bavuge Yesu cyane Ko yaducunguye, 
 Kw ari We Mana yacu Irokor' ab'isi.



2.Yaguherey' ubuntu;Jy'utangir' ubundi! Ibyo dufite byose Bikomok' ahw iri. Twemeze cyane rwose, Mucunguzi wacu, 
 Gutumwa nawe hose Mu bo wapfiriye.



3. Mukiza wacu Yesu, Utwuzuz' Umwuka, Mwami tukwigireho, Nkuko wagendaga. Twe kub' abanyabute,
 dushishikarire Gukor' ibyo tubwirwa N'Iman' ihoraho.



4. Reb' igihugu cyacu, Uko barimbuka ! Ntubabazwa n' i wanyu, Akaga barimo ? Satan' Umwami wabo
 Arabazitiye, Ashaka ko babana Mur'urya murimo.



5.induru ziravuze,Ubatabar' ubu ! N' ucogozwa n'iby'isi,Babwirwa na nde se? Tang' umubiri wawe N'ingingo n'ubwenge,

 Ubone gutabara Abo yapfiriye.



6.Urwanane na Yesu :Kweta bihebuje ! We kwitwaz' umufuka N'ibitabo gusa ! Gend' ubyawe n'Imana
 Ukijijwe rwose, Wuzuy' Umwuka Wera No kwizera na ko.



7.Ijwi ry'Umwami Yesu Rirakubwira ngo : Jya mu mahanga yose,Uvug' ibya Yesu, Babyarw' ubwa kabiri.
 Yes' abarokore, Babatizwe n'amazi N'Umwuka Wera de.(Rwanda)

title: 412.Isi yos' iririmbe
lyrics:
412.Isi yos' iririmbe,— ibitangaza Umukiza wa twese—Yadukoreye.Amahang' ukw angana Yos' asingize Yesu !
 

2.I burasirazuba,—Bamuhimbaze ! Abashinwa bashime—Umucunguzi,Abahindi bemere Yesu wabapfiriye.
 

3.Kandi n'Abisilamu—Bamusingize : N'amahanga barimo—Ayabature.Yes' Umwami, bemere Yuko yabacunguye.
 

4.Abatuye mu mbeho,—Aho bagira Ijoro rirerire—Ritinda gucya,Bemer' Umucyo w'isi, Ngo bave mu mwijima.
 

5.N'abo mu Rwanda rwacu,—Bamusingize.Bang' ingeso za kera,—Bamuyoboka, Bati : Ngwin' utwimemo, Ur' Umwami w'ijuru.
 

6.Amahanga yo mw isi—Yose ukw angana Yemer' Umucunguzi,—Amuyoboke;Abakijijwe bose Bamusingiz' iteka.

title: 413. Intumwa z'Umwami Yesu
lyrics:
413. Intumwa z'Umwami Yesu Zababarijwe mw isi; Zahaw' izina rye ryera, Bazibambish' amahwa.
 

ref:Twe, twes' abakijijwe, Twitange, tubabwirize Ijambo ry'Umwami Yesu, Maze, na bo bakizwe !
 

2. Twa kwita mu kaga k'isi, Twihute, tubabwire Ijambo ry'Umwami Yesu, Tugarur' intama ze.
 

3.Abataz' Imana yacu,Twihute, tubabwire  Ijambo ry'Umwami Yesu, Barek' ibyaha rwose.
 

4.Dor' intambara n'ibyago Bir' imbere yac' ubu. Abarwanir' ubutumwa, Twihute, tubukwize.
 

5.Peter' ubw' amwihakanye,Yumv' inkoko zibitse; Nukw aricuz' ararira; Maz' arababarirwa.
 

6.Twemere kuvug' ukuri Hagati y'abanzi be; Tubabibemo n'imbuto Yesu yatubibyemo.
 

7.Uwizera yatorewe Kubageza ku Mana, Ngo bave mu byaha byabo: Tyo nimubabwirize !
 

8. Mwizerwa, genda wishima : Uzagera mw ijuru ! Uzambikw' ikamba ryera : Nta rupfu rugerayo !(Rwanda)

title: 414.Urutare rw'Imana
lyrics:
414.Urutare rw'Imana N' ingab' idukingira. Duce ku Musaraba, Tunesh' Umwanzi wacu.
 

Ref:Tugende mu misozi, Tubabwir' ibya Yesu : Maze, na bo bakizwe. Be kujya mu muriro,
 

2.Isi yacu yuzuye Agahinda n'ibyaha; Satani yagwijije Abo yahumishye.


3.Bene wacu bo mu ngo Ntabwo bazi Krisito : Baribaz' ukw ameze No gukizw' icy' ari cyo.
 

4.Abahisemo Yesu, Nimuze, dutambuke, Twerekan' ubuntu bwe N'amaraso twozemo.
 

5.Kand' abishushanije Ntibazajya mw ijuru, Kerets’ abakijijwe, Buhagijw' amaraso.
 

6.Abafit’ idini nsa, Bakayoberwa Yesu, Ni bo batubabaza : Ntibazajya mw ijuru !
 

7.Nshuti, warahemutse; Yes’ uramubabaje. Dore, wamuvuyeho, Wibagirw' ubuntu bwe.
 

8.Nanjy’ Iman' inkomeze,Ne kujya mubabaza; Nukw amfash' anyobore, Nite ku rukundo rwe.

title: 415. Turashim' Imana
lyrics:
415. Turashim' Imana yuko twavukiye Ku ngoma y'Umwami Yesu, Nyir’ imbabazi. Iyo tuvuka ku ngoma ya Satani, None tuba twihebye,
 

ref:Yesu, tugukunde cyane (X 3) Kuko watwitangiye !
 

2.None baba badutapfunir' itabi, N'amajosi n'amaboko byuzuy' impigi : Byos' Umwami Yesu yabidukuyeho, Nukw aduh' amahoro.
 

3.Dukunde Yes' udukunda turi bato ! Yaturemeshej’ Ijambo ryayo ryonyine; Yaduhaye n'ababyeyi badukunda,Batureran' ineza.

title: 416.Gumy' ushime
lyrics:
416.Ref:Gumy' ushim' ushim' ushim' Ushim' Umukiza !
 

1.Ibikomeye biranesheka, Utaretse gushima.
 

2.Na Satani ntazagushobora,Utaretse gushima.
 

3.Amakuba ntiyakwihebesha,Utaretse gushima.
 

4.Uraryoherwa n'ibyo mw ijuru,Utaretse gushima.
 

5. Yes’ uramwireber' unezerwe, Utaretse gushima.

title: 417.Yesu ni Umukiza
lyrics:
417.Yesu ni Umukiza Ndamwiringiye.x2
 

Ref:Nd' igiti cyatewe ku mugezi: Nd' amahoro pe !
 

2.Sinkinyeganyega,Kukw ankomeza.x2
 

3.No mu cyi, sinuma,Ntewemuri We.x2
 

4.Iyo ngiye kugwa, Arandamira.x2
 

5.Iyo mbony' ibyago,Arandengera.x2
 

6.Satan' iy' anteye,—Ntabw' anshobora.x2

title: 418. Wa gatabaza kanjye we
lyrics:
418. Wa gatabaza kanjye we, Yesu ngo Murika !
 

ref:Murika !Murika ! Murika !
 

2.Satan' ampuh' anzimye ? Shwi ! ,Yesu ngo, Murika ! 
 

3.Ntwikirwe mu gitebo ? Shwi Yesu ngo, Murika !
 

4.Murikir' abo mu Rwanda !Yesu ngo, Murika !
 

5.N'az' azansange murika !Yesu, ngo Murika !

title: 419.Har' Umwami wa kera
lyrics:
419.Har' Umwami wa kera ;Yar’ umugwaneza. Hari kuri Noweli, Areb' umutindi; Yaratoraguraga
 Udukwi ku kwezi. Imbeho yari nyinshi; Yendaga no kumwica.



2.Nukw abaz' umwambari W'umuhungu muto, At’ Uriya mutindi,Uz' i wabo, mbese? Und’ aramusubiza,
 Ati: Ye, ndahazi : Aba mu kirorero Cyo hirya y'umusozi.



3.Ati : Ngwino, mwambari,Tumugemurire. Nzanir' amafunguro N’ibyo kunywa n'inkwi. Barahagurukana,
 Badatiny' imbeho, Kandi bihanganira Umuyaga w'icyago.



4.Nyum' umwan' ariheba,Atakir' Umwami, At' Imbeh’ iranyishe :Biramera bite ? Nukw aramubwir' ati :
 Jy'ushing' aho mvuye : Ubunyinya bw'imbeho Ntabwo buri bukwice!



5.Umwan' abigenz' atyo,Ager' ikirenge Mu cy'Umwami, shebuja, Maz' ashir' imbeho. Umwami n'umwambari
 Baca mu rubura, Bajy’ ah' umutind' ari, Baramugemurira.



6.Natw' inshuti za Yesu.Twa kwimeny' ubwacu. Nkuko twababariwe,
 Tubabarirane. Abajvana na Yesu Gutabar' abandi Na bo bazagabana Umugisha w'Imana

title: 420.Habay’ umuntu twizeho
lyrics:
420.Habay’ umuntu twizeho; Izina rye ni Yosefu—kera.
 

2.Yar'afit’ abavandimwe, Nyamara barahemutse—cyane.
 

3.Bamujugunye mu bushya, Basig’ umwend' amaraso—menshi.
 

4.Hanyuma, bamucuruza N'abantu b' Ishimayeli—bamwe.
 

5.Babeshya se, bavuga ko Yariwe n'inyamaswa mbi—si byo.
 

6.Mw Egiputa, yarafunzwe; Iherez' arafungurwa—neza.
 

7.Abon’ ukw arotorera Umwami waho, Farawo—koko.
 

8.Bamufunguy' ahinduka Igisonga cya Farawo—cyiza.
 

9.Hatey' inzara, bene se Bamanuka kwihahira—iwe.
 

10.Yanga kubirondorera,Ngo bemer' ibyo bakoze—bibi.
 

11.Iherezo, barihana,Nukw arabababarira— rwose.


12.Abakiran' imbabazi,No kwimuka, barimuka—bose.
 

13.Baraza, bav' i Kanani, Bazana na se, Yakobo—ubwe.
 

14.Uko ni ko Yosefu uwo Yakijije bene wabo—bose.
 

15.Bisa n'ubuntu bwa Yesu Yagiriy' ababisha be—ni twe !

title: 421.Nguhaye, Data wera,Uyu mwaka wose
lyrics:
421.Nguhaye, Data wera,Uyu mwaka wose, Ngo mbone kub' uwawe Mu bibaho byose. Sinasaba kw ibyago
 Mbikurwaho byose; Icyo ngusabye n'uko Nzajya ngushimisha.



2.Mbe, ni nde wah' umwana Byos' ibyo yifuza ? Nyamara se ntamwima Ibyiza by'ukuri. Nawe, Man' iby' uduha
 Biradukwiriye : Birut' ibyo twibwira N'ibyo twisabira.



3. Ahar' ubuntu bwawe Buzanyemerera Kubon' ihirwe ryinshi Ntari nsanzwe mfite; Byamera bityo, Mwami,
 Nzajya ngushimira, Ngo nkuz' izina ryawe Mu bataryemeye.



4.Nib’ uzashaka yuko Mbon' imibabaro N'ibyago n'amakuba,Ngo mfush' ibyo nkunda; Nabw' uzamfashe, Mana,
 Ngo nibuke Yesu, Uburyo yihanganye, Ubwo yampfiraga.



5.Nuko, mu byago byose.Nzajya ngusingiza, Menye kw iby' umpa byose,Biva mu rukundo. Nuk' uyu mwaka wose Ub' uwawe, Mana; Mu byiza no mu byago, Mbiguhimbarishe

title: 422. Yesu yageze mu Rwanda
lyrics:
422. Yesu yageze mu Rwanda, N'i Burund' agerayo; Yigerey' i Tanganyika N'i Bugande n'i Kongo. Yadukuye mu bugoryi
 No mu mwijima mwinshi; Tumuberey' umuryango : Tumusingize cyane !



2.Imana yishimye cyane Kubon' ibyo yaremye; Byari biboneye byose, Nta n'inenge byarimo. Maz' umunt' iramurema,
 Ab' umukurambere W'inyamaswa n'amatungo; Byos' abyit' amazina.



3.Satan' ajy'arushy' abantu,Abah' ibishushanyo No kubabuz' agaciro No kubarushya cyane. Yabahugije Umuremyi,
 Ababwir' ibinyoma. Abahemukir' iteka : Ni we mwanz' ukabije.



4.yemwe mwese abari mw isi. Abakuru n'abato, Nimumenye yukw Imana Yer' ikang' ibyaha pe !

Ni cyo cyatumy' ic' Adamu,We na Eva, mw Edeni, Ikarimbura ya mirwa, Sodomu na Gomora.



5.Yemwe mwes' abari mw isi, Namw' abari mw ijuru, Nimumeny' Imana yacu Yukw ar' inyambabazi! Yatanze n'Umwana wayo,Aratubabarizwa; Yagiriwe nabi cyane, Bamubamba ku Giti.



6.Yes' ashobor' imitima Y'abinangiye bose, Uhereye mu Buraya,
 Ukageza mw Afrika. Nta mitima w' atabasha, Nubwo yaba nk'ibuye; Nubw' irimw ibyaha byinshi Yos' arayishobora.

title: 423.Reka nshim’ Umwami Yesu
lyrics:
423.Reka nshim’ Umwami Yesu Kuko yankunze rwose : Yarampinduye mb' umwana, Ngo tubane mw ijuru.
 

Ref:Reka nshim' Umwami Yesu Ko yamvanye mu byaha; Noneho, mfit' amahoro Arut' ay'isi cyane.
 

2.Mur'iyi si dutuyemo Yuzuy' uburiganya, Ntabwo yabasha guhaza Iby' imitim' ishaka. 
 

3.Kand' Umwuka wawe wera,Abamuhawe bose, Ni W' ujy' abazinukisha Kwifuz' i by'isi byose,
 

4.Ujye wirukan’ ubwenge Bwa Satan' anzanira Bwo kuntandukanya nawe, Isoko y'ubugingo.
 

5.Yemw' ababyawe n'Imana,Mujye muhirimbana, Mugere ku Musaraba, Mubone kunesh' isi.
 

6.Yes' amaz’ imyaka myinshi Ajy'atwihanganira; Nimuze, dusig' ab'isi, Babone kutwifuza.
 

7.Mwe kujya muvuga Yesu,Uwo mwumvany' abandi; Mujye mumureb’ ubwanyu, Ari ku Musaraba.
 

8.Mwe kujya mukebaguza No gusubir' inyuma Mu byo mwahozemo kera,Mudahemura Yesu !

title: 424.Iteka Nagendaga
lyrics:
424.Iteka Nagendaga  Ndemerewe N’ibyaha Ntihagire Ikibasha Kumara Umubabaro 

Ref:Ndashima Umusaraba Ndashima Ya Mva Nziza Ariko Cyane,Cyane Ndashima Umwami Yesu 

2.Kugeza Ubwo Nageze Ahantu Heza Cyane Hangiriye Umumaro Ntazibagirwa Ukundi

3.Iri N’itangiriro Ry’umunezero Wanjye Aha Niho Umutwaro  Wamvuye Ku Mugongo 

4.Ku Musaraba Mwiza Niho Umuntu Abonera Abagabo Batatu Bakamuhumuriza 

5.Ku Musaraba Mwiza Niho Umuntu Abonera Urwandiko Rw’ijuru Rutar’urw’itorero 

6.Umugabo Nta Bwenge Yagiye Nta Rwandiko Agira Ngo Azinjira Nk’ukw’abandi Binjira 

7.Nukw’ageze Kw’irembo Bamubaza Urwandiko Rwa Katanga Ka Mbere Asanga Atarufite 

8.Mu Rubavu Rwa Yesu Havuyemo Amaraso Y’uruzi Rw’ubugingo Yoza Umutima Wanjye 

9.Gira Umwete Winjire Mu Maraso Ya Yesu Uzashiraho Inenge Mu Mutima Wanduye

title: 425. Kera narabatijwe
lyrics:
425. Kera narabatijwe Kandi  ndakomezwa, Ntari nabon' amaraso Y'Umwana w'Imana.
 

Ref:Ko wampfiriye, Ndakwitur' iki?Ndaguh' uyu mutima N'ubugingo bwanjye !
 

2. Mwa bafit' ibyaha mwe, Nimuze, mukizwe : Yesu ni We bukiriro Bw'abantu banduye.
 

3. Mwumv’ aho dukirizwa : Ni ku Musaraba. Utahagez' ashobewe Ntabw' ababarirwa.
 

4.Mwami Yes' unyemere, Njy' ah' ur' uko nd' uku, Unyuhagiz' amaraso, Ayo wamviriye.
 

5.Yesu, warampfiriye,Uwakugomeye; Nkuruwe n'uko wankunze; Ngusanze non' ubu.
 

6.Noneho, ndakwinginze, Nshyira mu maraso, Ay'igiciro wavuye ; Bizambuza kugwa.
 

7.Kand' iyo ngiye kugwa, Arankuyakuya; Maz' akanyigiza hafi Kukw ankunda cyane.
 

8.N'ubu ndacyabanguka Kuyob’ inzira ye; Nakwihana, nkamwisunga, Angaruramw ubwo.
 

9.Uwiteka Rurema Na Yesu yabyaye N'Umwuka Wera bahwanye, Nsingiz' ubutatu.

title: 426.Dukomeze gutambuka
lyrics:
426.Dukomeze gutambuka Kuko Satan’ arindira Kutubona tunanirwa Ngw atwicir' umumaro pe !
 

ref:Mpisemo guhora nkizwa, Ngashingwa mu gakiza ke : Sinzava mu gakiza ke !
 

2.Bahungu, namwe bakobwa, Mukijijwe n'amaraso, Nimufash' abananiwe Bavuye ku Musaraba.
 

3.Bagabo, namwe bagore, Muze, dukizw' ibyo mu ngo, Kukw ibigusha birimo Bitubuza kujy' imbere.
 

4.Umv' umuhanuz' Elisa, Uko yavuye Namani; Maz' amuh' ingemu nyinshi, Elis' arabihakana.
 

5.Namani yarakijijwe, Ashim' Iman' ihoraho; Arerur’ avug' aty' ati: Iman' iba mw Israyeli !
 

6. Va mu kibi cya Gehazi Wakurikiy' indamu mbi! Ni we wajyany' ibibembe Bya Namani yakijijwe.
 

7.Abantu bose bo mw isi, Abagabo n'abagore, Bataz' ubuntu bwa Yesu, Tubah' impumuro nziza.
 

8.Twitandukanye n'ab'isi, Ngo bitume bakanguka, Bave no mu butamenya, Bumvir’Imana y'ukuri.
 

9.Namw' abakunda Siyoni, Murek' idin' ikayutse; Nta n'icyo yabamarira : Ikunda gushimwa gusa.(Rwanda)

title: 427. Urukundo rwa Yesu
lyrics:
427. Urukundo rwa Yesu Koko rwatugezeho, Rudukura mu kaga Ko gukund’ iby'iyi si.
 

Ref:Yes' arakiza : ( X 3) Ni we wankijije.
 

2.Mwemeye kw abakiza, Mukabambanwa na We. Yes' azabajyan' i We, Mu bwiza budashira.
 

3.Abahaw’ Umwuka we, Mugahinduka bashya, Mujye mumunambaho, Muzageze ku gupfa.
 

4.Ariko mbaburire, Abajya bigumanya, Mbese, muzageza he Kutagir’ ibyishimo?
 

5.Reka kwihakirizwa : Abo si bo bakiza ! Kandi ntibakwandika Mu Gitabo cya Yesu !
 

6.Kwihana s' ubuhanga Cyangwa guca mu bwenge, Keretse kwanamiza Yuk' ur' umunyabyaha.
 

7.Abakunda kwihana, Mukareba Siyoni Yo mw ijuru ry’Imana, Mujye muhishimira !(Rwanda)

title: 428.Bene Data b'abirabura
lyrics:
428.Bene Data b'abirabura Murashak' iki se mw Afirika ?Turashak' Uwaducunguye : Ni We Yes' Umwana wa Dawidi.
 

2.Umukiza Yes' utubwira, Twamubona tumeze dute se ? N'uko mwasang' Umucunguzi, Mukazinukw' ingeso zose mbi.
 

3.Mwami Yesu, dore, nditabye ! Ngirir' uko washaka nonaha.Umutima wanjy' ucumura, Uwumaremw umwijima wose.
 

4.Si jye wanze : kera nifuje Kugukiza, maz' uriyangira.None reka nze, nkubohore : Ni jy' urokor' abakiranirwa.

title: 429 .Dor' inzira nziz' ijya mw ijuru
lyrics:
429 .Dor' inzira nziz' ijya mw ijuru Ic' aho yabambwe ku Musaraba; Yayibwiy' umwambuz' umwe wihannye, Ashir' agahinda, arakizwa.


2.Tuzakizwa na nde tutizeye Umukiza wacu wadupfiriye ? Yagiz' agahinda k'abarimbuka, Atang' ubugingo, ngw abakize.
 

3.Nimukizwe mwese kurimbuka, Mugir' ubugingo bw'abakijijwe, Mwizigir' Imana yabacunguye, Muyiture byose kubwa Yesu.
 

4.Dor' uko mu Rwanda barimbuka ! Mubabwir' imana yac' ibakize, Tuzahanwe na bo kuba mw ijuru, Nta gahinda kose, nta kwicuza.
 

5.Wa Musaraba we, ndakwifuza ! Waneshej' urupfu rwic' ab'iyi si; Watsinz' i kuzimu n'ibibabaza, Uduhindura kub' umunt' umwe !

title: 430.Kera nar' umwangizi
lyrics:
430.Kera nar' umwangizi Mu mutima rwihishwa. Maze, mpura n'uw'Imana, Anyigish' ibya Yesu,
 

2.Uk' umuntu yakizwa Urubanza rw'ibyaha, Akabyarw' ubwa kabiri Kubw' urupfu rwa Yesu.
 

3.Ibyo maze kubyumva, Ntsindwa n'urubanz' ubwo, Meny’ ibyaha nagakoze Kuv' aho navukiye.
 

4.Nsaba Yes' imbabazi, Natur' ibyaha byanjye, Nizer' urukund' ankunda; Hanyum' arandokora.
 

5.Kuv' ubwo, njya nzinukwa Iby'isi nakundaga, Menya yuko bizashira. Yes' ubw' azagaruka.
 

6.None, mfit' amahoro N'ubugingo bw'iteka. Yes' ampay' Umwuka Wera; Anesherez' iby'isi.
 

7.Ikimbabaza cyane, Kikanter' agahinda, N' ukureb' abari mw isi Banze kwitaba Yesu.
 

8.Abakijijwe twese Tubabarir' ab'isi,Tubabwire n'Ubutumwa : Ni wo murimo wacu.

title: 431.Abakund' iby'isi
lyrics:
431.Abakund' iby'isi—Ntabwo babihaga; Ba sogokuruza—Nabo ntibahaze.
 

2.Abanga kwihana—Muratubabaza. Ko tubaburira,—Mukizib' amatwi !
 

3.Ibi bibashuka,—Nta kizarokoka, Kerets' abihannye,—Yes' akabakiza
 

4.iyi s' izashira—N'ibirimo byose ; Inka n'imirima—N'intoke n'inzoga.
 

5.Nta kizasigara :—Bizab' umuyonga Ubw' is' izashira,—Muzasigara he ?
 

6.Twebw' abakijijwe—Turanezerewe guca mur'iyi si,—Dufit' amahoro.
 

7.Mwami wacu Yesu,—Turagushimira Ko wadupfiriye,—Ntituzarimbuke.

title: 432.Abo mur'iyi si
lyrics:
432.Abo mur'iyi si—Izashira Nta cyo mwibajije—Ku by'imperuka ?
 

Ref:Ntimwitegereje—Icyiza twabonye ? None, mwisigara—Mu butamenya !
 

2.Dor' icyo twahawe—Cy'igiciro : Twahaw' ubugingo—Butazashira.
 

3.Yesu ni We zuba—Ritwakira; Rituma tureba :—Tumusingize !
 

4.Isi yo mw ijuru—N' ihebuza. Turek' iby'iyi si,—Tuhagabane !
 

5.Ushak' ubugingo—Apfirw' ibye, Nk'ushak' izahabu,—Ukw apfirw'ibye.
 

6.Yemw' abameze nka —Muka loti, Mwikund' iby'iyi si—Izarimbuka !
 

7.Twebw' abakijijwe,—Dutambuke; Ntitugakebuke,—Ngo duhomberwe !

title: 433.Yemw' abasubir' iyo muva
lyrics:
433.Yemw' abasubir' iyo muva, I kuzimu kwa Nyamutezi, Mukarekur' Umusaraba, Ko muneshejwe ? 
 

ref:Yes' ubw' azagaruka, Aje kwim' ingoma ve, Tuzamurebesh' amas' as' ate, Dufit' ibyaha?
 

2.Ubw' utihanira gukizwa, Ukaturir' abantu gusa,Ngo bakumenye k' ukijijwe, Urushywa n'iki ?
 

3.Ubw' ur' umuntu w'umwigisha, Wigish' abant' iby'Uwiteka, Ntubageze ku Musaraba, Wigish' iki se ?
 

4.Ubw' ur' umunyangeso nziza, Ushyitsa byose by'Itorero, Ntusohore ku Musaraba, Wizey' iki se ?
 

5.Ubw' ur' umunyabwenge bwinshi, Byos' uzi no kubigenzura,K' uyobew' iby'Umusaraba, Bikuvuy' iki ?
 

6.Ubw' ur' umunyesoni nyinshi, Utinya kwihana ng' ukizwe, Wibwira kw ar' uguhemuka, Uzageza he ?
 

7. Ngik' icyambu cy'amaraso ye, Wirohemo, wa mutindi we. He kub' agace wasigaza Katuhagiwe.

title: 434.Abo mur'iyi si mbi
lyrics:
434.Abo mur'iyi si mbi Bifuza kwinezeza, Kand' iteka bifuza Icyubahiro.
 

ref:Twebwehw abakijijwe Tubaburire 
 

2.Bishwe n'Umurimbuzi, Abagir' imbata ze, Yanga ko bameny' uko Yes' abatura.
 

3.Igomwa rya Satani, Ajya yoshy' abantu be Abahemukir' atyo, Akabata pe.
 

4.Naho bamutakira, Ntabwo yabarengera; No ku munsi w'imanza Ntazabafasha !
 

5.Ajy'ashuk' abant' atyo, Ngw abate mu muriro, Ngw atabon' iryo shyano,Ari wenyine.
 

6.Mana, turakwinginze, Ubahumur' amaso, Ngo bahung' umuriro, Bagutakire !
 

7.Wa Mukiza wacu we, Umva, turakwinginga : Ngwin' utwigishe neza Kubaburira.
 

8.Nuko, turabinginze, Uk' Umwuka w'Imana Abategetse kose,

title: 435.Muze mwes' abakijijwe
lyrics:
435.Muze mwes' abakijijwe , Abazinutsw' iby' isi; Nimwikorer' umusaraba : Ni w' ubaneshereza.

ref:Umusaraba ni wo bendera Yacu tw' abakijijwe!Twemeye n'isoni zawo : Ni w' utuneshereza.

2.Umusaraba w'isoni N' irembo rifunganye. Uduhata kwiyambura Ibituremerera.

3.Nuko twiyambure byose.Tumere nka ya mpumyi, Uko  itanze gut' umwenda,Ngw isang' Umwami Yesu.

4.Twajyaga dutiny' urupfu :Yes' arugir' irembo Ritugeza vuba cyane Mu bwami bwo mw ijuru.

5.Ibikangisho by'Umwanzi N' iby'intar' iziritswe : Ni tudat' inzira yacu, Ntabw' azadushyikira.

6.Uzura n' Imana vuba Kubw' urupfu rwa Yesu : Amaraso y'Umusaraba Ni y' atwuzuza na Yo.

title: 436. Ubwo nagendaga ndemerewe
lyrics:
436. Ubwo nagendaga ndemerewe , Sinari nz' ubw' icyo ntekereza. None ubu, maze kwihitiramo : Mpisemw Umucunguzi.

ref:Tekereza, nimutekereze ! Mbes' iryo jamho muryitayeho ? Mwibaze, muhitemo .

2. Mbeg' urukundo rw'Umwami Yesu ! Aradukunda tudakwiriye. Ubu ngub' arabahamagara : None, nimuhitemo !

3. Ntangajwe cyane n'imbabazi ze : Ni zo zatumy' anyitangirira; Kandi ngiheze mu mwijim' ubwo, Mvanwamo n'umucyo we.

4. Emera nawe kwihitiramo ! Imur' umwanz' uguhemukira : Wimik' ahubw' Umukiza wawe ! Nta wakez' abo bombi.

title: 437.Mp' amavuta, Yesu, mbone kwaka
lyrics:
437.Mp' amavuta, Yesu, mbone kwaka ! Mp' amavuta, ndakwinginze ! Mp' amavuta, Yesu, mbone kwaka ! Mbone kwaka, burinde bucya !



ref:Turirimbe, turirimbe, Ngo Hozana : tugusingize Wowe, Mwam' utwar' abami: Yesu, tugusingize 



2.Mp' amahoro. Mukiza, nduhuke :Mp' amahoro. ndakwinginze ! Mp' amahoro, Mukiza, nduhuke : Mp' amahoro, burinde bucya !



3.Mp' umunezero, Yesu, ngushime : Mp' igikombe giseseka ! Mp' umunezero, Yesu, ngushime : Njye ngushima, burinde bucya !



4.Mpa kumenek' iteka, Mukiza :Nkomeza ku Musaraba ! Mpa kumenek' iteka, Mukiza : Ujy' umena, burinde bucya !



5.Mpa guhora nkwihangir' amaso :Uk' unyigisha nkwemere ! Mpa guhora nkwihangir' amaso : Nkwigireho, burinde bucya !
